faqs.question: Is Lapulapu good in current season?
faqs.answer: Lapulapu is Tier B Tank with 55.15% win rate, 0.37% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Lapulapu build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Fortitude, Guardian - Radiance, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak, Frigid Charge, Overlord's Platemail.

faqs.question: How to counter Lapulapu?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying. Strong into Meng Ya, Luara, Garo.

faqsZh.question: 拉普拉普 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 拉普拉普 為 B 梯度，勝率 55.15%、選取 0.37%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 拉普拉普 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：影忍之足、近衛・形昭、不祥徵兆、魔女斗篷、冰霜衝擊、霸者重裝.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 拉普拉普？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Wukong、Musashi、Ying。拉普拉普 克制 Meng Ya、Luara、Garo。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Meng Ya, Luara, Garo. Weak into: Wukong, Musashi, Ying.

guide.overview: Lapulapu is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 55.3% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Lapulapu: Enhance Increases the Physical and Magical Defense of himself and the teammate with the lowest Health nearby.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Knowledge Gem, Boots of Resistance, Guardian, then complete Glacial Buckler, Longnight Guardian, Guardian - Redemption. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate, Harmony, Vacuity for stats that match Lapulapu's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Torrential Blade → Island's Blessing → Raging Sea → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Raging Sea (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Torrential Blade, and Raging Sea on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Torrential Blade → Island's Blessing → Raging Sea → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Lapulapu sits at Tier B globally (55.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Lapulapu vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Lapulapu has +3.9% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Lapulapu when you need Roaming identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Lapulapu vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Lapulapu has +3.0% WR vs Dun in Camp data. Choose Lapulapu when you need Roaming identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Lapulapu excels into Meng Ya, Luara, Garo. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.

name: Meng Ya

skills.name: Fiery Temper
skills.description:
Cooldown is reduced when Attack Speed is increased.
Gains Anger when Basic Attack and Skill 1 hit targets. At max Anger, becomes Excited, enhancing all skills. While Excited, surplus Anger restores Health.

skills.name: Awesome Barrage
skills.description:
Uses the Apocalyptor to strafe continuously and deal damage.
Excited: Bullets have a piercing effect, dealing half damage to subsequent enemies.

skills.name: Heavy Shot
skills.description:
Shoots a heavy round in the target direction, inflicting damage and slow. Upon hitting an obstacle or reaching its max range, it will split into splinters that deal damage.
Excited: Increases the number of splinters.

skills.name: Missile Mayhem
skills.description:
Scans the vicinity and fires missiles at enemies within range who are attacked by teammates, dealing damage.
Excited: Reduces interval between missiles.

skillsZh.name: 熾熱渾天
skillsZh.description:
攻速提升時冷卻獲得提升。
普攻和1技能命中目標時增加熾怒值，滿值時進入興奮狀態，強化所有技能。溢出的熾怒值會回復自身生命值。

skillsZh.name: 狂轟火線
skillsZh.description:
使用「渾天」持續掃射，造成傷害。
興奮狀態：子彈具備貫穿效果，對後續敵人傷害減半。

skillsZh.name: 爆裂重砲
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向發射重砲，對敵人造成傷害和減速，碰到阻擋或飛行結束時會分裂霰彈，對敵人造成傷害。
興奮狀態：增加分裂霰彈數量。

skillsZh.name: 飛彈援襲
skillsZh.description:
探索周圍環境，對範圍內受到友軍傷害的敵人發射導彈，對其造成傷害。
興奮狀態：減少導彈發射間隔時間。

guide.overview: Meng Ya is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 53.6% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Meng Ya: Cooldown is reduced when Attack Speed is increased.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Eternity Blade, Boots of Resistance, Daybreaker's Virtue, then complete Shadow Ripper, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Meng Ya's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Awesome Barrage → Heavy Shot → Missile Mayhem → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Missile Mayhem (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Awesome Barrage is your lane trade tool. Heavy Shot second. Missile Mayhem whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Awesome Barrage → Heavy Shot → Missile Mayhem → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Meng Ya sits at Tier B globally (53.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Meng Ya vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Meng Ya has +4.3% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Meng Ya when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Meng Ya vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Meng Ya has +3.5% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Meng Ya when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

name: Garo

skills.name: Piercing Arrow
skills.description: Basic Attacks and skills deal 50% extra damage to shields.

skills.name: Enchanted Arrows
skills.description:
Enhanced: Attack Range and Basic Attack interval increase. Basic Attacks cost Mana and deal damage over time.
Unenhanced: Gains Movement Speed and restores Attack Range and Basic Attack interval to initial values. Basic Attack hits restore Mana.

skills.name: Silent Arrow
skills.description: Fires an arrow in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies hit while silencing and slowing them. After a brief delay, deals another strike of damage to enemies within range of the same location.

skills.name: Sphere of Purity
skills.description:
Creates a magic circle, dealing damage and increasing her Movement Speed and Critical Rate.
When the circle is destroyed, it deals damage and increases her Critical Rate and Movement Speed.

skillsZh.name: 破魔之箭
skillsZh.description: 普攻和技能會對護盾效果造成50%額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 渡靈之箭
skillsZh.description:
開啟技能，射程增加、延長攻擊間隔，普攻消耗法力造成持續傷害。
關閉技能，提升移動速度、初始化射程和攻擊間隔，普攻命中回復法力值。

skillsZh.name: 靜默之箭
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射一支箭，對命中的敵人造成傷害並附帶沉默和減速效果，短暫延遲後，相同位置會再次對範圍內敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 純淨之域
skillsZh.description:
伽羅開啟法陣造成傷害並強化自身移速和暴擊率。
關閉法陣造成傷害並強化自身暴擊率和移速。

tipsZh: 伽羅（發育路）：梯度 S，勝率 53.77%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：仁者破曉、逐日之弓、末世.

patchHistory.change: Reduced Skill 1 damage, standardized Ultimate effects
patchHistory.detail: "Garo's recent performance in the Farm Lane has been too good, as the range and early-game damage from her Skill 1 make it easy for her to gain an advantage during the laning stage. As such, we've reduced the skill's damage. At the same time, we've also standardized the effects of using and ending her Ultimate to make things easier to understand."

patchHistory.change: Casting speed of Skill 2 increases with Attack Speed.
patchHistory.detail: "A fixed casting time made it increasingly dangerous for Garo to use this skill in the late game. Now, her Skill 2's casting speed increases with her Attack Speed."

patchHistory.change: Reduced the extra damage ratio to shields.
patchHistory.detail: "Garo's passive gives her a significant advantage when facing opponents with shields. We've reduced this advantage to balance her strength against different opponents while also improving the experience for shielded heroes when facing Garo."

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低1技能傷害，統一大招開啟關閉效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「伽羅近期在發育路的表現過於突出了，1技能的射程和前期傷害讓她很容易獲得對線的優勢，我們適當降低了1技能傷害；大招在開啟和關閉時效果的也有些難以理解，於是我們將該效果進行了統一。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 2技能施法速度隨攻速提升縮減
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「固定的施法時間讓伽羅在後期施放技能變得更加危險，因此我們讓她的2技能施放速度隨著攻速提升變得更快。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低對護盾的額外傷害比例
patchHistoryZh.detail: 伽羅的被動讓她在面對有護盾的對手時會取得較大的優勢，我們適度降低此比例，以平衡在面對不同對手時的強度，同時也提升護盾英雄面對伽羅時的體驗。

faqs.question: Is Garo good in current season?
faqs.answer: Garo is Tier S Marksman with 53.77% win rate, 1.29% pick rate, and 0.21% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Garo build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Daybreaker's Virtue, Sunchaser, Doomsday, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Haste - Sunpool.

faqs.question: How to counter Garo?
faqs.answer: Pick Lapulapu, Bai Qi. Strong into Nakoruru, Xuance, Li Bai.

faqsZh.question: 伽羅 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 伽羅 為 S 梯度，勝率 53.77%、選取 1.29%、禁用 0.21%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 伽羅 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：仁者破曉、逐日之弓、末世、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、迅疾・日淵.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 伽羅？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Lapulapu、Bai Qi。伽羅 克制 Nakoruru、Xuance、Li Bai。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Nakoruru, Xuance, Li Bai. Weak into: Lapulapu, Bai Qi.

guide.overview: Garo is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 52.9% win rate and 1.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Garo: Deals double damage to shields with Basic Attacks and skills.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Bloodweeper, then complete Eternity Blade, Daybreaker's Virtue, Sunchaser. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Dominator for stats that match Garo's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Enchanted Arrows → Silent Arrow → Sphere of Purity → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Sphere of Purity (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Enchanted Arrows is your lane trade tool. Silent Arrow second. Sphere of Purity whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Enchanted Arrows → Silent Arrow → Sphere of Purity → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Garo is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.3% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Garo. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Garo vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Garo has +3.6% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Garo when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Garo vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Garo has +2.8% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Garo when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Garo excels into Nakoruru, Xuance, Li Bai. Avoid blind picking into Lapulapu, Bai Qi without team peel.

tips: Li Xin (Warrior): Tier S+ — 53.64% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Deepfrost Siege, Overlord's Might, Starbreaker.
tipsZh: 李信（對抗路）：梯度 S+，勝率 53.64%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：寒霜襲侵、強者破軍、碎星錘.

patchHistory.change: Increased Movement Speed and early game base stats, reduced mobility in Revenge form.
patchHistory.detail: Li Xin is rather weak right now, but his Revenge form is very hard to counter. We've boosted his stats in both his forms, especially in the early game, but we've reduced his mobility in Revenge form to make it easier for opponents to chase him down

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升移速和前期基礎屬性，削弱狂暴形態的機動性
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「李信目前的強度偏低，但狂暴形態帶線卻讓對手很難反制；我們提升他全形態（尤其是前期）的屬性，但削弱狂暴形態的機動性，留給對手追上他的可能性。」

faqs.question: Is Li Xin good in current season?
faqs.answer: Li Xin is Tier S+ Warrior with 53.64% win rate, 2.64% pick rate, and 2.84% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Li Xin build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Deepfrost Siege, Overlord's Might, Starbreaker, Pure Sky, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Li Xin?
faqs.answer: Pick Cai Yan, Da Qiao, Guiguzi. Strong into Da Qiao, Liang.

faqsZh.question: 李信 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 李信 為 S+ 梯度，勝率 53.64%、選取 2.64%、禁用 2.84%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 李信 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：寒霜襲侵、強者破軍、碎星錘、純淨蒼穹、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 李信？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Cai Yan、Da Qiao、Guiguzi。李信 克制 Da Qiao、Liang。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Da Qiao, Liang. Weak into: Cai Yan, Da Qiao, Guiguzi.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Da Qiao、Liang；被克制：Cai Yan、Da Qiao、Guiguzi

guide.overview: Li Xin is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 52.6% win rate and 1.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Li Xin: Basic Attacks and Skill 2 grant EXP when they hit enemy heroes.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Spikemail, then complete Cuirass of Savagery, Destiny. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Conflict for stats that match Li Xin's Warrior kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Lightning Dash → Chaos Wave → Light Awakening → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Light Awakening (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Lightning Dash, and Light Awakening on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Lightning Dash → Chaos Wave → Light Awakening → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Li Xin is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.3% — expect Li Xin to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Li Xin vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Li Xin has +2.4% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Li Xin when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.
Li Xin vs Augran (Warrior, Tier S+): Augran is 1.2% pick / 46.9% WR. Li Xin has +5.6% WR vs Augran in Camp data. Choose Li Xin when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Augran for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Li Xin excels into Da Qiao, Liang. Avoid blind picking into Cai Yan, Da Qiao, Guiguzi without team peel.

skills.name: Spear Will - Sweeping Fire
skills.description: Gains an enhanced Basic Attack after using skills. Using the enhanced Basic Attack reduces the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2.

skills.name: Moonslash
skills.description: Launches and deals damage to enemies.

skills.name: Cloudchaser
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed while charging, then dashes forward, dealing damage and slowing enemies.

skills.name: Starburn
skills.description:
Dashes in the target direction, then returns to her original location, launching and dealing damage to enemies in her path. She gains crowd control immunity and damage reduction while dashing.
Second Phase: Deals damage over time in the target location.
While Starburn is active, the second phase of the skill sweeps her surroundings, interrupting subsequent dashes, dealing area damage, and leaving a ring of fire behind for 0.2s.

skillsZh.name: 槍意・掠火
skillsZh.description: 雲纓施放技能後會強化普攻，施放強化普攻可減少1技能和2技能的冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 斷月
skillsZh.description: 雲纓擊飛敵人並造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 追雲
skillsZh.description: 雲纓進入蓄力並加速，結束後向前位移，造成傷害與減速。

skillsZh.name: 逐星
skillsZh.description:
雲纓朝指定方向位移後衝回原地，擊飛路徑上的敵軍並造成傷害，位移時獲得霸體與減傷。
二段效果：對指定區域造成持續傷害。
【逐星】施放期間，可以使用技能第二段橫掃四周，打斷後續突進造成範圍傷害並留下圓形火徑，持續0.2秒。

tips: Build: Dragon's Rage, Boots of Resistance, Blood Rage.
tipsZh: 雲纓（打野）：梯度 A，勝率 53.62%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：怒龍劍盾、抵抗之靴、血魔之怒.

patchHistory.change: Reduced skill cooldowns and increased damage and Health recovery.
patchHistory.detail: Ying was near the top in the rankings during the 'I'm a designer at HoK!' event in HoK Camp. Actually, Ying has notbeen updated for a while. We have reduced her skill cooldowns and slightly increased their damage and Health recovery.

patchHistory.change: Increased her Skill 1 damage.New: Ultimate skill combo usable in even more battle scenarios
patchHistory.detail:
Increased her Skill 1 damage.New: Ultimate skill combo usable in even more battle scenarios
Ying's ability to effectively engage in combat has always relied heavily on the other heroes in her team. While in some lineups Ying does perform well, but in others, it can be a bit of a struggle for her.After a close study of Ying's match indicators over time, we've decided to make certain enhancements to her stats.We hope that these changes can help her perform better in a wider variety of lineups.

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低冷卻時間，提高傷害和回復
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「在HOK CAMP的活動『我在HOK當企劃活動中』雲纓的排名靠前，事實上雲纓也已經沉寂很久了，本次我們降低了雲纓技能的冷卻時間，並適當提高了技能的基礎傷害和回復效果。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高1技能傷害為大招新增一種連招方式，以用於應對更多戰鬥場景
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提高1技能傷害。為大招新增一種連招方式，用於應對更多戰鬥場景
雲纓的戰鬥能力一直很依賴陣容搭配，有些陣容中雲纓確實表現的不錯，但是有些陣容表現又會稍顯掙扎。我們比較了雲纓的長期和多種數據表現，適度增強她。希望她能夠在更多陣容配置都能表現優異。

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 雲纓？

guide.overview: Ying is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 52.4% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Ying: Skills grant marks (up to 3 stacks), and different stacks upgrade thefollowing Basic Attacks into different skills.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Rapacious Bite, Axe of Torment, then complete Frostscar's Embrace, Destiny. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Ying's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Moonslash → Cloudchaser → Starburn → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Starburn (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Cloudchaser provides mobility or stick—max first. Moonslash second for damage. Starburn on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Moonslash → Cloudchaser → Starburn → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Starburn after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Ying is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 52.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Ying. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Ying vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Ying has +2.6% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Ying when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Ying vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Ying has +1.6% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Ying when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Ying excels into Kongming, Liang, Yuhuan. Avoid blind picking into Di Renjie, Erin, Lady Sun without team peel.

name: Menki

skills.name: Dream-eating
skills.description: Gains Mass when using skills. Mass increases his Physical Attack, Physical Defense, and Magical Defense.

skills.name: Lingering Dream
skills.description:
Gains Mass and a shield while damaging enemies within range.
Basic Attack hits reduce this skill's cooldown.

skills.name: Dream Bubble
skills.description:
Throws a bubble in the target direction, then pulls it back. He does this twice.
The bubble damages and slows enemies hit.
The bubble can be thrown again as a bomb in the target direction, damaging enemies.

skills.name: Dream Roam
skills.description: Flies in a circle, dealing magical damage to enemies in his path while gaining Mass. When he stops flying, he launches and damages nearby enemies.

skillsZh.name: 食夢
skillsZh.description: 夢奇施放技能會獲得質量，提升物理攻擊、物理防禦和法術防禦。

skillsZh.name: 夢境縈繞
skillsZh.description:
夢奇獲得護盾值，增加質量，對周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害。
普攻命中敵人會減少【夢境縈繞】的冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 夢力泡泡
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向扔出泡泡後回收，再次向面朝方向扔出後接住。
泡泡會對命中敵人造成傷害和減速效果。
隨後可再次朝指定方向扔出泡泡，對敵人造成傷害。

"We're making Menki's stats match up better with his Mass."

讓夢奇的屬性更加符合他的質量。

faqs.question: Is Menki good in current season?
faqs.answer: Menki is Tier B Mage with 53.41% win rate, 0.31% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Menki build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Rapacious Bite, Deepfrost Siege, Eternity Blade, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Immovable - Sky Dome.

faqs.question: How to counter Menki?
faqs.answer: Pick Ming, Sima Yi, Zhuangzi. Strong into Lady Zhen, Mai Shiranui, Xiao Qiao.

faqsZh.question: 夢奇 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 夢奇 為 B 梯度，勝率 53.41%、選取 0.31%、禁用 0.03%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 夢奇 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：貪婪之噬、寒霜襲侵、無盡戰刃、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、不動・天穹.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 夢奇？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Ming、Sima Yi、Zhuangzi。夢奇 克制 Lady Zhen、Mai Shiranui、Xiao Qiao。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lady Zhen, Mai Shiranui, Xiao Qiao. Weak into: Ming, Sima Yi, Zhuangzi.

guide.overview: Menki is a Medium Mage (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.7% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Menki: Gains Mass when using skills.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Giant's Grip, Boots of Resistance, Shadow Ripper, then complete Blazing Cape, Pure Sky, Blood Rage. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Menki's Mage kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Lingering Dream → Dream Bubble → Dream Roam → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Dream Roam (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Dream Bubble provides mobility or stick—max first. Lingering Dream second for damage. Dream Roam on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Lingering Dream → Dream Bubble → Dream Roam → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Dream Roam after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Menki sits at Tier B globally (51.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Menki vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Menki has +0.6% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Menki when you need Jungling identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Menki vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.1% more often globally. Choose Menki when you need Jungling identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Menki excels into Lady Zhen, Mai Shiranui, Xiao Qiao. Avoid blind picking into Ming, Sima Yi, Zhuangzi without team peel.

name: Athena

skills.name: Divine Awakening
skills.description: Able to move in her Divine form after dying. When resurrected, flies toward the nearest allied tower, dealing damage and launching enemies within takeoff range.

skills.name: Holy Advance
skills.description: Raises her shield and dashes, knocking back and dealing damage to enemies while gaining a shield that grants crowd control immunity.

skills.name: Unstoppable Spear
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction and enhances the next Basic Attack, in which she charges at the enemy and deals damage to them.

skills.name: Immovable Aegis
skills.description: Raises a shield that grants crowd control immunity. Damage taken while the shield is up will be returned after a brief delay, dealing damage to enemies within range.

skillsZh.name: 真神覺醒
skillsZh.description: 雅典娜死亡後，可以真神形態移動，復活時飛向距離最近的友方防禦塔，對起飛範圍內敵人造成傷害和擊飛

skillsZh.name: 神聖進軍
skillsZh.description: 雅典娜舉盾突進對敵人造成擊退和傷害並獲得護盾，護盾期間免控

skillsZh.name: 貫穿之槍
skillsZh.description: 雅典娜向指定方向位移並強化下次普攻，向敵人衝鋒並造成傷害

skillsZh.name: 敬畏聖盾
skillsZh.description: 雅典娜舉盾獲得護盾，期間呈現霸體狀態。舉盾期間所受傷害會在短暫延遲後反擊，對範圍內敵人造成傷害。

guide.overview: Athena is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 54.4% win rate and 0.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Athena: Able to move in true form after dying.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Giant's Grip, Boots of Resistance, Blazing Cape, then complete Dragon's Rage, Blood Rage, Overlord's Platemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Athena's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Holy Advance → Unstoppable Spear → Immovable Aegis → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Immovable Aegis (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Unstoppable Spear provides mobility or stick—max first. Holy Advance second for damage. Immovable Aegis on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Holy Advance → Unstoppable Spear → Immovable Aegis → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Immovable Aegis after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Athena sits at Tier B globally (54.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Low pick rate 0.1% — niche in high rank; surprise value if you perfect the kit. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Athena vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Athena has +4.7% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Athena when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Athena vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Athena has +3.7% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Athena when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Athena excels into Dharma, Gao Changgong. Avoid blind picking into Sun Bin, Guan Yu without team peel.

name: Dun

skills.name: Unyielding Might
skills.description: Periodic Passive effect: When Health drops beyond a certain threshold, taking damage will enhance him. While enhanced, he recovers Health when hitting enemies with skills and Basic Attacks.

skills.name: Wind Slash
skills.description:
Slashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies within range and slowing them.
If the skill lands a hit, it can be used again before going into cooldown, dealing damage to enemies in range and launching them.

skills.name: Gale's Benediction
skills.description:
Deals damage to enemies in range and grants a shield.
Enhances the next 3 Basic Attacks to deal extra true damage.
Every enhanced Basic Attack hit reduces his Ultimate's cooldown.

skills.name: Unruly Blade
skills.description:
Throws his chain blade to the target location, stunning and dealing damage to enemies hit.
When max range is reached or an enemy is hit, the chain blade will pull him to its location, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

skillsZh.name: 噬目
skillsZh.description: 每隔一段時間獲得被動效果：當自身血量低於一定程度時，受到傷害後可強化自身。強化期間每次普攻和技能命中敵人回復自身生命值。

skillsZh.name: 豪氣斬
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向斬擊，對範圍內敵人造成傷害和減速效果。
若命中任一敵人，就可在技能冷卻前朝指定方向再次施放技能，對範圍內敵人造成傷害和擊飛效果。

skillsZh.name: 龍捲閃
skillsZh.description:
對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害，同時為自身增加護盾值。
強化下三次普攻，造成額外真實傷害。
每次強化普攻減少【不羈之刃】冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 不羈之刃
skillsZh.description:
向指定位置投擲鏈刃，對命中敵人造成傷害和暈眩效果。
達到最遠距離或命中敵人後，將自己拉至鏈刃位置，對附近敵人造成傷害。

build.name: Eye of the Phoenix
build.description:
MDEF +180, PDEF +90, HP +1,350
Boosts HP Regen

build.name: Frostscar's Embrace
build.description:
PATK +60, PDEF +300, CDR +10%
Enhanced BAs slow

tips: Build: Eye of the Phoenix, Frostscar's Embrace, Overlord's Platemail.
tipsZh: 夏侯惇（對抗路）：梯度 S，勝率 53.26%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：不死鳥之眼、冰痕之握、霸者重裝.

patchHistory.change: Adjusted the damage enhanced Basic Attacks deal to heroes and non-hero units

patchHistory.detail: As a versatile fighter, Dun has excellent survivability. We have adjusted his skill bonuses to make him perform more consistently when using different equipment.

patchHistory.change: We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
patchHistory.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整強化普攻對英雄和非英雄的傷害
平衡不同套裝的效果收益
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「身為一位全能的戰士，夏侯惇的生存能力有目共睹，本次我們調整了他的技能加成結構，希望他在不同出裝下都能夠有不錯的表現。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

faqs.question: Is Dun good in current season?
faqs.answer: Dun is Tier S Tank with 53.26% win rate, 1.73% pick rate, and 0.35% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Dun build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Eye of the Phoenix, Frostscar's Embrace, Overlord's Platemail, Dragon's Rage, Sage's Sanctuary, Longnight Guardian.

faqs.question: How to counter Dun?
faqs.answer: Pick Han Xin, Li Bai, Wukong. Strong into Diaochan, Fang, Erin.

faqsZh.question: 夏侯惇 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 夏侯惇 為 S 梯度，勝率 53.26%、選取 1.73%、禁用 0.35%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 夏侯惇 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：不死鳥之眼、冰痕之握、霸者重裝、怒龍劍盾、賢者的庇護、永夜守護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 夏侯惇？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Han Xin、Li Bai、Wukong。夏侯惇 克制 Diaochan、Fang、Erin。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Fang, Erin. Weak into: Han Xin, Li Bai, Wukong.

guide.overview: Dun is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 52.3% win rate and 1.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Dun: Periodic Passive Effect: When Health drops too low, taking damage will enhance Dun.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Frostscar's Embrace, Blazing Cape, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail, Blood Rage. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Dun's Tank kit. Take Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Wind Slash → Gale's Benediction → Unruly Blade → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Unruly Blade (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Wind Slash, and Unruly Blade on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Wind Slash → Gale's Benediction → Unruly Blade → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Dun is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.5% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Dun. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Dun vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Dun has +0.9% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Dun when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Dun vs Arthur (Tank, Tier S): Arthur is 1.5% pick / 50.5% WR. Dun has +1.7% WR vs Arthur in Camp data. Choose Dun when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Arthur for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Dun excels into Diaochan, Fang, Erin. Avoid blind picking into Han Xin, Li Bai, Wukong without team peel.

name: Sakeer

skills.name: Firefly Protection
skills.description: Basic Attacks and skills summon fireflies that deal extra damage to enemies and grant vision of them. Periodically heals teammates, or can charge up his Basic Attack to heal himself instead.

skills.name: Mulberry Power
skills.description: Launches and damages enemies in front while summoning fireflies to heal teammates or damage enemies.

skills.name: Ride the Wind
skills.description: Flies to a brush while summoning fireflies that heal teammates or damage enemies.

skills.name: Firefly Fields
skills.description: Summons a brush and can fly into it by using this skill again. The brush summons fireflies over time that heal teammates or damage enemies.

skillsZh.name: 螢火庇護
skillsZh.description: 桑啟普攻或施放技能時會召喚螢火蟲，對敵人造成額外傷害並獲得其視野。桑啟會定時治療友方英雄，蓄力可治療自身。

skillsZh.name: 桑木為引
skillsZh.description: 桑啟擊飛前方敵人並造成傷害，召喚螢火蟲治療友軍，並對敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 乘風啟程
skillsZh.description: 桑啟位移至草叢，同時召喚螢火蟲治療友軍，對敵人則造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 螢火微光
skillsZh.description: 桑啟召喚草叢，再次施放技能會飛至草叢，草叢會持續召喚螢火蟲治療友軍，並對敵人造成傷害。

guide.overview: Sakeer is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 53.3% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Sakeer: Basic Attacks and skills summon fireflies that deal extra damage to enemies and grant vision of them.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Overlord's Platemail, Breakthrough Robe, then complete Augur's Word, Frozen Breath. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Sakeer's Support kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Mulberry Power → Ride the Wind → Firefly Fields → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Firefly Fields (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Mulberry Power, and Firefly Fields on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Mulberry Power → Ride the Wind → Firefly Fields → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Sakeer sits at Tier B globally (53.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Sakeer vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Sakeer has +7.2% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Sakeer when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Sakeer vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Sakeer has +3.0% WR vs Cai Yan in Camp data. Choose Sakeer when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Sakeer excels into Ying, Luna. Avoid blind picking into Haya, Zilong, Butterfly without team peel.

name: Luban No.7

skills.name: Suppressive Fire
skills.description: After using 4 Basic Attacks or a skill, the next Basic Attack becomes a scattershot, dealing continuous piercing damage.

skills.name: Blowfish Grenade
skills.description: Throws a bomb at the target location, dealing area damage and slowing enemies.

skills.name: Shark Cannon
skills.description: Launches a rocket in the target direction, knocking back enemies directly in front of him and dealing area damage.

skills.name: Air Support
skills.description: Summons a blowfish airship to bombard the target location, dealing area damage and slowing enemies while gaining vision of the area.

skillsZh.name: 火力壓制
skillsZh.description: 每第5次普攻和每次技能之後的普攻都會變成掃射，造成連續穿透傷害。

skillsZh.name: 河豚手榴彈
skillsZh.description: 向指定區域投擲炸彈，對敵人造成範圍傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 無敵鯊嘴砲
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射爆炸火箭，對近距離敵人造成範圍傷害和擊退效果。

skillsZh.name: 空中支援
skillsZh.description: 召喚河豚飛艇轟炸指定區域，對敵人造成範圍傷害和減速，並獲得區域視野。

tips: Luban No.7 (Marksman): Tier S+ — 52.9% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Boots of Dexterity, Doomsday, Eternity Blade.
tipsZh: 魯班七號（發育路）：梯度 S+，勝率 52.9%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：急速戰靴、末世、無盡戰刃.

patchHistory.detail: Luban No.7 has been outperforming other marksmen for a long time, so it's time to tone him down a bit.

patchHistory.change: Adjusted Passive effect's damage against different targets.
patchHistory.detail: Luban's Passive works the same regardless of the target's Health, so heroes cannot guard against it by increasing their Health. As such, we've reduced his effectiveness against high-Health targets. As compensation, we've increased his ability to threaten the enemy carry

patchHistory.change: Reduced the base damage of Luban No.7's passive skill, and increased the base cooldown of his Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail:
Reduced the base damage of Luban No.7's passive skill, and increased the base cooldown of his Ultimate.
With his unique damage capabilities, Luban No.7 has become a common choice for marksman players. He is easy to play and can rapidly tear through various types of enemy with ease. We have nerfed Luban No.7 in order to give rivals a fairer chance of getting close to him.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「魯班七號的強度已經領先其他射手很久了，該是緩和這股氣焰的時候了。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整被動對不同目標的傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「被動對不同生命值的目標一視同仁，提高生命值在面對魯班七號時無法提高生存能力，因此我們適當削弱他對高生命值目標的傷害能力。作為補償，我們提升了他對全輸出C位目標的威脅。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低魯班七號被動技能基礎傷害，提高大招基礎冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail:
降低魯班七號被動技能基礎傷害，提高大招基礎冷卻時間。
魯班七號在目前版本中，憑著獨一無二的傷害製造能力，成為許多射手玩家的常備選項。他往往只需要簡單的操作，就可以在短時間內輕鬆撕碎面前所有類型的敵人。我們希望能適當削弱魯班七號，來讓魯班七號的對手有更多機會來接近他。

faqs.question: Is Luban No.7 good in current season?
faqs.answer: Luban No.7 is Tier S+ Marksman with 52.9% win rate, 2.22% pick rate, and 0.21% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Luban No.7 build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Dexterity, Doomsday, Eternity Blade, Succubus Cloak, Daybreaker's Virtue, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Luban No.7?
faqs.answer: Pick Lian Po. Strong into Ying, Ukyo Tachibana, Lam.

faqsZh.question: 魯班七號 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 魯班七號 為 S+ 梯度，勝率 52.9%、選取 2.22%、禁用 0.21%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 魯班七號 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：急速戰靴、末世、無盡戰刃、魔女斗篷、仁者破曉、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 魯班七號？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Lian Po。魯班七號 克制 Ying、Ukyo Tachibana、Lam。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Ying, Ukyo Tachibana, Lam. Weak into: Lian Po.
metaAnalysisZh: 魯班七號 勝率 52.9%（Camp HOK，2026-07-19）

guide.overview: Luban No.7 is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 52.0% win rate and 1.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Luban No.7: Every 5 Basic Attacks or the first Basic Attack after using a skill gains a piercing effect and deals continuous damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, then complete Daybreaker's Virtue, Doomsday, Sage's Sanctuary. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Tier for stats that match Luban No.7's Marksman kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Blowfish Grenade → Shark Cannon → Air Support → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Air Support (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Blowfish Grenade is your lane trade tool. Shark Cannon second. Air Support whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Blowfish Grenade → Shark Cannon → Air Support → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Luban No.7 is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Luban No.7. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Luban No.7 vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Luban No.7 has +2.7% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Luban No.7 when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Luban No.7 vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Luban No.7 has +1.9% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Luban No.7 when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Luban No.7 excels into Ying, Ukyo Tachibana, Lam. Avoid blind picking into Lian Po, Kaizer, Dun without team peel.

name: Luara

skills.name: Serpent's Envoy
skills.description: Basic Attacks unleash serpent blades to deal damage, reducing Skill 1's cooldown for every enemy hit.

skills.name: Deadly Fang
skills.description: Activates a serpent blade and gains Movement Speed. She can quickly scale walls should she run into them during this period.

skills.name: Furtive Attack
skills.description: Summons the Fire Serpent at the target location, which then moves toward her, damaging and slowing enemies in its path. If serpent blades are active, it deals additional damage to enemies. If not, the cooldown is reduced.

skills.name: Blazing Glare
skills.description: Releases the Fire Serpent in the target direction, dealing damage and blinding enemies in its path, and gains a serpent blade. During this time, both attacking and being attacked will accumulate Fury. At full Fury, deals area damage and launches enemies.

skillsZh.name: 蛇焰使者
skillsZh.description: 盧雅那的普通攻擊會施放環刃切割敵人並造成傷害，每次切割命中敵人可減少1技能冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 致命獠牙
skillsZh.description: 觸發一把環刃並獲得加速，期間遇到牆壁可以快速翻越1次。

skillsZh.name: 蛇吻突襲
skillsZh.description: 在指定位置召喚火蛇，之後火蛇會向自己移動，對沿路敵人造成傷害和減速。有環刃時，額外對敵人造成傷害。若無環刃則縮減冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 焚火灼目
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向施放火蛇，對沿路敵人造成傷害和目盲，並獲得一枚環刃。期間，攻擊和受到攻擊均會累積能量，能量滿後會造成範圍傷害和擊飛。

tips: Build: Doomsday, Shadow Ripper, Master Sword.
tipsZh: 盧雅那（發育路）：梯度 S，勝率 52.88%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：末世、影刃、宗師之力.

patchHistory.change: Reduced Mana consumption and adjusted skill damage.

patchHistory.detail: Luara's passive made her overly reliant on Critical Rate equipment. We wanted to give her a playstyle that utilizes attack effects, so we adjusted the Critical Rate and attack effect aspects of her skillset. Also, since Luara gained serpent blades whenever she performs kills or assists, her performance was very dependent on the match situation. We hope that these changes will give her more consistency. Finally, we have also improved her playability and the display of some mechanics.

patchHistoryZh.change: 減少法力消耗，調整技能傷害

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「盧雅那的被動機制使她對暴擊裝備過度依賴，我們希望未來她可以擁有一套攻擊特效流的玩法，因此調整了暴擊率和攻擊特效衰減比例。此外，盧雅那參與擊殺和助攻可以獲得環刃，這讓盧雅那在不同局勢的戰鬥中表現落差較大，我們希望她可以更加穩定。最後，本次升級還改善了她的機制顯示和操作手感。」

faqs.question: Is Luara good in current season?
faqs.answer: Luara is Tier S Marksman with 52.88% win rate, 1.36% pick rate, and 0.12% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Luara build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Doomsday, Shadow Ripper, Master Sword, Eternity Blade, Daybreaker's Virtue, Overlord's Might.

faqs.question: How to counter Luara?
faqs.answer: Pick Lapulapu, Ata. Strong into Diaochan, Mulan, Lam.

faqsZh.question: 盧雅那 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 盧雅那 為 S 梯度，勝率 52.88%、選取 1.36%、禁用 0.12%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 盧雅那 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：末世、影刃、宗師之力、無盡戰刃、仁者破曉、強者破軍.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 盧雅那？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Lapulapu、Ata。盧雅那 克制 Diaochan、Mulan、Lam。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Mulan, Lam. Weak into: Lapulapu, Ata.

guide.overview: Luara is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 53.0% win rate and 1.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Luara: Basic Attacks unleash serpent blades to deal damage, reducing Skill 1's cooldown for every enemy hit.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Shadow Ripper, Boots of Fortitude, Eternity Blade, then complete Bloodweeper, Daybreaker's Virtue, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Luara's Marksman kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Deadly Fang → Furtive Attack → Blazing Glare → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Blazing Glare (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Deadly Fang is your lane trade tool. Furtive Attack second. Blazing Glare whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Deadly Fang → Furtive Attack → Blazing Glare → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Luara is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.6% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Luara. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Luara vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Luara has +3.7% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Luara when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Luara vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Luara has +2.9% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Luara when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Luara excels into Diaochan, Mulan, Lam. Avoid blind picking into Lapulapu, Ata without team peel.

guide.overview: Sima Yi is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 46.2% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Sima Yi: Gains vision of casters within a range of 2000.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Runeblade, Boots of Tranquility, Insatiable Tome, then complete Staves of Sorcery, Savant's Wrath, Breakthrough Robe. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Sima Yi's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Shadow Stings → Barren Lands → Death Descends → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Death Descends (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Barren Lands provides mobility or stick—max first. Shadow Stings second for damage. Death Descends on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Shadow Stings → Barren Lands → Death Descends → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Death Descends after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Sima Yi sits at Tier B globally (46.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Sima Yi vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Wukong wins 3.5% more often globally. Choose Sima Yi when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Sima Yi vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Musashi wins 4.5% more often globally. Choose Sima Yi when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Sima Yi excels into Lu Bu, Wuyan, Menki. Avoid blind picking into Alessio, Arli, Lady Zhen without team peel.

name: Lian Po

skills.name: Warrior's Soul
skills.description:
Gains crowd control immunity when using skills.
During combat, generates Battle Spirit, which increases damage reduction and Attack Speed. When out of combat, Battle Spirit is consumed to recover health.

skills.name: Burst Ram
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage and launching enemies in his path. When upgraded, gains a passive effect that enhances every 3rd Basic Attack.

skills.name: Magma Slam
skills.description: Charges up at the original location, gaining a shield and slowing nearby enemies while pulling non-hero enemy units toward the center. After a brief delay, deals area damage. If there are enemy units within range, Skill 1's cooldown is reset.

skills.name: Tremor Smash
skills.description: Leaps to the target location and hammers the ground 3 times. The first 2 strikes deal damage and slow enemies, while the 3rd strike deals damage and launches them.

skillsZh.name: 勇士之魂
skillsZh.description:
使用技能時會獲得霸體。
戰鬥時獲得戰意，戰意可以提升減傷和攻擊速度，脫戰後會消耗戰意回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 爆裂衝撞
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向衝鋒，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害與擊飛。升級後，獲得每兩次普攻可強化下一次普攻的被動效果。

skillsZh.name: 熔岩重擊
skillsZh.description:
原地蓄力，獲得護盾的同時對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成減速效果，並將非英雄敵方單位拉向中心。
短暫延遲後，造成範圍傷害，若範圍內存在敵方單位，則重置1技能冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 天崩地裂
skillsZh.description: 向指定位置跳躍並搥擊地面三次，前兩次搥擊造成傷害和減速，第三次搥擊造成傷害和擊飛。

tips: Lian Po (Tank): Tier A — 52.43% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Boots of Resistance, Blazing Cape, Dragon's Rage.
tipsZh: 廉頗（對抗路）：梯度 A，勝率 52.43%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：抵抗之靴、紅蓮斗篷、怒龍劍盾.

patchHistory.change: Increased damage output of enhanced Basic Attack and Ultimate
patchHistory.detail: "While Lian Po already provides great crowd control, we also want him to pose a greater threat damage wise."

patchHistory.change: New Health recovery mechanic; skill stat values and bonus multipliers have also been adjusted to make Lian Po more suitable for his role as a frontline hero
patchHistory.detail:
New Health recovery mechanic; skill stat values and bonus multipliers have also been adjusted to make Lian Po more suitable for his role as a frontline hero.
As one of the heroes available to new players, Lian Po has been with our players through thick and thin over many versions.He shines in games where he has farmed adequately. However, in certain uphill scenarios, there can be precious little room for Lian Po to perform to his full potential.With these changes, we expect that users who use Lian Po will now have more equipment to choose from, as well as a better game experience in the new version.

patchHistory.change: We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
patchHistory.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升強化普攻與大招的輸出
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「廉頗在提供控制的同時造成更多的傷害威脅。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 新增生命恢復機制，調整技能數值和加成係數，使廉頗更符合其作為前排英雄的定位
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「廉頗作為新手英雄之一，伴隨著眾多玩家走過了很多個版本。在發育良好的對戰中，廉頗的表現不錯，而在某些逆風的局勢下，廉頗很難有發揮的空間。我們希望廉頗的玩家能在這次調整後，在新版本中擁有更加多樣的裝備選擇和更加良好的對戰體驗。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

faqs.question: Is Lian Po good in current season?
faqs.answer: Lian Po is Tier A Tank with 52.43% win rate, 1.12% pick rate, and 0.13% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Lian Po build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Resistance, Blazing Cape, Dragon's Rage, Succubus Cloak, Longnight Guardian, Ominous Premonition.

faqs.question: How to counter Lian Po?
faqs.answer: Pick Jing, Li Bai, Ukyo Tachibana. Strong into Marco Polo.

faqsZh.question: 廉頗 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 廉頗 為 A 梯度，勝率 52.43%、選取 1.12%、禁用 0.13%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 廉頗 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：抵抗之靴、紅蓮斗篷、怒龍劍盾、魔女斗篷、永夜守護、不祥徵兆.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 廉頗？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Jing、Li Bai、Ukyo Tachibana。廉頗 克制 Marco Polo。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Marco Polo. Weak into: Jing, Li Bai, Ukyo Tachibana.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Marco Polo；被克制：Jing、Li Bai、Ukyo Tachibana

guide.overview: Lian Po is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.1% win rate and 0.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Lian Po: Gains immunity while using skills.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Frigid Charge, then complete Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak, Overlord's Platemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Lian Po's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Burst Ram → Magma Slam → Tremor Smash → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Tremor Smash (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Burst Ram, and Tremor Smash on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Burst Ram → Magma Slam → Tremor Smash → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Lian Po is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.1% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Lian Po.
comparisons: Lian Po vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 0.2% more often globally. Choose Lian Po when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Lian Po vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 1.1% more often globally. Choose Lian Po when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Lian Po excels into Marco Polo. Avoid blind picking into Jing, Li Bai, Ukyo Tachibana without team peel.

name: Ata

skills.name: Child of the Sea
skills.description:
His lost Health is preserved in a temporary Health buffer. Dealing damage converts buffered Health into actual Health.
After a while, the buffered Health will begin to gradually diminish.
His Basic Attacks deal extra damage.

skills.name: Wavewalking
skills.description:
Leaps into the air and slams down twice, dealing damage with each slam.
The second slam launches enemies.
Gains crowd control immunity while using the skill.

skills.name: Sea Anchor
skills.description:
Hurls an anchor in the target direction, dealing damage and slowing enemies.
If the anchor hits terrain, he will be dragged to the contact point, dealing damage and knocking back enemies.
His next Basic Attack will be enhanced with a pulling effect.

skills.name: Ghost Ship
skills.description:
Builds temporary terrain along the outer edge of a cone-shaped area, dealing damage to enemies within it.
Gains crowd control immunity while using the skill.
He can use the skill again to make the temporary terrain disappear early.

skillsZh.name: 海之子
skillsZh.description:
阿塔損失的生命會以殘存血量保留一段時間，期間阿塔造成的所有傷害都會轉化殘存血量為自身生命值。
一段時間後，殘存血量會逐漸扣除。
阿塔普攻造成額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 踏浪行
skillsZh.description:
跳起後砸向地面兩次，每次都會對敵人造成傷害。
第二次額外造成擊飛效果。
技能施放期間霸體。

skillsZh.name: 定海錨
skillsZh.description:
甩出船錨，對敵人造成傷害和減速效果。
若是船錨接觸到地形，阿塔會移動至接觸位置，對敵人造成傷害和擊退效果。
下次普攻強化，具有拉扯效果。

skillsZh.name: 海靈船
skillsZh.description:
阿塔沿指定扇形區域邊緣建造臨時地形一段時間，對區域內敵人造成傷害。
施放技能過程中免疫控制效果。
再次施放技能可提前讓臨時地形消失。

patchHistory.change: We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
patchHistory.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.

patchHistory.change: Increased recovery from his passive when dealing damage to heroes.
patchHistory.detail: Although we nerfed the imperil equipment passive in the last season, equipment with that effect has also become suitable for more heroes. By moderately increasing Ata's recovery, we hope to offset the impact of more heroes using this equipment.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

patchHistoryZh.change: Increased recovery from his passive when dealing damage to heroes.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Although we nerfed the imperil equipment passive in the last season, equipment with that effect has also become suitable for more heroes. By moderately increasing Ata's recovery, we hope to offset the impact of more heroes using this equipment.

faqs.question: Is Ata good in current season?
faqs.answer: Ata is Tier B Tank with 52.23% win rate, 0.54% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Ata build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Blazing Cape, Eye of the Phoenix, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak, Dawnlight, Spikemail.

faqs.question: How to counter Ata?
faqs.answer: Pick Jing, Wukong, Musashi. Strong into Agudo, Meng Ya, Luara.

faqsZh.question: 阿塔 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 阿塔 為 B 梯度，勝率 52.23%、選取 0.54%、禁用 0.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 阿塔 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：紅蓮斗篷、不死鳥之眼、不祥徵兆、魔女斗篷、旭日初光、反傷刺甲.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 阿塔？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Jing、Wukong、Musashi。阿塔 克制 Agudo、Meng Ya、Luara。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Agudo, Meng Ya, Luara. Weak into: Jing, Wukong, Musashi.

guide.overview: Ata is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 54.1% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Ata — built around Child of the Sea (Tank).
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Dragon's Rage, Blazing Cape, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail, Ominous Premonition. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Ata's Tank kit. Take Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Wavewalking → Sea Anchor → Ghost Ship → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Ghost Ship (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Wavewalking, and Ghost Ship on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Wavewalking → Sea Anchor → Ghost Ship → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Ata sits at Tier B globally (54.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Ata vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Ata has +2.7% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Ata when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Ata vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Ata has +1.8% WR vs Dun in Camp data. Choose Ata when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Ata excels into Agudo, Meng Ya, Luara. Avoid blind picking into Jing, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.

guide.overview: Nuwa is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.5% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Nuwa: Gains enhanced vision and range when leveling up.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, then complete Insatiable Tome, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Nuwa's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Divine Glow - Creation → Divine Glow - Coalescence → Divine Glow - Emergence → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Divine Glow - Emergence (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Divine Glow - Creation, and Divine Glow - Emergence on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Divine Glow - Creation → Divine Glow - Coalescence → Divine Glow - Emergence → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Nuwa is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Nuwa.
comparisons: Nuwa vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Nuwa has +0.5% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Nuwa when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Nuwa vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.3% more often globally. Choose Nuwa when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Nuwa excels into Mulan, Nakoruru, Pei. Avoid blind picking into Liu Bei, Mayene, Mulan without team peel.

skills.description: Agudo grants Movement Speed and Health recovery to herself and summons in the target area, and summons multiple monsters at the center.

skillsZh.description: 阿古朵召喚球球衝鋒到指定地點，造成傷害和控制，並在之後獨自作戰。

tipsZh: 阿古朵（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 52.16%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：抵抗之靴、末世、魔女斗篷.

patchHistory.change: We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
patchHistory.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.

patchHistory.change: We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail:
We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
When Agudo uses her Ultimate and releases Furball to attack enemies, her squishy body becomes her weakness.Risks should always be accompanied by rewards, so we have appropriately increased the damage Agudo can deal after releasing Furball.

patchHistory.change: Increased physical damage when using Skill 2. Increased physical damage when using the Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: As a jungler with a rather unique design, Agudo and her partner Furball perform well when supporting other heroes and tanking damage. But we realized that Furball's damage is lacking. Since Furball has to fight and carry Agudo around the map, we've fed it some extra snacks to bulk up and improve the duo's strength.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

patchHistoryZh.change: We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
patchHistoryZh.detail:
We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
When Agudo uses her Ultimate and releases Furball to attack enemies, her squishy body becomes her weakness.Risks should always be accompanied by rewards, so we have appropriately increased the damage Agudo can deal after releasing Furball.

patchHistoryZh.change: Increased physical damage when using Skill 2. Increased physical damage when using the Ultimate.
patchHistoryZh.detail: As a jungler with a rather unique design, Agudo and her partner Furball perform well when supporting other heroes and tanking damage. But we realized that Furball's damage is lacking. Since Furball has to fight and carry Agudo around the map, we've fed it some extra snacks to bulk up and improve the duo's strength.

faqs.question: Is Agudo good in current season?
faqs.answer: Agudo is Tier B Marksman with 52.16% win rate, 0.42% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Agudo build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Resistance, Doomsday, Succubus Cloak, Rapacious Bite, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Agudo?
faqs.answer: Pick Ata, Han Xin. Strong into Kongming, Daji.

faqsZh.question: 阿古朵 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 阿古朵 為 B 梯度，勝率 52.16%、選取 0.42%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 阿古朵 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：抵抗之靴、末世、魔女斗篷、貪婪之噬、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 阿古朵？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Ata、Han Xin。阿古朵 克制 Kongming、Daji。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Kongming, Daji. Weak into: Ata, Han Xin.

guide.overview: Agudo is a Medium Marksman (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.9% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Agudo: Replaces Recovery with Release.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Eternity Blade, Boots of Resistance, Shadow Ripper, then complete Daybreaker's Virtue, Doomsday, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Agudo's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Wild Growth → Tumble, Furball! → Seed Mines → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Seed Mines (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Tumble, Furball! provides mobility or stick—max first. Wild Growth second for damage. Seed Mines on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Wild Growth → Tumble, Furball! → Seed Mines → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Seed Mines after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Agudo sits at Tier B globally (51.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Agudo vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Agudo has +2.6% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Agudo when you need Jungling identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Agudo vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Agudo has +1.8% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Agudo when you need Jungling identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Agudo excels into Kongming, Daji. Avoid blind picking into Ata, Han Xin without team peel.

skills.name: The Laws of Nature
skills.description: After leaving the enemy's vision, the next Basic Attack deals extra damage and slows the enemy.

skills.name: Prophecy - Hidden Hand
skills.description: Gains a Movement Speed boost and camouflages himself, reducing the Physical and Magical Defense of enemies touched while dealing damage to them.

skills.name: The Animist
skills.description: Summons spriteflies, and after a brief delay, pulls in nearby enemies, dealing damage and stunning them. If he hits an enemy hero, he and nearby teammates gain a shield.

skills.name: Prophecy - Out of Sight
skills.description:
After 1s, camouflages and grants Movement Speed to himself and nearby teammates.
Gains vision of the nearest enemy hero.
The disguise breaks upon using Basic Attacks, skills, or actions that affect enemies.

skillsZh.name: 縱橫兵法
skillsZh.description: 脫離視野後強化下次普攻，造成額外傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 先知・神隱
skillsZh.description: 進入偽裝狀態並加速，減少被觸碰的敵人雙抗並造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 萬物有靈
skillsZh.description: 召喚玄微子，短暫延遲後拉扯周圍敵人對其造成傷害和暈眩，命中英雄時自身與周圍友軍獲得護盾。

skillsZh.name: 先知・霧隱
skillsZh.description:
1秒後，自身和附近友方英雄進入偽裝狀態，增加移動速度。
獲得最近敵方英雄視野。
使用普攻，技能或對敵方造成影響時解除偽裝狀態。

patchHistory.change: Reduced cooldown and increased damage from his Passive.
patchHistory.detail: There were many calls to buff Guiguzi during the 'I'm a designer at HoK!' event in HoK Camp. Guiguzi players want to show off how good he can be, but don't always succeed. Hence, we have reduced some of his skill cooldowns to give them more opportunities to try.

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低冷卻時間，增加被動傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「在HOK CAMP的活動『我在HOK當企劃活動中』有很多加強鬼谷子的聲音。每位使用鬼谷子的召喚師都期待他能大放異彩，但並不是每一次嘗試都能夠成功，因此我們降低了他的技能冷卻時間，讓他有更多的嘗試的機會。」

faqs.question: Is Guiguzi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Guiguzi is Tier B Support with 51.94% win rate, 0.23% pick rate, and 0.25% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Guiguzi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Crimson Shadow - Radiance, Frigid Charge, Glacial Buckler, Longnight Guardian, Sage's Sanctuary, Ardent Dominion.

faqs.question: How to counter Guiguzi?
faqs.answer: Pick Fatih, Wukong, Musashi. Strong into Li Xin, Mozi, Zilong.

faqsZh.question: 鬼谷子 這版本適合上分嗎？

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 鬼谷子？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Fatih、Wukong、Musashi。鬼谷子 克制 Li Xin、Mozi、Zilong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Li Xin, Mozi, Zilong. Weak into: Fatih, Wukong, Musashi.

guide.overview: Guiguzi is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.8% win rate and 0.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Guiguzi: Slips out of vision and enhances the next Basic Attack to inflict extra damage and slow.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Glacial Buckler, Longnight Guardian, then complete Ominous Premonition, Frigid Charge. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Guiguzi's Support kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Prophecy - Hidden Hand → The Animist → Prophecy - Out of Sight → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Prophecy - Out of Sight (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Prophecy - Hidden Hand, and Prophecy - Out of Sight on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Prophecy - Hidden Hand → The Animist → Prophecy - Out of Sight → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Guiguzi sits at Tier B globally (51.8% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Guiguzi vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Guiguzi has +5.7% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Guiguzi when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Guiguzi vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Guiguzi has +1.5% WR vs Cai Yan in Camp data. Choose Guiguzi when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Guiguzi excels into Li Xin, Mozi, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Fatih, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.
