tips: Build: Master Sword, Frostscar's Embrace, Blood Rage.
tipsZh: 趙雲（打野）：梯度 A，勝率 51.9%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：宗師之力、冰痕之握、血魔之怒.

patchHistory.detail: Skill 2 is Zilong's main damage skill, but its damage output is somewhat lacking if it doesn't trigger his passive. Hence, we've slightly increased Skill 2's damage.

patchHistory.change: The cooldown is returned if no heroes are hit by his Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: When Zilong's Ultimate fails to hit the enemy, he struggles to put pressure on them, so we want to improve his cooldown mechanics to give him more opportunities to engage in team fights. We also improved his late-game cooldowns, giving the opponent time to counterattack after being hit by an Ultimate.

patchHistory.change: Increased Skill 2's recovery, and reduced its damage accordingly.
patchHistory.detail: Zilong is a very good all-rounder. Players can use different equipment based on different situations and lineups to give their Zilong various strengths. We adjusted his Skill 2 somewhat to increase his recovery and reduce his ability to deal sustained damage.

patchHistory.change: We've retained Zilong's original design and gameplay while upgrading his passive and active skill mechanics. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
patchHistory.detail:
We've retained Zilong's original design and gameplay while upgrading his passive and active skill mechanics. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
Zilong is a characteristic versatile hero, with dash skills, damage reduction, and recovery capabilities. He can deal both burst damage and damage over time. However, as the game environment evolves and players improve, his easy-to-use skill mechanics are ceasing to be an advantage. We have thus added new mechanics to his skill set, while retaining his core gameplay. It is our hope that this will make Zilong a trusted choice for players in higher-level matches.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「2技能作為趙雲的主要輸出技能，在沒有觸發被動的額外效果時傷害略顯不足，因此我們適當提高了2技能的傷害。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 大招未命中英雄時歸還冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 趙雲的大招若未命中敵人時，他對敵人的威脅性就會降低很多，因此我們希望最佳化大招的冷卻機制，讓趙雲能夠有更多嘗試開戰的機會；與此同時提升了後期的冷卻，在大招命中後，能留給對手一定的反制空間。

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升趙雲2技能的恢復效果，並適度降低2技能造成的傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 趙雲是一名非常全面的英雄。玩家可以根據局勢，陣容搭配不同的裝備，來使得自己操控的趙雲獲得各式各樣的能力。我們適度調整了趙雲的2技能，使得他在獲得更強恢復能力的同時，適度降低其製造持續傷害的能力。

patchHistoryZh.change: We've retained Zilong's original design and gameplay while upgrading his passive and active skill mechanics. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
patchHistoryZh.detail:
We've retained Zilong's original design and gameplay while upgrading his passive and active skill mechanics. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
Zilong is a characteristic versatile hero, with dash skills, damage reduction, and recovery capabilities. He can deal both burst damage and damage over time. However, as the game environment evolves and players improve, his easy-to-use skill mechanics are ceasing to be an advantage. We have thus added new mechanics to his skill set, while retaining his core gameplay. It is our hope that this will make Zilong a trusted choice for players in higher-level matches.

faqs.question: Is Zilong good in current season?
faqs.answer: Zilong is Tier A Assassin with 51.9% win rate, 0.8% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Zilong build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Master Sword, Frostscar's Embrace, Blood Rage, Sage's Sanctuary, Immovable - Sky Dome, Ravage - Phantom.

faqs.question: How to counter Zilong?
faqs.answer: Pick Guiguzi, Ziya, Fang. Strong into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer.

faqsZh.question: 趙雲 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 趙雲 為 A 梯度，勝率 51.9%、選取 0.8%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 趙雲 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：宗師之力、冰痕之握、血魔之怒、賢者的庇護、不動・天穹、侵略・怒魂.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 趙雲？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Guiguzi、Ziya、Fang。趙雲 克制 Lapulapu、Ata、Sakeer。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer. Weak into: Guiguzi, Ziya, Fang.

guide.overview: Zilong is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.7% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Zilong: The lower his Health, the greater his damage reduction and skills.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Master Sword, Pure Sky, Eternity Blade. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Zilong's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Thunderbreaker → Stormpiercer → Skysplitter → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Skysplitter (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Stormpiercer provides mobility or stick—max first. Thunderbreaker second for damage. Skysplitter on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Thunderbreaker → Stormpiercer → Skysplitter → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Skysplitter after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Zilong sits at Tier B globally (52.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Zilong vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Zilong has +2.9% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Zilong when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Zilong vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Zilong has +2.0% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Zilong when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Zilong excels into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer. Avoid blind picking into Guiguzi, Ziya, Fang without team peel.

tipsZh: 安琪拉（中路）：梯度 S+，勝率 51.89%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：虛無法杖、賢者天書、賢者的庇護.

patchHistory.detail: Skill 1: Scorching Barrage

patchHistory.change: Increased Ultimate's cooldown in the early and mid game.
patchHistory.detail: "Angela has powerful burst damage, and her skill cooldowns are relatively short, allowing her to use skill combos to frequently obliterate opponents. We've increased the cooldown time of her Ultimate in the early and mid game to slightly slow down her pace during these stages."

patchHistory.change: Increased the skill damage bonus multiplier from her Passive
patchHistory.detail:
Increased the skill damage bonus multiplier from her Passive
Angela is a hero capable of dealing high burst damage. However, her strength in early and late game is currently somewhat unbalanced.We have thus made some changes to the base stats and bonus multiplier of her Passive.This ensures that while she won't be too powerful in early game, she can still deal more damage in late game.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 最佳化1技能指示器

patchHistoryZh.change: 增加大招前中期的冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 安琪拉具備強力爆發傷害，且技能冷卻時間也相對較短，這讓她可以頻繁的嘗試連招秒人，我們增加其前中期大招的冷卻時間，適度放緩她在前中期的節奏。

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整被動技能中，對技能傷害提升的加成係數
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「安琪拉是一名爆發傷害很高的英雄，但是目前她在前期和後期的強度有些不夠均衡。因此我們調整她被動技能中的基礎數值和加成係數。確保她前期不會過於強大，同時提升她在後期戰鬥中的傷害。」

metaAnalysis: Counters: Jing, Athena, Zilong. Weak into: Han Xin, Gao Changgong.

guide.overview: Angela is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 51.8% win rate and 2.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Angela: Every time she damages an enemy with a skill, she increases her Movement Speed, and the enemy will take more damage from her subsequent skills.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Stone of Sorcery, Scepter of Reverberation, then complete Blood Clan's Grimoire, Insatiable Tome, Savant's Wrath. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Angela's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Scorching Barrage → Chaos Cinder → Blazing Brilliance → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Blazing Brilliance (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Scorching Barrage, and Blazing Brilliance on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Scorching Barrage → Chaos Cinder → Blazing Brilliance → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Angela is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 3.0% — expect Angela to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Angela vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Angela has +0.8% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Angela when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

Angela vs Wang Zhaojun (Mage, Tier S): Wang Zhaojun is 1.9% pick / 51.2% WR. Angela has +0.6% WR vs Wang Zhaojun in Camp data. Choose Angela when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Wang Zhaojun for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Angela excels into Jing, Athena, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Han Xin, Gao Changgong without team peel.

tips: Dian Wei (Warrior): Tier A — 51.82% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Boots of Fortitude, Spikemail, Master Sword.
tipsZh: 典韋（打野）：梯度 A，勝率 51.82%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：影忍之足、反傷刺甲、宗師之力.

patchHistory.change: Adjusted the early and late-game damage of enhanced Basic Attacks

patchHistory.detail: "Dian Wei's skills allow him to clear enemy crowd control effects. We've reduced his own crowd control effects to give the enemy a chance to escape from his attack range."

The enhanced Basic Attack's dash prevented Dian Wei from fully utilizing his Attack Range advantage and would even put him in danger in some situations. Hence, we have improved this mechanic so the dash effect remains the same without a target.

patchHistory.change: Added a dash to his Skill 1 and reduced the extra true damage from his Ultimate
patchHistory.detail: Dian Wei's high Attack Speed and recovery allow him to fight for sustained periods of time. However, without a dash, it's difficult for him to chase and approach enemies who have movement skills. That's why we decided to add a dash to his enhanced Basic Attack while making a minor adjustment to the extra true damage dealt by his Ultimate.

patchHistory.change: Increased Dian Wei's Skill 1 damage gain for each skill level.
patchHistory.detail:
Increased Dian Wei's Skill 1 damage gain for each skill level.
Dian Wei's current skill specialty grants him awesome sustained combat ability. In scenarios that require burst damage output, Dian Wei is reliant on multiple pieces of attack equipment to enhance his burst ability. This forces him to sacrifice investing in survivability gear. We've increased the damage of Dian Wei's Skill 1to improve his performance in melee.

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整強化普攻的前後期傷害

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「典韋的技能可以解除敵方的控制效果，本次我們降低了他的控制效果，讓敵方有機會離開他的攻擊範圍。」
「強化普攻的突進會讓典韋無法充分利用攻擊距離的優勢，甚至在某些場景下會讓典韋意外衝入人群，我們改善了這一機制，同時讓突進效果在沒有目標時也能夠統一。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 一技能增加突進效果，下調大招附加的真實傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 典韋可以透過高攻速和高回血持續戰鬥，缺少位移手段讓他很難接近和追擊有位移的對手，因此我們為他的強化普攻增加了突進效果，同時我們略微下調大招開啟後附加的真實傷害比例。

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高典韋1技能隨技能等級增長所帶來的傷害提升
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提高典韋1技能隨技能等級增長所帶來的傷害提升。
典韋現在的技能特性使他擁有很強的持續作戰能力。在某些需要爆發輸出的場景中，典韋依賴多件攻擊型裝備來強化爆發能力，這使得他承受傷害的能力有限。我們希望適度強化典韋1技能的傷害，藉此提升典韋這位近戰英雄的遊戲體驗感。

guide.overview: Dian Wei is a Medium Warrior (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 51.8% win rate and 1.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Dian Wei: Gains stacks upon getting defeats and assits,for up to 20 stacks.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Spikemail, Blazing Cape, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Dian Wei's Warrior kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Holding on to Sanity → Outburst → Leap of Fury → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Leap of Fury (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Outburst provides mobility or stick—max first. Holding on to Sanity second for damage. Leap of Fury on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Holding on to Sanity → Outburst → Leap of Fury → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Leap of Fury after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Dian Wei is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.1% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Dian Wei.
comparisons: Dian Wei vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 0.8% more often globally. Choose Dian Wei when you need Jungling identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

Dian Wei vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Dian Wei has +1.6% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Dian Wei when you need Jungling identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Dian Wei excels into Marco Polo, Musashi. Avoid blind picking into Sun Bin, Diaochan without team peel.

patchHistory.change: Increased the Ultimate's base cooldown, but kept its cooldown the same as before at max level.
patchHistory.detail: Alessio's mechanics made him one of the most powerful marksmen in the late-game. However, he's currently also able to use his ult to frequently deal burst damage and even achieve the Extreme Escape feat in the early game. We hope these light adjustments will make players use a wider variety of skills to gain an early-game advantage, while at the same time not affecting Alessio's late-game prowess.

patchHistoryZh.change: Increased the Ultimate's base cooldown, but kept its cooldown the same as before at max level.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Alessio's mechanics made him one of the most powerful marksmen in the late-game. However, he's currently also able to use his ult to frequently deal burst damage and even achieve the Extreme Escape feat in the early game. We hope these light adjustments will make players use a wider variety of skills to gain an early-game advantage, while at the same time not affecting Alessio's late-game prowess.

faqs.question: Is Alessio good in current season?
faqs.answer: Alessio is Tier A Marksman with 51.78% win rate, 1.2% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Alessio build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Dexterity, Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade, Bloodweeper, Daybreaker's Virtue, Overlord's Might.

faqs.question: How to counter Alessio?
faqs.answer: Pick Arke, Lady Sun. Strong into Mai Shiranui, Lian Po.

faqsZh.question: 萊西奧 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 萊西奧 為 A 梯度，勝率 51.78%、選取 1.2%、禁用 0.03%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 萊西奧 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：急速戰靴、影刃、無盡戰刃、泣血之刃、仁者破曉、強者破軍.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 萊西奧？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Arke、Lady Sun。萊西奧 克制 Mai Shiranui、Lian Po。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Lian Po. Weak into: Arke, Lady Sun.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Mai Shiranui、Lian Po；被克制：Arke、Lady Sun

guide.overview: Alessio is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.5% win rate and 0.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Alessio: Alessio's Basic Attacks deal area damage, plus extra physical damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, then complete Bloodweeper, Shadow Ripper, Daybreaker's Virtue. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Dominator for stats that match Alessio's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Upgraded Shell → Legendary Hero Debut → Sunset Fireworks Show → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Sunset Fireworks Show (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Upgraded Shell is your lane trade tool. Legendary Hero Debut second. Sunset Fireworks Show whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Upgraded Shell → Legendary Hero Debut → Sunset Fireworks Show → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Alessio is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Alessio.
comparisons: Alessio vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Alessio has +2.2% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Alessio when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Alessio vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Alessio has +1.4% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Alessio when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Alessio excels into Mai Shiranui, Lian Po. Avoid blind picking into Arke, Lady Sun without team peel.

patchHistory.detail: "Nezha often initiates team fights, which also means that he tends to draw the enemy's firepower. As such, we've enhanced his base stats so that he can survive until his teammates arrive to help."

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「哪吒團戰中往往一馬當先，很容易吸引敵方的全部火力，我們適當提高他的基礎屬性，讓他能夠等到隊友的支援和配合。」

faqs.question: Is Nezha good in current season?

faqs.answer: Recommended: Pure Sky, Demonsbane, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Ravage - Phantom, Amble - Winter.

guide.overview: Nezha is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.6% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Nezha: Gains Movement Speed and a shield that negates true damage when attacking the enemy.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Frostscar's Embrace, Cuirass of Savagery, then complete Blood Rage, Blazing Cape, Overlord's Platemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Nezha's Tank kit. Take Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep → Red Armillary Sash - Bind → Universe Ring → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Universe Ring (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep, and Universe Ring on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep → Red Armillary Sash - Bind → Universe Ring → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Nezha sits at Tier B globally (51.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Nezha vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Nezha has +0.2% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Nezha when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Nezha vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 0.7% more often globally. Choose Nezha when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Nezha excels into Mai Shiranui, Mozi, Nuwa. Avoid blind picking into Augran, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.

name: Xuance

skills.name: Crazed Prelude
skills.description: Deals extra damage to enemies at long range and slows them, while gaining a Movement Speed boost.

skills.name: Flailing Sickles
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, pulling enemies marked by his sickle a certain distance. Also enhances his next Basic Attack.

skills.name: Nightmare Hooks
skills.description: Charges up and gains Movement Speed. After charging, he throws the sickle to immobilize enemies and deal damage, marking the first enemy hit. Using the skill again will pull back and damage the marked enemy.

skills.name: Crimson Blur
skills.description:
Dashes behind a target marked by his sickle, dealing damage. Beyond a certain range, he moves toward the target instead.
If he has not marked a target, the hook latches onto one, dealing damage. Takes 50% less damage during the dash.
Passive: Kills and assists grant Movement Speed and Attack Speed, up to 3 stacks.

skillsZh.name: 狂熱序章
skillsZh.description: 百里玄策對遠處敵人造成額外傷害和減速，並使自身加速。

skillsZh.name: 神乎鉤鐮
skillsZh.description: 百里玄策向前突進並強化下一次普攻，若鉤鐮標記了目標，則會將其拖曳一定距離。

skillsZh.name: 夢魘鉤鎖
skillsZh.description: 百里玄策蓄力加速，結束後拋出鉤鐮，將碰到的敵人定身並對其造成傷害，返回時標記第一位敵人，再次施放將拉回標記目標並對其造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 瞬鐮閃
skillsZh.description:
百里玄策突進到【夢魘鉤鎖】命中的目標身後，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害，遠距離時則順著鉤鐮向前移動一段距離。
【夢魘鉤鎖】沒有命中目標時，將【夢魘鉤鎖】套在目標身上，造成傷害。位移期間減少50%所受傷害。
被動：百里玄策擊殺或助攻可獲移速、攻速加成，最多可疊加3層。

guide.overview: Xuance is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.3% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Xuance: Deals extra damage to enemies at long range and slows them, while gaining a Movement Speed boost.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Dexterity, Axe of Torment, then complete Master Sword, Bloodweeper, Shadow Ripper. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Xuance's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Flailing Sickles → Nightmare Hooks → Crimson Blur → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Crimson Blur (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Nightmare Hooks provides mobility or stick—max first. Flailing Sickles second for damage. Crimson Blur on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Flailing Sickles → Nightmare Hooks → Crimson Blur → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Crimson Blur after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Xuance sits at Tier B globally (52.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Low pick rate 0.2% — niche in high rank; surprise value if you perfect the kit. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Xuance vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Xuance has +2.6% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Xuance when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Xuance vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Xuance has +1.6% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Xuance when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Xuance excels into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer. Avoid blind picking into Daji, Diaochan, Gao without team peel.

name: Flowborn (Mage)

skills.name: Flow of the World
skills.description:
Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
Spends 1 stack of Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack that deals area damage.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.description:
Channels the Flow, reducing the cooldown of other skills by 50%. Also gains 5–9 stacks of Flow based on the number of nearby heroes and minions and recovers Health based on Flow stacks.
Damages and knocks back nearby enemies (without applying crowd control).

skills.name: Flow Formation
skills.description:
Deals damage and slows enemies within range, then deals damage over time.
Using the skill repeatedly within a short time enhances it, dealing damage and launching or stunning enemies. When new magic circles overlap with the initial one, they increase its damage and refresh its duration.
Can spend 4 stacks of Flow to use the skill without triggering cooldown.

skills.name: Arcane Arts
skills.description:
Continuously channels a beam to deal damage over time.
While the beam is linked with a hero, continuously throws Energy Bombs that deal area damage.
Can spend 5 stacks of Flow to stop the skill from entering cooldown after this use.

skillsZh.name: 萬物為流
skillsZh.description:
元流之子在泉水中可以使用「流」強化自身的屬性。
元流之子可消耗1層「流」強化普攻，造成範圍傷害。

skillsZh.name: 匯流為一
skillsZh.description:
元流之子匯集「流」，減少50%其他技能的冷卻時間，根據附近英雄和小兵數量，至少獲得5層「流」，最多9層，根據「流」的層數回復生命值。
元流之子對近處的敵人造成傷害和擊退(無控制效果)。

skillsZh.name: 引流為陣
skillsZh.description:
元流之子對範圍內的敵人造成傷害和減速，然後造成持續傷害。
短時間內連續施放會強化技能，造成傷害和擊飛或暈眩，擊中初始法陣可提升其傷害並重置持續時間。
可消耗4層「流」施放技能，並使該次技能施放後不進入冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 萬妙之法
skillsZh.description:
元流之子持續引導光束，對敵人造成持續傷害。
光束吸附英雄時，還可持續打出能量彈造成範圍傷害。
可消耗5層「流」施放技能，並使該次技能施放後不進入冷卻時間。

guide.overview: Flowborn (Mage) is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.4% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Flowborn (Mage): Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Sage's Tome, Frozen Breath, then complete Blood Clan's Grimoire, Insatiable Tome, Nebulon Wood. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate, Penetration for stats that match Flowborn (Mage)'s Mage kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Convergence → Flow Formation → Arcane Arts → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Arcane Arts (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Convergence, and Arcane Arts on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade

combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Flowborn (Mage) sits at Tier B globally (51.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Flowborn (Mage) vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Flowborn (Mage) has +0.4% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Flowborn (Mage) when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

Flowborn (Mage) vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Flowborn (Mage) when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

name: Flowborn (Marksman)

skills.name: Flow of the World
skills.description:
Channels the Flow into the body to gain Attack Speed and enhance one of four stats: Health/Attack/Movement Speed/Cooldown.
Can spend Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack that deals piercing physical damage.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.description: Deals physical damage to nearby enemies and knocks them back. Gains Health recovery, 5 stacks of Flow, and reduces the cooldown of Arrow of No Retreat and Arrowstorm.

skills.name: Arrow of No Retreat
skills.description: Shoots an enormous projectile at the target, dealing physical damage and knocking back non-hero units. Can dash a short distance after use.

skills.name: Arrowstorm
skills.description: Shoots multiple light projectiles at the target area, dealing physical damage and gaining Movement Speed.

skillsZh.name: 萬物為流
skillsZh.description:
將「流」引入體內獲得攻速並強化生命值/攻擊/移速/冷卻四種屬性其中一種。
消耗「流」進行強化普攻造成貫穿物理傷害。

skillsZh.name: 匯流為一
skillsZh.description: 對附近敵人造成物理傷害和擊退並獲得生命值回復和5層「流」，同時減少【破釜之箭】和【萬箭齊發】冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 破釜之箭
skillsZh.description: 元流之子朝指定目標發射巨型弩箭造成物理傷害並擊退非英雄單位，施放後可位移一段距離。

skillsZh.name: 萬箭齊發
skillsZh.description: 元流之子朝指定區域發射多輪輕型弩箭造成物理傷害，同時獲得加速。

faqs.question: Is Flowborn (Marksman) good in current season?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Marksman) is Tier A Marksman with 51.71% win rate, 0.98% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Flowborn (Marksman) build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Doomsday, Axe of Torment, Daybreaker's Virtue, Eternity Blade, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Flowborn (Marksman)?
faqs.answer: Pick Kaizer, Dun, Arthur. Strong into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong.

faqsZh.question: 元流之子 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 元流之子 為 A 梯度，勝率 51.71%、選取 0.98%、禁用 0.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 元流之子 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：末世、暗影戰斧、仁者破曉、無盡戰刃、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 元流之子？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Kaizer、Dun、Arthur。元流之子 克制 Liu Bei、Athena、Zilong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong. Weak into: Kaizer, Dun, Arthur.

guide.overview: Flowborn (Marksman) is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.8% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Flowborn (Marksman): Channels the Flow into the body to gain Attack Speed and enhance one of four stats: Health/Attack/Movement Speed/Cooldown.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Dexterity, Sparkforged Dagger, Doomsday, then complete Mortal Punisher, Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate, Penetration for stats that match Flowborn (Marksman)'s Marksman kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Convergence → Arrow of No Retreat → Arrowstorm → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Arrowstorm (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Convergence is your lane trade tool. Arrow of No Retreat second. Arrowstorm whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Convergence → Arrow of No Retreat → Arrowstorm → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Flowborn (Marksman) is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Flowborn (Marksman).
comparisons: Flowborn (Marksman) vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Flowborn (Marksman) has +2.5% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Flowborn (Marksman) when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Flowborn (Marksman) vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Flowborn (Marksman) has +1.7% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Flowborn (Marksman) when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Flowborn (Marksman) excels into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.

skills.name: Jade Carriage - View from Above
skills.description: Can jump onto and walk on natural walls. Basic Attack becomes ranged while on a wall.

skills.name: Jade Chase - Returning Strike
skills.description: Dashes, dealing damage to enemies in his path and launching them. Enhances his next 3 Basic Attacks. Enhanced Basic Attacks deal extra damage and restore Health.

skills.name: Stepping on Jade
skills.description: Jumps onto the target wall.

skills.name: Hardened Jade Seal
skills.description: Damages and marks nearby enemies. Using the skill again unleashes 4 strikes of damage. The last strike will defeat marked enemies with low health. Can use to jump down from walls.

skillsZh.name: 玉輦・星眸
skillsZh.description: 暃可在自然牆體上行走，獲得遠程普攻。

skillsZh.name: 逐玉・鋒回
skillsZh.description: 暃位移，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害並將其擊飛，強化下三次普攻，額外造成傷害並回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 踏玉・飛簷
skillsZh.description: 暃位移到相鄰的牆體。

skillsZh.name: 凝玉之印
skillsZh.description: 暃對周圍敵人造成傷害並將其標記，再次施放則造成四次傷害。敵方生命值過低時，最後一次傷害將直接斬殺。在牆上施放【凝玉之印】可下牆。

guide.overview: Feyd is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.1% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Feyd: Can jump onto and walk on natural walls while gaining Movement Speed.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, then complete Master Sword, Ominous Premonition. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Feyd's Assassin kit. Take Haste & Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Jade Chase - Returning Strike → Stepping on Jade → Hardened Jade Seal → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Hardened Jade Seal (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Stepping on Jade provides mobility or stick—max first. Jade Chase - Returning Strike second for damage. Hardened Jade Seal on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Jade Chase - Returning Strike → Stepping on Jade → Hardened Jade Seal → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Hardened Jade Seal after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Feyd sits at Tier B globally (51.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Feyd vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Feyd has +1.4% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Feyd when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Feyd vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Feyd has +0.4% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Feyd when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Feyd excels into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Daji, Angela without team peel.

name: Daji

skills.description: Skill hits reduce the enemy's Magical Defense (up to 3 stacks).

tips: Build: Void Staff, Ardent Dominion, Sage's Tome.
tipsZh: 妲己（中路）：梯度 S+，勝率 51.64%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：虛無法杖、熾熱支配、賢者天書.

patchHistory.change: Reduced skill cooldown and enhanced the range and casting mechanics of her Skill 1
patchHistory.detail: "Daji is a mage that can deal impressive amounts of burst damage against single targets. However, whether she can obtain enough resources in the early game often determines her overall performance in the match. In order to help her along, we've shortened her skill cooldowns so that she can pull off more kills in the early game."

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低技能冷卻，提升了1技能的距離和施放手感
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「妲己作為具有單體高爆發的法師，在前期能否獲得足夠的經濟，往往決定整場戰局的表現；因此我們適當縮短前期技能冷卻，讓她能有更多嘗試獲得擊殺的機會。」

faqs.question: Is Daji good in current season?
faqs.answer: Daji is Tier S+ Mage with 51.64% win rate, 2.42% pick rate, and 3.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Daji build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Void Staff, Ardent Dominion, Sage's Tome, Sage's Sanctuary, Splendor, Venomous Staff.

faqs.question: How to counter Daji?
faqs.answer: Pick Gao Changgong, Mulan. Strong into Luna, Diaochan.

faqsZh.question: 妲己 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 妲己 為 S+ 梯度，勝率 51.64%、選取 2.42%、禁用 3.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 妲己 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：虛無法杖、熾熱支配、賢者天書、賢者的庇護、輝月、夢魘之牙.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 妲己？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Gao Changgong、Mulan。妲己 克制 Luna、Diaochan。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Luna, Diaochan. Weak into: Gao Changgong, Mulan.

guide.overview: Daji is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 51.0% win rate and 2.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Daji: Skill hits reduce the enemy's Magical Defense (up to 3 stacks).
guide.bestBuild: Rush Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of the Arcane, Savant's Wrath, then complete Void Staff, Splendor. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Daji's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Soul Impact → Strike a Pose → Heartbreaker → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Heartbreaker (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Soul Impact, and Heartbreaker on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Soul Impact → Strike a Pose → Heartbreaker → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Daji is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 3.1% — expect Daji to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Daji vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.8% more often globally. Choose Daji when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

Daji vs Wang Zhaojun (Mage, Tier S): Wang Zhaojun is 1.9% pick / 51.2% WR. Wang Zhaojun wins 0.2% more often globally. Choose Daji when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Wang Zhaojun for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Daji excels into Luna, Diaochan. Avoid blind picking into Gao Changgong, Mulan without team peel.

name: Butterfly

skills.name: Assassination
skills.description: Gains 2 marks from defeating heroes and 1 mark from assisting or killing monsters/minions. When she accumulates 3 marks, the next skill used will not enter cooldown.

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies around her and gains a shield. Her Movement Speed increases during this time.

skills.name: Sword Propel
skills.description: Deals damage in the target direction and inflicts slow.

skills.name: Death Dealer
skills.description:
Jumps to the target, dealing damage.
If the target is defeated within a certain time, the skill's cooldown will be reset.

skillsZh.name: 刺殺
skillsZh.description: 刀鋒寶貝擊殺英雄會獲得2層印記，助攻或者擊殺野怪、小兵會獲得1層。疊至3層時，下個施放的技能不會進入冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 半月斬
skillsZh.description: 刀鋒寶貝對周圍造成傷害。獲得一個護盾，期間使自身加速。

skillsZh.name: 擲刀術
skillsZh.description: 刀鋒寶貝朝指定方向造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 暗殺術
skillsZh.description:
刀鋒寶貝跳向指定目標並造成傷害。
若在一定時間內該目標被擊殺，則重置技能冷卻。

patchHistory.change: Increased the duration of Ultimate's Mark.
patchHistory.detail: "The Mark from Butterfly's Ultimate is a crucial mechanic. We've increased the duration of the Mark to give her more room for error and better leverage this feature."

patchHistory.change: Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail:
Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
We've taken notice of the fact that Butterfly has consistently been rather difficult to play as in the current version of the game. Because she is an assassin hero with high mobility, we would like her to be a worthy opponent against the weaker, but still important, enemies. It's for this reason that we have increased the damage dealt by her Skills 1 and 2. We hope that Butterfly will prove to be a more competent fighter in the current season.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2 based on her level, and reduced her Ultimate's base cooldown.
patchHistory.detail: Butterfly, who just recently joined Honor of Kings, has excellent mobility and her damage output makes her a popular choice at the start of the game. Although we've reduced some of her skill stats, we hope that she will still be an active part of Hero's Gorge. That is why we reduced her skill cooldown: to ensure she is still powerful in the mid to late game.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 大招的標記是刀鋒寶貝的重要機制，我們提升了印記的持續時間，希望給她更多的容錯空間來利用這個特點。

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
我們發現目前遊戲中，刀鋒寶貝的表現始終不理想。身為一名機動性很強的刺客型英雄，我們希望她能對那些脆弱的關鍵目標造成足夠威脅。因此，我们適度提升了她1技能和2技能所能造成的傷害，希望刀鋒寶貝能在目前賽季有更好的表現。

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2 based on her level, and reduced her Ultimate's base cooldown.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Butterfly, who just recently joined Honor of Kings, has excellent mobility and her damage output makes her a popular choice at the start of the game. Although we've reduced some of her skill stats, we hope that she will still be an active part of Hero's Gorge. That is why we reduced her skill cooldown: to ensure she is still powerful in the mid to late game.

guide.overview: Butterfly is a Medium Warrior (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.4% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Butterfly: Butterfly gains 2 stacks of mark from defeating heroes and 1 stack fromassisting or killing monsters/minions.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Rapacious Bite, Axe of Torment, then complete Master Sword, Immovable - Sky Dome, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Butterfly's Warrior kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Whirlwind → Sword Propel → Death Dealer → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Death Dealer (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Sword Propel provides mobility or stick—max first. Whirlwind second for damage. Death Dealer on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Whirlwind → Sword Propel → Death Dealer → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Death Dealer after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Butterfly sits at Tier B globally (52.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Butterfly vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 0.2% more often globally. Choose Butterfly when you need Jungling identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

Butterfly vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Butterfly has +2.2% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Butterfly when you need Jungling identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Butterfly excels into Heino, Sakeer, Angela. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.

name: Li Bai

skills.name: Way of the Sword
skills.description: Basic Attack hits grant stacks. At 4 stacks, increases Physical Attack and unlocks the Ultimate.

skills.name: Stupor Slash
skills.description:
Dashes and leaves an afterimage at the start point while stunning and damaging enemies in his path.
Can dash again before cooldown starts, and a third time to return to the afterimage.

skills.name: Stroke of Genius
skills.description:
Removes all debuffs from self and becomes untargetable.
Damages enemies in range, leaving behind a sword formation.
Enemies that touch the edge of the formation are damaged, slowed, and sundered.

skills.name: Flickering Flurry
skills.description:
Transforms into a phantom, continuously slashing at the specified area.
Removes all debuffs and becomes untargetable while the skill is active.
Deals area damage, but damage is diminished upon hitting multiple enemy heroes.

skillsZh.name: 俠客行
skillsZh.description: 每次普攻命中敵人使自己疊層(最高四層)，滿層後提升物理攻擊並解鎖3技能。

skillsZh.name: 將進酒
skillsZh.description:
向前突進，在起點位置留下殘影，對沿途敵人造成傷害和暈眩效果。
技能冷卻前可再次突進1次，第3次則回到殘影位置。

skillsZh.name: 神來之筆
skillsZh.description:
解除自身受到的負面效果，並進入無法鎖定為目標狀態。
對範圍內敵人造成傷害並留下劍陣。
後續接觸到劍陣邊緣的敵人會受到傷害、減速和破甲效果。

skillsZh.name: 青蓮劍歌
skillsZh.description:
化身幻影，連續對指定範圍進行斬擊。
期間無法鎖定為目標，並解除剩餘負面效果。
對敵人造成範圍傷害，命中多個敵方英雄傷害遞減。

tips: Li Bai (Assassin): Tier B — 51.6% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Bloodweeper, Master Sword, Boots of Resistance.
tipsZh: 李白（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 51.6%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：泣血之刃、宗師之力、抵抗之靴.

patchHistory.change: Increased base stats and Ultimate damage.
patchHistory.detail: Li Bai has an agile combat style. We have increased his stats to improve his survivability if he makes a mistake.
Increasing Skill 1's damage allows Li Bai to deal good damage before he gets his Ultimate

patchHistory.change: Reduced the Physical Attack gained from his Passive, adjusted Skill 1 cooldown.
patchHistory.detail:
Reduced the Physical Attack gained from his Passive, adjusted Skill 1 cooldown.
Ever since we adjusted the refresh mechanic for Li Bai's Passive, his power and win rate have gone up significantly. Now he farms faster and is able to participate in battles right from the early game.We've reduced the power of his Passive and adjusted his Skill 1's cooldown to keep him in his intended role as a late game hero.

patchHistory.change: Made it easier to extend the duration of his Passive Skill's enhancement effect, and adjusted the damage bonus of his Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail: As a hero with a great deal of potential, Li Bai requires a lot of time and Gold to buy equipment and become the best that he can be. However, we hope players will find him to be a high-risk, high-reward hero. With these adjustments, Li Bai will be able to participate more frequently in battles in the early game.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升基礎屬性和大招傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「李白有著非常靈活的作戰風格，我們提高了他的屬性以保證他偶爾失誤時的生存能力。」
「提升1技能的傷害，讓李白即使沒有大招，也能有不俗的傷害。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低被動提供的物理攻擊，調整1技能的冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail:
降低被動提供的物理攻擊，調整1技能的冷卻時間
自從我們調整了李白被動的重置機制後，李白在目前版本的強度和勝率有顯著提升。現在他在遊戲早期就能參戰，使其發育速度更快。我們適當降低了他被動技能的強度，並調整了他1技能的冷卻時間，希望讓李白更符合一名後期英雄的定位。

patchHistoryZh.change: Made it easier to extend the duration of his Passive Skill's enhancement effect, and adjusted the damage bonus of his Skill 2.
patchHistoryZh.detail: As a hero with a great deal of potential, Li Bai requires a lot of time and Gold to buy equipment and become the best that he can be. However, we hope players will find him to be a high-risk, high-reward hero. With these adjustments, Li Bai will be able to participate more frequently in battles in the early game.

tips: Build: Pure Sky, Frigid Charge, Succubus Cloak.
tipsZh: 老夫子（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 51.55%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：純淨蒼穹、冰霜衝擊、魔女斗篷.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2 in the late game
patchHistory.detail: "Fuzi's passive ability to reduce the cooldown of his Skills 1 and 2 with his Basic Attack is an important part of his performance. However, in the late game team fights, he doesn't have much time left for Basic Attacks. As such, we've reduced the cooldown of his Skills 1 and 2 in the late game to increase his chances of survival."

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整技能傷害和冷卻時間
降低1、2技能後期的冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「老夫子透過被動降低的1技能和2技能冷卻是他的重要技巧，而在後期團戰中留給他普通攻擊的時間並不多。因此我們降低了1技能和2技能後期的冷卻，提升他存活的可能性。」

faqs.question: Is Fuzi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Fuzi is Tier B Warrior with 51.55% win rate, 0.39% pick rate, and 0.05% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Fuzi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Pure Sky, Frigid Charge, Succubus Cloak, Dawnlight, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Fuzi?
faqs.answer: Pick Charlotte, Hou Yi, Marco Polo. Strong into Milady, Luna, Mai Shiranui.

faqsZh.question: 老夫子 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 老夫子 為 B 梯度，勝率 51.55%、選取 0.39%、禁用 0.05%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 老夫子 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：純淨蒼穹、冰霜衝擊、魔女斗篷、旭日初光、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 老夫子？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Charlotte、Hou Yi、Marco Polo。老夫子 克制 Milady、Luna、Mai Shiranui。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Milady, Luna, Mai Shiranui. Weak into: Charlotte, Hou Yi, Marco Polo.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Milady、Luna、Mai Shiranui；被克制：Charlotte、Hou Yi、Marco Polo

guide.overview: Fuzi is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.6% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Fuzi: After landing 5 Basic Attacks, he becomes enhanced.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Dexterity, Doomsday, Pure Sky, then complete Spikemail, Longnight Guardian, Deepfrost Siege. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Conflict for stats that match Fuzi's Warrior kit. Take Execute & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Corporal Punishment → Intuition → Sage's Might → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Sage's Might (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Corporal Punishment, and Sage's Might on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Corporal Punishment → Intuition → Sage's Might → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Fuzi sits at Tier B globally (52.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Fuzi vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Fuzi has +0.0% WR vs Li Xin in Camp data. Choose Fuzi when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Fuzi vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Fuzi has +2.4% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Fuzi when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Fuzi excels into Milady, Luna, Mai Shiranui. Avoid blind picking into Charlotte, Hou Yi, Marco Polo without team peel.

name: Di Renjie

skills.name: Swift Justice
skills.description: Each Basic Attack stacks Swift Justice (up to 5 stacks), with each stack increasing his Attack Speed and Movement Speed.

skills.name: Respect the Law
skills.description:
Throws tokens in a cone-shaped area, dealing physical damage and magical damage.
Passive: After every two Basic Attacks, the next Basic Attack gains a random enhanced effect.

skills.name: Legal Immunity
skills.description: Throws tokens to damage nearby enemies. Removes debuffs from himself and gains brief invincibility.

skills.name: Imperial Order
skills.description: Throws a token in the target direction, damaging, stunning, and reducing the Physical and Magical Defense of the first enemy hero hit.

skillsZh.name: 迅捷
skillsZh.description: 每次普攻為自己疊層(最多5層)，每層獲得額外攻速和移動速度提升。

skillsZh.name: 六令追凶
skillsZh.description:
向指定扇形區域發射令牌，對敵人造成物理傷害和法術傷害。
被動：每兩次普攻後，下次普攻獲得隨機強化效果。

skillsZh.name: 公理庇佑
skillsZh.description: 向周圍擲出令牌，對敵人造成傷害，同時解除自身負面效果並短暫無敵。

skillsZh.name: 王朝密令
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射令牌，對命中的第一個敵方英雄造成傷害和暈眩效果，並降低其物理防禦和法術防禦。

tips: Di Renjie (Marksman): Tier A — 51.51% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Deepfrost Siege, Cuirass of Savagery, Blood Rage.
tipsZh: 狄仁傑（發育路）：梯度 A，勝率 51.51%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：寒霜襲侵、暴烈之甲、血魔之怒.

patchHistory.detail: Changed the stat-based calculation of the tokens' damage, so Di Renjie is no longer limited to attack effect equipment, but can try out other   builds.

patchHistory.change: Increased base Movement Speed and the early game damage of Skill 1's tokens.
patchHistory.detail: "Magistrate Di has been lying low for a while, it's time for him to bring judgment to his opponents."

patchHistory.change: Reduced the base damage of Skills 1 and 2, but kept the same basic damage as before at max level.
patchHistory.detail: Di Renjie deals high burst damage in melee range with Skills 1 and 2, and is able to poke enemies from afar with his Basic Attacks. These two characterisics made him very powerful at laning during early game, even before he's all geared up. Considering that he's a solid hero during mid to late game, we want Di Renjie to be less punishing during early game.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「調整令牌的屬性加成結構，讓狄大人不再與攻擊特效套裝綁定，可以嘗試更多的出裝選擇。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升基礎移速和1技能令牌前期傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「狄大人已經蟄伏一段時間了，是時候去審判他的對手了。」

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced the base damage of Skills 1 and 2, but kept the same basic damage as before at max level.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Di Renjie deals high burst damage in melee range with Skills 1 and 2, and is able to poke enemies from afar with his Basic Attacks. These two characterisics made him very powerful at laning during early game, even before he's all geared up. Considering that he's a solid hero during mid to late game, we want Di Renjie to be less punishing during early game.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Ukyo Tachibana, Ying. Weak into: Kaizer, Dun, Arthur.

guide.overview: Di Renjie is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.7% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Di Renjie: Basic atacks add stacks,with each stack granting extra atack speed and movement speed.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Doomsday, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, then complete Daybreaker's Virtue, Ominous Premonition, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Di Renjie's Marksman kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Respect the Law → Legal Immunity → Imperial Order → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Imperial Order (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Respect the Law is your lane trade tool. Legal Immunity second. Imperial Order whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Respect the Law → Legal Immunity → Imperial Order → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Di Renjie is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick.
comparisons: Di Renjie vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Di Renjie has +2.4% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Di Renjie when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Di Renjie vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Di Renjie has +1.6% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Di Renjie when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Di Renjie excels into Mai Shiranui, Ukyo Tachibana, Ying. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.

name: Consort Yu

skills.name: Blessing of the Dryads
skills.description: Basic Attacks have a chance to shoot two bolts in a row and inflict slow.

skills.name: Oak Bolt
skills.description:
Charges up and shoots a bolt in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path.
The higher her Attack Speed, the shorter the charge time.

skills.name: Protecting Winds
skills.description:
Gains Movement Speed and enhances the next Basic Attack. During this effect, becomes Invulnerable to physical damage.
Upon learning, gains a permanent Attack Speed boost and enhanced Passive effect.

skills.name: Vaulting Shot
skills.description:
Jumps at a target, slowing and stunning them, then returns to the original location, gaining an Attack boost and shooting bolts.
The higher her Attack Speed, the more bolts are shot.

skillsZh.name: 樹神護佑
skillsZh.description: 普攻有機率連射兩箭並造成減速。

skillsZh.name: 楚歌起
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向蓄力後發射弩矢，對沿途敵人造成傷害。
攻速越高，蓄力越短。

skillsZh.name: 大風來
skillsZh.description:
獲得加速並強化下一次普攻，效果期間免疫物理傷害。
升級後，獲得永久攻速強化被動效果。

skillsZh.name: 陣前舞
skillsZh.description:
突襲指定目標造成減速和暈眩，回到原地後提升攻擊並發射弩箭。
攻速越高，射出弩箭越多。

tips: Consort Yu (Marksman): Tier S — 51.5% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Daybreaker's Virtue, Eternity Blade, Sunchaser.
tipsZh: 虞姬（發育路）：梯度 S，勝率 51.5%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：仁者破曉、無盡戰刃、逐日之弓.

patchHistory.detail: Consort Yu's passive triggers on a chance. We wanted to give it more consistent damage output when it triggers.

patchHistory.change: Increased basic Movement Speed.Increased Attack Speed to enhance Skill 1 and Ultimate effects, while slightly weakening Skill 2
patchHistory.detail: As a late-game marksman, Consort Yu's original skill mechanics have made it increasingly difficult to support her position in the current environment.We hope that this update will make Consort Yu's Skill 1 an important part of her damage output in late-game team fights, while also improving the attack power of her Ultimate

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「虞姬的被動觸發有一定隨機性，我們希望在觸發的時候能夠造成更穩定的傷害。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升基礎移動速度。提升攻擊速度可以強化1技能和大招的效果，略微削弱2技能
patchHistoryZh.detail: 虞姬作為遊戲後期射手英雄之一，她原有的技能機制逐漸難以支撐她在當前環境中的地位。我們希望本次改動過後，虞姬的1技能可以在遊戲後期的團戰中作為她傷害重要的組成部分，同時讓她的大招可以更具攻擊性。

faqs.question: Is Consort Yu good in current season?
faqs.answer: Consort Yu is Tier S Marksman with 51.5% win rate, 1.59% pick rate, and 0.19% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Consort Yu build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Daybreaker's Virtue, Eternity Blade, Sunchaser, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Haste - Sunpool.

faqs.question: How to counter Consort Yu?
faqs.answer: Pick Luna, Diaochan. Strong into Marco Polo, Han Xin.

faqsZh.question: 虞姬 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 虞姬 為 S 梯度，勝率 51.5%、選取 1.59%、禁用 0.19%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 虞姬 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：仁者破曉、無盡戰刃、逐日之弓、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、迅疾・日淵.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 虞姬？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Luna、Diaochan。虞姬 克制 Marco Polo、Han Xin。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Marco Polo, Han Xin. Weak into: Luna, Diaochan.

guide.overview: Consort Yu is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 51.9% win rate and 1.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Consort Yu: Basic Attacks have a chance to grant an extra Basic Attack that dealsdamage and slows the enemy.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Doomsday, Boots of Dexterity, Bloodweeper, then complete Eternity Blade, Daybreaker's Virtue. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Consort Yu's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Oak Bolt → Protecting Winds → Vaulting Shot → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Vaulting Shot (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Oak Bolt is your lane trade tool. Protecting Winds second. Vaulting Shot whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Oak Bolt → Protecting Winds → Vaulting Shot → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Consort Yu is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.5% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Consort Yu.
comparisons: Consort Yu vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Consort Yu has +2.6% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Consort Yu when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Consort Yu vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Consort Yu has +1.8% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Consort Yu when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Consort Yu excels into Marco Polo, Han Xin. Avoid blind picking into Luna, Diaochan without team peel.

name: Yixing

skills.name: Maintaining Initiative
skills.description: Basic Attacks deal magical damage. For every 4 skill hits on the same enemy, generates a Weiqi stone that deals magical damage and adds to the total number of Weiqi stones. Upon taking fatal damage, gains brief immunity to all damage and increased Movement Speed.

skills.name: Sliding Stones
skills.description:
Places a Weiqi stone at the target location, gaining vision and damaging enemies.
Weiqi stones will be pulled into Skill 2's Weiqi formation, damaging and slowing enemies in their path.

skills.name: Taking Liberties
skills.description: Deals damage to the target area and creates a Weiqi formation. The formation pulls enemies toward its center, damaging them in the process.

skills.name: The World is My Board
skills.description: Draws a Weiqi board that launches enemies and places marks on them while exposing their location. Enemies caught within the Weiqi board are bound and will be unable to leave. Gains Movement Speed while forming the board.

skillsZh.name: 氣合
skillsZh.description: 普攻造成傷害，技能命中敵人四次後生成棋子造成傷害，並累積棋子數。受到致命傷害會短暫免疫所有傷害並提升移速。

skillsZh.name: 飛攻
skillsZh.description:
向指定位置放置棋子，獲得視野，並對敵人造成傷害。
棋子會被吸入2技能形成的棋陣中，對沿途敵人造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 鎮神
skillsZh.description: 弈星對指定區域造成傷害並擴散棋陣，同時將周圍敵人向棋陣中心吸引，造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 萬變之局
skillsZh.description: 弈星畫出棋盤，成型後擊飛棋盤內目標並疊加印記，暴露行蹤，棋盤內的敵人被束縛無法離開。棋盤成型期間，弈星獲得加速。

guide.overview: Yixing is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.8% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Yixing: Basic Attacks deal magical damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of Tranquility, Savant's Wrath, then complete Breakthrough Robe, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Yixing's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Sliding Stones → Taking Liberties → The World is My Board → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → The World is My Board (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Sliding Stones, and The World is My Board on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Sliding Stones → Taking Liberties → The World is My Board → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Yixing is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick.
comparisons: Yixing vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Yixing has +0.7% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Yixing when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Yixing vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.1% more often globally. Choose Yixing when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

skills.name: Arclight
skills.description: Attacks twice in a row, dealing physical damage.

skills.name: Untouchable
skills.description: Dashes forward and attacks, marking an enemy while dealing physical damage and gaining Attack Speed. Attacking marked targets slows them and reduces this skill's cooldown. She takes less damage from marked targets.

skills.name: Phantom Dance
skills.description: Enters stealth, gaining a Movement Speed boost and Health recovery. She enhances her attacks after exiting stealth, gains extra Movement Speed upon dealing damage, and refreshes all skill cooldowns with defeats and assists.

guide.overview: Arke is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 52.4% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Arke: Attacks launched from the front of the target will not crit, but backstabs are guaranteed to crit.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Eternity Blade, Master Sword, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Dominator for stats that match Arke's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Arclight → Untouchable → Phantom Dance → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Phantom Dance (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Untouchable provides mobility or stick—max first. Arclight second for damage. Phantom Dance on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Arclight → Untouchable → Phantom Dance → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Phantom Dance after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Arke is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 52.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 0.8% — expect Arke to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Arke vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Arke has +2.6% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Arke when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Arke vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Arke has +1.6% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Arke when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Arke excels into Alessio, Da Qiao. Avoid blind picking into Bai Qi, Arthur, Cai Yan without team peel.

name: Wang Zhaojun

skills.name: Frozen Heart
skills.description:
Upon leaving combat, gains a shield that chills the attacker when taking damage.
When the shield disappears, deals damage to nearby enemies.
Every third Basic Attack is enhanced, inflicting extra damage and chill effects.

skills.name: Shattered Ice
skills.description: Damages and slows enemies in the target area while gaining vision of them.

skills.name: Frigid Prison
skills.description: After a short delay, freezes enemies in the target area and slows them. Attacking frozen targets will deal extra damage.

skills.name: Winter Is Here
skills.description: Summons a snowstorm in the target location, constantly dealing damage and slowing enemies.

skillsZh.name: 冰封之心
skillsZh.description:
脫離戰鬥後獲得護盾，受到傷害時對傷害來源造成冰冷效果。
護盾消失時對附近敵人造成傷害。
每輪第三次普攻獲得強化，造成額外傷害和冰冷效果。

skillsZh.name: 凋零冰晶
skillsZh.description: 對施放區域目標造成傷害和減速效果，並獲得他們的視野。

skillsZh.name: 禁錮寒霜
skillsZh.description: 短暫延遲後凍結施放區域目標，並造成減速效果，攻擊冰凍目標會額外造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 凜冬已至
skillsZh.description: 持續對施放區域造成傷害和減速效果。

tips: Wang Zhaojun (Mage): Tier S — 51.19% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Frozen Breath, Mask of Agony, Savant's Wrath.
tipsZh: 王昭君（中路）：梯度 S，勝率 51.19%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：凝冰之息、痛苦面具、博學者之怒.

patchHistory.change: Skill 1 cooldown reduced, Ultimate damage increased
Reduced early game strength while allowing her to use Skill 2 more frequently in the late game
Reduced the base damage from Princess Frost's Passive, and increased her equipment bonus multiplier.
patchHistory.detail: Princess Frost has always shown good numbers during early-game, but she relies on teammates more and more during mid- to late-game, eventually becoming a hero that's mostly useful for her crowd controls and ability to guard towers. By adjusting her passive, we hope to change her predicament of being too powerful during the early game and repetitive during the late game.

patchHistoryZh.change: 縮短1技能冷卻時間，提升大招傷害
降低前期強度，適當提升後期二技能頻率
降低王昭君被動技能所造成的基礎傷害，提升裝備加成係數
patchHistoryZh.detail: 王昭君一直具備不錯的前期作戰能力，但是當遊戲行進至中後期時，王昭君反而會更加依賴隊友，從而變成一個單純的控制機器或守塔機器。我們希望通過調整她的被動技能，來改變她前期過強而後期體驗過分單調的處境。

guide.overview: Wang Zhaojun is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 51.2% win rate and 1.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Wang Zhaojun: Upon leaving combat, gains a shield that chills the attacker when taking damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Deftness, Stone of Sorcery, Frozen Breath, then complete Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Penetration for stats that match Wang Zhaojun's Mage kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Shattered Ice → Frigid Prison → Winter is Here → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Winter is Here (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Shattered Ice, and Winter is Here on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Shattered Ice → Frigid Prison → Winter is Here → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Wang Zhaojun is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 0.6% — expect Wang Zhaojun to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Wang Zhaojun vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Wang Zhaojun has +0.2% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Wang Zhaojun when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Wang Zhaojun vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.6% more often globally. Choose Wang Zhaojun when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Wang Zhaojun excels into Athena, Zilong, Pei. Avoid blind picking into Dharma, Li Xin, Kaizer without team peel.

tips: Build: Rapacious Bite, Overlord's Might, Frostscar's Embrace.
tipsZh: 鍾無艷（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 51.14%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：貪婪之噬、強者破軍、冰痕之握.

patchHistory.detail: "Currently, Wuyan's ability to hit the enemy with the center of her Skill 2 attack plays a huge part in her overall performance, so we've made adjustments to help her perform more consistently across different situations. At the same time, we've made adjustments to her skills' stat bonuses to give players more options in terms of her equipment."

patchHistory.change: Increased base Health, reduced Skill 1 cooldown, and increased shield granted by Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail:
Increased base Health, reduced Skill 1 cooldown, and increased shield granted by Ultimate.
We've previously adjusted Wuyan's skill mechanics to give her more mobility.But looking at her win rate and pick rate, it's clear that she still needs to be more powerful.By boosting her base stats and strengthening some of her skills, we hope to make her much better able to fulfill her role as a fighter and tank.

patchHistory.change: Now Wuyan can use Skill 1 during her Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail:
Now Wuyan can use Skill 1 during her Ultimate.
Currently Wuyan can fill a diversified role, but whether jungling, lane clashing, or roaming, she struggles to respond to highly mobile heroes with her Ultimate. Now, we've allowed Wuyan to use Skill 1 during her Ultimate. This should allow her to perform well in a wider range of scenarios.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「目前鍾無艷是否能用2技能中心區域命中敵人，大大決定了她的表現，因此我們縮減了不同情形的差異；同時調整了技能的屬性加成結構，讓她能有不同的出裝嘗試。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升基礎生命，降低1技能冷卻，提升大招所提供的護盾值
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提升基礎生命，降低1技能冷卻，提升大招所提供的護盾值
之前我們調整了鍾無艷的技能機制，進一步增強了她的機動性。但從勝率及出場率來看，鍾無艷仍需一定的強度。我們希望透過增強她的基礎屬性和部分技能數值，使她在擔任戰士和坦克時能更加得心應手。

patchHistoryZh.change: 現在鐘無艷在施放大招過程中可以使用1技能
patchHistoryZh.detail:
現在鐘無艷在施放大招過程中可以使用1技能。
鐘無艷在目前遊戲版本中可以扮演的角色比較多元，但無論她作為打野、對抗路或是遊走，在她施放大招的過程中，很難對那些機動性較強的英雄產生相應的威脅。現在我們讓鐘無艷可以在施放大招的過程中使用1技能，希望她可以在更多的對戰場景中獲得良好的表現。

faqs.question: Is Mi Yue good in current season?
faqs.answer: Mi Yue is Tier A Mage with 51.12% win rate, 0.84% pick rate, and 0.66% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Mi Yue build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Ominous Premonition, Boots of Resistance, Insatiable Tome, Deepfrost Siege, Destiny, Blood Rage.

faqs.question: How to counter Mi Yue?
faqs.answer: Pick Cao Cao, Dharma, Dian Wei. Strong into Mai Shiranui, Wukong.

faqsZh.question: 羋月 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 羋月 為 A 梯度，勝率 51.12%、選取 0.84%、禁用 0.66%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 羋月 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：不祥徵兆、抵抗之靴、噬神之書、寒霜襲侵、名刀・司命、血魔之怒.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 羋月？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Cao Cao、Dharma、Dian Wei。羋月 克制 Mai Shiranui、Wukong。

guide.overview: Mi Yue is a Medium Mage (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.5% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Mi Yue: Summons a shadow servant that damages enemies and restores Health to her whenever using a skill.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Giant's Grip, Boots of Resistance, Golden Blade, then complete Blazing Cape, Blood Rage, Breakthrough Robe. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Mi Yue's Mage kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Dark Transfer → Ravenous Tether → Umbral Moon → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Umbral Moon (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Dark Transfer, and Umbral Moon on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Dark Transfer → Ravenous Tether → Umbral Moon → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Mi Yue is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 0.7% — expect Mi Yue to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Mi Yue vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 1.5% more often globally. Choose Mi Yue when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Mi Yue vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 2.3% more often globally. Choose Mi Yue when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Mi Yue excels into Mai Shiranui, Wukong. Avoid blind picking into Cao Cao, Dharma, Dian Wei without team peel.
