tips: Liu Bei (Warrior): Tier B — 51.11% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Doomsday, Master Sword, Blood Rage.
tipsZh: 劉備（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 51.11%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：末世、宗師之力、血魔之怒.

patchHistory.change: Increased BA range, reduced Skill 1 CD in early game
patchHistory.detail: Liu Bei's shotgun is most effective up close, and Skill 1 is his core damage and mobility skill, so we have reduced its cooldown in the early game to improve his leveling efficiency. The range of his shotgun has also been increased to give him some mid-range coverage.
Do no evil no matter how small, and do not avoid doing good no matter how small.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升普攻射程，降低1技能前期冷卻
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「劉備在接近對手時可以發揮出霰彈槍的最大威力，其中1技能作為移動和輸出的核心主要技能，我們適當降低了前期的冷卻來提升他的發育效率；同時霰彈槍的射程升級也能讓他兼顧一定的中距離作戰能力。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升大招攻擊力和護盾量
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「勿以惡小而為之，勿以善小而不為。」

guide.overview: Liu Bei is a Medium Warrior (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 54.5% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Liu Bei: When Basic Attacks hit a hero, it increases his Physical Pierce.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Dexterity, Axe of Torment, then complete Doomsday, Cuirass of Savagery, Master Sword. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Liu Bei's Warrior kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Dual Shot → Leading the Charge → Hearts and Minds → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Hearts and Minds (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Leading the Charge provides mobility or stick—max first. Dual Shot second for damage. Hearts and Minds on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Dual Shot → Leading the Charge → Hearts and Minds → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Hearts and Minds after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Liu Bei sits at Tier B globally (54.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Liu Bei vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Liu Bei has +1.9% WR vs Li Xin in Camp data. Choose Liu Bei when you need Jungling identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Liu Bei vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Liu Bei has +4.4% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Liu Bei when you need Jungling identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

patchHistory.detail: "Currently, Dharma is relatively weak, so we've reduced the cooldown of his Ultimate to give him more opportunities to knock opponents into walls. Since his Skill 2's stationary punch is difficult to land on agile opponents, we've shortened the stock time for his Skill 1, allowing him to better adjust the position of his Skill 2."

patchHistory.change: Raised the base damage of his Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail:
Raised the base damage of his Skill 2.
This change to Dharma makes him a more powerful and interesting. We hope that players will find this version of him to be a dependable choice in the Clash Lane or jungler hero pool. By strengthening the base damage of his Skill 2, he will be able to deal a good amount of damage during a fast-moving fight.

patchHistory.change: We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
patchHistory.detail:
We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
Dharma's original skill specialties required players to invest a certain amount of practice to make use of their full strength.As more and more heroes have been added, even expert Dharma players sometimes find it hard to compete with him in Hero's Gorge.We've injected Dharma with new power in this latest version, which we hope will make him more effective in combat for new players and veterans alike.

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低1技能和3技能的冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 目前達摩強度偏低，我們降低他大招的冷卻時間，給他更多的機會嘗試將對手擊退到牆體上；2技能原地揮拳很難命中靈活的對手，因此我們縮短1技能儲存時間，讓他能更好地調整2技能的位置。

提高2技能基礎傷害
重製後的達摩變得比以前更強、更有趣，我們希望他能在目前版本中成為更多對抗路或打野玩家英雄池中的可靠選擇之一。我們強化達摩2技能的基礎傷害，使他在節奏快速的戰鬥中，能更快打出足夠傷害。

patchHistoryZh.change: We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
patchHistoryZh.detail:
We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
Dharma's original skill specialties required players to invest a certain amount of practice to make use of their full strength.As more and more heroes have been added, even expert Dharma players sometimes find it hard to compete with him in Hero's Gorge.We've injected Dharma with new power in this latest version, which we hope will make him more effective in combat for new players and veterans alike.

guide.overview: Dharma is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.2% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Dharma: When using skills, he gains Physical and Magical Defense,as well as enhanced basic atacks that inflict extra damage and slow.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, then complete Immovable - Sky Dome, Demonsbane, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Dharma's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Formlessness Mantra → Enlightenment Mantra → Truth Mantra → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Truth Mantra (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Formlessness Mantra, and Truth Mantra on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Formlessness Mantra → Enlightenment Mantra → Truth Mantra → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Dharma sits at Tier B globally (52.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Dharma vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Dharma has +0.8% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Dharma when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Dharma vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 0.1% more often globally. Choose Dharma when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Dharma excels into Wang Zhaojun, Han Xin. Avoid blind picking into Xiang Yu, Diaochan without team peel.

patchHistory.change: Increased Attack Range and Added Damage Reduction to Ultimate
patchHistory.detail: "Gao needs to get close to as many enemies as possible while using his Ultimate, so we've increased his damage reduction to improve his survivability. Additionally, we've increased his range so it's easier for him to find a way to enter combat."

patchHistory.change: Enhanced Gao's mobility through new skills, making it easier for him to get close to the enemy and deal damage to them, with appropriate adjustments to his base stats and damage.
patchHistory.detail: Compared to the typical mage, Gao's close-range combat style is relatively high-risk, but it comes with extremely high rewards. In this update, we have added more ways for Gao to quickly get up close and personal with the enemy so players have more room to play and experiment.

patchHistory.change: Reduced his Skill 2 base cooldown time, increased its recovery effect, and added a new effect: it will now also restore Health to him upon hitting non-hero units.
patchHistory.detail: Guitarist is one of just a few mages in the game who are able to engage in melee combat. To these heroes, the ability to stay alive and in the fight is key. We hope to give our players more choices when it comes to mage heroes, and that by enhancing his Skill 2 recovery, he'll be able to take part in team fights more often without having to worry too much about taking some damage.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「高漸離放大招時，靠近越多敵人效果越好，因此我們提高了他的減傷效果，讓他存活的時間更長；同時提升射程以便他更容易獲得切入機會。」

patchHistoryZh.change: Enhanced Gao's mobility through new skills, making it easier for him to get close to the enemy and deal damage to them, with appropriate adjustments to his base stats and damage.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Compared to the typical mage, Gao's close-range combat style is relatively high-risk, but it comes with extremely high rewards. In this update, we have added more ways for Gao to quickly get up close and personal with the enemy so players have more room to play and experiment.

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced his Skill 2 base cooldown time, increased its recovery effect, and added a new effect: it will now also restore Health to him upon hitting non-hero units.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Guitarist is one of just a few mages in the game who are able to engage in melee combat. To these heroes, the ability to stay alive and in the fight is key. We hope to give our players more choices when it comes to mage heroes, and that by enhancing his Skill 2 recovery, he'll be able to take part in team fights more often without having to worry too much about taking some damage.

guide.overview: Gao is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.9% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Gao: For every 3 Basic Attacks or skills Gao uses, his Basic Attack is enhanced,dealing damage on hit.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Insatiable Tome, Boots of Resistance, Savant's Wrath, then complete Void Staff, Staves of Sorcery, Splendor. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Gao's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.

skillsZh.description: 增加自身移速，永久增加自身攻擊力，若處於砲台形態時施放會立即解除此形態。

skillsZh.name: 警戒地雷
skillsZh.description: 在指定區域布設陷阱，獲得觸碰的目標視野並造成傷害、減速和破甲效果，同時為自身提供護盾。

skillsZh.name: 重裝砲台
skillsZh.description:
黃忠位移一段距離並進入砲台形態，同時重置1技能。
期間不可移動，會增加物理防禦和法術防禦、提升射程，每次普攻會造成範圍傷害。
普攻到達一定次數後，就會解除此形態。

faqs.question: Is Huang Zhong good in current season?
faqs.answer: Huang Zhong is Tier B Marksman with 51.04% win rate, 0.45% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Huang Zhong build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mortal Punisher, Bloodweeper, Shadow Ripper, Frostscar's Embrace, Ravage - Phantom, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Huang Zhong?
faqs.answer: Pick Kaizer, Dun, Arthur. Strong into Xuance, Mai Shiranui, Jing.

faqsZh.question: 黃忠 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 黃忠 為 B 梯度，勝率 51.04%、選取 0.45%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 黃忠 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：制裁之刃、泣血之刃、影刃、冰痕之握、侵略・怒魂、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 黃忠？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Kaizer、Dun、Arthur。黃忠 克制 Xuance、Mai Shiranui、Jing。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Xuance, Mai Shiranui, Jing. Weak into: Kaizer, Dun, Arthur.

guide.overview: Huang Zhong is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.2% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Huang Zhong: Basic Attacks increase attack and Critical Rate.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, then complete Daybreaker's Virtue, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Huang Zhong's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Unleash Your Potential → Lay the Mines → Bring out the Artillery → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Bring out the Artillery (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Unleash Your Potential is your lane trade tool. Lay the Mines second. Bring out the Artillery whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Unleash Your Potential → Lay the Mines → Bring out the Artillery → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Huang Zhong sits at Tier B globally (51.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Huang Zhong vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Huang Zhong has +1.9% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Huang Zhong when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Huang Zhong vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Huang Zhong has +1.1% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Huang Zhong when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Huang Zhong excels into Xuance, Mai Shiranui, Jing. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.

name: Fatih

skills.name: Only the Strong
skills.description:
Whenever he uses a skill, gains an enhanced Basic Attack that unleashes sword energy. Enhanced Basic Attacks have higher Attack Speed and restore Health.
While using Sacred Tree Blessing, enhanced Basic Attacks unleash 1 additional blast of sword energy.

skills.name: The King's Blade
skills.description: Dashes forward to deal damage. The 3rd skill use also launches the enemy.

skills.name: The King's Return
skills.description:
Unleashes sword energy, dealing damage to enemies and slowing them. Recovers Health if he hits a hero.
While using Sacred Tree Blessing, he unleashes 1 additional blast of sword energy.

skills.name: Sacred Tree Blessing
skills.description:
Cleanses himself of all crowd control effects, deals physical damage to nearby enemies, and gains max Health.
While this skill is active, Skill 2 and enhanced Basic Attacks unleash sword energy. He also continuously gains enhanced Basic Attacks.
Tap again to end the skill.

skillsZh.name: 爭霸
skillsZh.description:
法提赫施放技能後獲得強化普攻，增加攻速並揮出遠程劍氣造成傷害和回復。
【聖樹祝福】期間，強化普攻額外揮出1道劍氣。

skillsZh.name: 王者之刃
skillsZh.description: 法提赫向前位移並造成傷害，第三次施放會額外造成擊飛效果。

skillsZh.name: 君臨城下
skillsZh.description:
法提赫斬出劍氣，對敵人造成傷害和減速，命中敵方會回復自身生命值。
【聖樹祝福】期間，額外揮出1道劍氣。

skillsZh.name: 聖樹祝福
skillsZh.description:
法提赫使用祝福之力解除自身控制效果，並對周圍造成物理傷害，同時提高自身最大生命值。
持續期間，【君臨城下】和強化普攻均可額外揮出劍氣，並持續獲得強化普攻次數。
再次點擊可以提前關閉技能。

guide.overview: Fatih is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.0% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Fatih: Enhance Recovery Whenever he uses a skill, gains an enhanced Basic Attack that unleashes sword energy.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Eternity Blade, then complete Master Sword, Shadow Ripper, Bloodweeper. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Sustain-oriented (mutation, Conflict, Red moon for stats that match Fatih's Warrior kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: The King's Blade → The King's Return → Sacred Tree Blessing → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Sacred Tree Blessing (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then The King's Blade, and Sacred Tree Blessing on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: The King's Blade → The King's Return → Sacred Tree Blessing → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Fatih sits at Tier B globally (52.0% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Fatih vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 0.6% more often globally. Choose Fatih when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Fatih vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Fatih has +1.8% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Fatih when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Fatih excels into Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.

name: Kaizer

skills.name: Demon Soul
skills.description: Basic Attacks and Skill 2 deal extra damage to single targets.

skills.name: Vortex Brand
skills.description:
Throws a ricocheting blade in the target direction, damaging and slowing enemies hit.
The blade returns on hit, recovering Health and granting Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

skills.name: Blade Tempest
skills.description:
Slashes twice, dealing damage. The second slash launches enemies and increases the damage of the next Basic Attack.
Gains increased Health and Mana recovery, and Movement Speed when out of combat.

skills.name: Invincible Warrior
skills.description: Becomes enhanced, gaining max Health, Physical Attack, and Movement Speed, while blocking incoming damage and dealing damage over time to nearby enemies.

skillsZh.name: 修羅之魂
skillsZh.description: 普攻和2技能攻擊單一目標時造成額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 迴旋之刃
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向投擲可彈射的刀刃，造成傷害和減速效果。
成功命中敵人後刀刃返回，回復自身生命值並增加攻擊速度和移動速度。

skillsZh.name: 極刃風暴
skillsZh.description:
揮砍兩次，造成傷害，第二次額外造成擊飛效果，並強化下次普攻傷害。
脫離戰鬥後，提升生命值和法力值回復，增加移動速度。

tipsZh: 鎧（對抗路）：梯度 S，勝率 51.02%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：貪婪之噬、宗師之力、魔女斗篷.

patchHistory.change: Increased skill recovery and skill effect

patchHistory.detail: Kaizer's damage absorption makes him a great frontline tank. We've increased his damage output so he can also work well with an attack preset.

patchHistory.change: Balanced the strength of different builds.
patchHistory.detail: "Currently, Kaizer's overall strength is too high, especially when he purchases a lot of defensive equipment, making it difficult for opponents to counter him. Therefore, we've slightly reduced his strength when using defensive builds while maintaining his power with offensive builds."

patchHistory.change: Enhanced the damage bonus ratio for Skills 1 and 2, and adjusted the damage and stat bonus ratios for his Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: As one of the first heroes in Honor of Kings, Kaizer may seem a little weak in comparison to the heroes that have joined since. We hope improving Kaizer's skill damage and stat bonuses will allow him, with the right equipment, to become a true fighter who balances damage output and sustain.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升技能回復和技能效果

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「鎧吸收傷害的能力讓他能夠承擔起前排的職責，本次我們提高了他的攻擊力加成，讓他在選擇攻擊套裝時也能有不錯的表現。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 平衡不同出裝下的強度
patchHistoryZh.detail: 目前鎧的整體強度偏高，尤其在購買較多防禦裝備時，對手難以與其抗衡，因此我們適度降低了鎧出防禦套裝的強度，同時確保他在攻擊出裝下的強度。

patchHistoryZh.change: Enhanced the damage bonus ratio for Skills 1 and 2, and adjusted the damage and stat bonus ratios for his Ultimate.
patchHistoryZh.detail: As one of the first heroes in Honor of Kings, Kaizer may seem a little weak in comparison to the heroes that have joined since. We hope improving Kaizer's skill damage and stat bonuses will allow him, with the right equipment, to become a true fighter who balances damage output and sustain.

faqs.question: Is Kaizer good in current season?
faqs.answer: Kaizer is Tier S Tank with 51.02% win rate, 1.68% pick rate, and 0.15% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Kaizer build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Rapacious Bite, Master Sword, Succubus Cloak, Spikemail, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Kaizer?
faqs.answer: Pick Donghuang, Kui, Sun Bin. Strong into Da Qiao, Diaochan, Daji.

faqsZh.question: 鎧 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 鎧 為 S 梯度，勝率 51.02%、選取 1.68%、禁用 0.15%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 鎧 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：貪婪之噬、宗師之力、魔女斗篷、反傷刺甲、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 鎧？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Donghuang、Kui、Sun Bin。鎧 克制 Da Qiao、Diaochan、Daji。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Da Qiao, Diaochan, Daji. Weak into: Donghuang, Kui, Sun Bin.

guide.overview: Kaizer is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 51.4% win rate and 1.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Kaizer: Basic Attacks and Skill 2 deal extra damage to single targets.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Blazing Cape, Boots of Resistance, Ominous Premonition, then complete Blood Rage, Sage's Sanctuary, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Kaizer's Tank kit. Take Flash & Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Vortex Brand → Blade Tempest → Invincible Warrior → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Invincible Warrior (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Vortex Brand, and Invincible Warrior on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Vortex Brand → Blade Tempest → Invincible Warrior → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Kaizer is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.6% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Kaizer.
comparisons: Kaizer vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 0.9% more often globally. Choose Kaizer when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.
Kaizer vs Arthur (Tank, Tier S): Arthur is 1.5% pick / 50.5% WR. Kaizer has +0.8% WR vs Arthur in Camp data. Choose Kaizer when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Arthur for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Kaizer excels into Da Qiao, Diaochan, Daji. Avoid blind picking into Donghuang, Kui, Sun Bin without team peel.

name: Yang Jian

skills.name: Mind Games
skills.description: Yang Jian's Basic Attack and skills can stack Resistance. After attaining max stacks, he gains crowd control immunity. If Yang Jian enters battle with a hero, he will enter the Heaven-Earth Form.

skills.name: Unleash the Hound
skills.description: Commands Heaven Hound to pounce in the target direction, marking the first enemy hit and damaging them. Upon using the skill again, he charges to the target and deals damage.

skills.name: Vain Disillusionment
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in front, stunning and slowing them. If he hits an enemy, he gains an enhanced Basic Attack that deals extra damage.

skills.name: Sight of Origin
skills.description: Unleashes beams of light that deal damage and restore his Health.

skillsZh.name: 神智侵蝕
skillsZh.description: 楊戩的普攻和技能可以疊加韌性，疊加到上限後獲得霸體，若與英雄進入戰鬥則變為法天象地狀態。

skillsZh.name: 逆轉乾坤
skillsZh.description: 楊戩命令嘯天犬衝鋒，對命中的敵人造成傷害並標記，再次施放楊戩將衝向目標造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 虛妄破滅
skillsZh.description: 楊戩暈眩前方敵人，造成傷害和減速，命中後強化普攻，額外造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 根源之目
skillsZh.description: 楊戩施放雷射，造成傷害並回復生命值。

tips: Yang Jian (Warrior): Tier B — 51.01% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Dragon's Rage, Rapacious Bite, Eye of the Phoenix.
tipsZh: 楊戩（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 51.01%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：怒龍劍盾、貪婪之噬、不死鳥之眼.

patchHistory.change: We've added a brand-new ability, the Heaven-Earth Form, enhancing Yang Jian's unique Resistance mechanic and visual appearance. We've also significantly optimized the hit mechanic for Heaven Hound, and added a new Heavenly Eye attack in the normal state, granting both recovery and true damage.
patchHistory.detail: We've added a brand-new ability, the Heaven-Earth Form, enhancing Yang Jian's unique Resistance mechanic and visual appearance. We've also significantly optimized the hit mechanic for Heaven Hound, and added a new Heavenly Eye attack in the normal state, granting both recovery and true damage.

patchHistory.change: Reduced cooldown for Skill 1 and Ultimate, and increased Ultimate's healing.
patchHistory.detail: Yang Jian often needs to dash into the enemy crowd. We've increased his Ultimate's recovery amount and frequency to help him sustain longer in combat.

patchHistory.change: We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
patchHistory.detail:
We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
Yang Jian is the perfect definition of what it means to be comprehensive. By adjusting his Ultimate's recovery effect and bonus, we have tried to make Yang Jian more consistent with his position as a fighter on the battlefield.

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整技能效果和冷卻時間
楊戩新增法天象地的全新能力，強化楊戩獨有的韌性機制與視覺感受。嘯天犬的命中機制也進行了大幅調整，楊戩更新增普通狀態下的天眼攻擊，使他能獲得回復並造成真傷。
patchHistoryZh.detail: 楊戩新增法天象地的全新能力，強化楊戩獨有的韌性機制與視覺感受。嘯天犬的命中機制也進行了大幅調整，楊戩更新增普通狀態下的天眼攻擊，使他能獲得回復並造成真傷。

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低1技能和3技能冷卻，增加3技能回血
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「楊戩的技能需要經常突進到敵群之中，我們提升他的大招回復量和頻率以便持續作戰。」

patchHistoryZh.change: We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
patchHistoryZh.detail:
We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
Yang Jian is the perfect definition of what it means to be comprehensive. By adjusting his Ultimate's recovery effect and bonus, we have tried to make Yang Jian more consistent with his position as a fighter on the battlefield.

faqs.question: Is Yang Jian good in current season?
faqs.answer: Yang Jian is Tier B Warrior with 51.01% win rate, 0.32% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Yang Jian build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Dragon's Rage, Rapacious Bite, Eye of the Phoenix, Blazing Cape, Blood Rage, Spikemail.

faqs.question: How to counter Yang Jian?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun. Strong into Diaochan, Luna, Dr Bian.

faqsZh.question: 楊戩 這版本適合上分嗎？

guide.overview: Yang Jian is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.6% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Yang Jian: Yang Jian's Resistance increases for each nearby enemy hero.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Immovable - Sky Dome, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Yang Jian's Warrior kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Unleash the Hound → Vain Disillusionment → Sight of Origin → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Sight of Origin (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Unleash the Hound, and Sight of Origin on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Unleash the Hound → Vain Disillusionment → Sight of Origin → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Yang Jian sits at Tier B globally (50.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Yang Jian vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 1.9% more often globally. Choose Yang Jian when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

Yang Jian vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Yang Jian has +0.5% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Yang Jian when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Yang Jian excels into Diaochan, Luna, Dr Bian. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.

name: Xiang Yu

skills.name: Resolute Will
skills.description:
When his Health drops to a certain level, he gains damage reduction.
Skill uses grant enhanced Basic Attacks.

skills.name: Righteous Fervor
skills.description: Dashes forward and knocks back the enemy. At the end of the dash, launches the enemy, deals damage, and gains an enhanced Basic Attack.

skills.name: No Retreat
skills.description: Slows nearby enemies and reduces their damage output while dealing damage. Gains an enhanced Basic Attack and increased Movement Speed.

skills.name: Hegemon's Slash
skills.description:
Gains crowd control immunity and Undying while using. Deals damage to enemies in the target direction, and deals extra damage to and stuns nearby enemies.
The lower his Health, the higher the damage.

skillsZh.name: 陷陣之志
skillsZh.description:
項羽生命值過低時獲得減傷。
項羽使用技能獲得強化普攻。

skillsZh.name: 無畏衝鋒
skillsZh.description: 項羽向前衝撞將敵人擊退，結束時上挑造成擊飛效果和傷害，並獲得強化普攻。

skillsZh.name: 破釜沉舟
skillsZh.description: 項羽使附近範圍內敵人減速，並弱化其輸出能力，同時造成傷害。自身獲得強化普攻和加速。

skillsZh.name: 霸王斬
skillsZh.description:
項羽施法期間獲得霸體和不屈效果，期間免疫死亡。對指定朝向的敵人造成傷害，對近處敵人造成額外傷害和暈眩。
項羽生命值越低傷害越高。

出裝：冰痕之握、血魔之怒、不死鳥之眼.

patchHistory.change: Enhanced Basic Attack and Ultimate Effect Upgrade
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
patchHistory.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.

patchHistoryZh.change: 強化普攻&大招效果升級
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

guide.hook: Xiang Yu: Gains damage immunity when Health falls below 30%.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Eye of the Phoenix, Blazing Cape, then complete Spikemail, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Xiang Yu's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Righteous Fervor → No Retreat → Hegemon's Slash → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.

comparisons: Xiang Yu vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 0.7% more often globally. Choose Xiang Yu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

name: Zhou Yu

skills.name: Blaze
skills.description: Damage from Basic Attacks and skills apply marks to enemy units and structures. At 4 stacks, targets are slowed and suffer damage over time.

skills.name: Wildfire
skills.description:
Invokes a wind domain in the target direction, slowing and knocking back enemies in range.
Nearby teammates gain Movement Speed, and his nearby fires will spread in the direction of the wind.

skills.name: Scorching Bolt
skills.description:
Creates a fire domain at the target location that deals burning damage to enemies within it.
Up to 6 fire domains can exist at a time.
Recovers Health over time while in a fire domain.
Can stock up to 3 charges of this skill.

skills.name: Flames of War
skills.description:
Deals damage to enemies in range.
If there's a fire domain in range, any enemies within it will be stunned and take extra damage.

skillsZh.name: 引燃
skillsZh.description: 普攻和每次技能造成傷害後，會對敵人和敵方建築疊加印記(最大四層)，滿層後，目標受到持續傷害和減速效果。

skillsZh.name: 東風浩蕩
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向召喚狂風區域，將自身周圍一定範圍內敵人向技能指定方向擊退，並造成減速效果。
周瑜附近所有友方英雄增加移動速度，使附近【流火之矢】的燃燒區域沿風向擴散。

skillsZh.name: 流火之矢
skillsZh.description:
在指定位置生成燃燒區域，對範圍內敵人造成燃燒傷害。
燃燒區域同一時間最多存在六個。
周瑜處於自身燃燒區域會持續回復生命值。
【流火之矢】最多可儲存三次。

skillsZh.name: 烽火赤壁
skillsZh.description:
對指定範圍內敵人造成傷害。
若範圍內存在燃燒區域，則對燃燒區域內的敵人造成額外傷害和暈眩效果。

tipsZh: 周瑜（中路）：梯度 B，勝率 50.97%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：夢魘之牙、痛苦面具、凝冰之息.

patchHistory.change: Increased base Movement Speed and Skill 1's late game cooldown.
patchHistory.detail: "Zhou Yu needs some preparation to fully ignite the battlefield. We've slightly increased his mobility to help him find the right positioning and angles. At the same time, we've slightly increased the late game cooldown of his Skill 1, giving opponents a fair chance to dodge it."

patchHistory.change: Increased Skill 2's damage over time and recovery and reduced late game stock time.
patchHistory.detail: "Zhou Yu's Skill 2 provides damage over time and recovery. We aim to strengthen this playstyle appropriately while adjusting the cooldown between early and late game to balance his power throughout the match."

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升基礎移速，增加1技能後期冷卻
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「周瑜需要提前準備才能讓戰場徹底燃燒，我們略微提高他的移動能力讓他能尋找更好的位置和角度；同時略微降低了1技能後期的冷卻，給對手一定躲避的空間。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升2技能的持續傷害和回復，降低後期的儲存時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 周瑜2技能提供他持續傷害和回復能力，我們希望適度強化此作戰風格，同時調整了前後期的冷卻時間以平衡前後期的強度

faqs.question: Is Zhou Yu good in current season?
faqs.answer: Zhou Yu is Tier B Mage with 50.97% win rate, 0.46% pick rate, and 0.01% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Zhou Yu build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Venomous Staff, Mask of Agony, Frozen Breath, Twilight Stream, Sage's Tome, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Zhou Yu?
faqs.answer: Pick Augran, Cao Cao, Dian Wei. Strong into Cirrus, Nakoruru, Xuance.

faqsZh.question: 周瑜 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 周瑜 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.97%、選取 0.46%、禁用 0.01%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 周瑜 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：夢魘之牙、痛苦面具、凝冰之息、日暮之流、賢者天書、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 周瑜？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Augran、Cao Cao、Dian Wei。周瑜 克制 Cirrus、Nakoruru、Xuance。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Nakoruru, Xuance. Weak into: Augran, Cao Cao, Dian Wei.

guide.overview: Zhou Yu is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.2% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Zhou Yu: Damage from Basic Attacks and skills apply marks to enemy units andstructures.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Mask of Agony, Boots of Tranquility, Frozen Breath, then complete Insatiable Tome, Augur's Word, Venomous Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Zhou Yu's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Wildfire → Scorching Bolt → Flames of War → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Flames of War (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Wildfire, and Flames of War on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Wildfire → Scorching Bolt → Flames of War → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Zhou Yu sits at Tier B globally (51.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Zhou Yu vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Zhou Yu has +0.1% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Zhou Yu when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Zhou Yu vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.7% more often globally. Choose Zhou Yu when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Zhou Yu excels into Cirrus, Nakoruru, Xuance. Avoid blind picking into Augran, Cao Cao, Dian Wei without team peel.

skills.description: Sends arrows surging forward, dealing damage. Using the skill again shoots all remaining arrows, damaging nearby enemies, inflicting them with Dread, and removing all Physical Attack bonuses granted by their equipment.

faqs.question: Is Shi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Shi is Tier A Mage with 50.95% win rate, 0.68% pick rate, and 0.32% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Shi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Savant's Wrath, Sage's Tome, Splendor, Insatiable Tome, Ardent Dominion, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Shi?
faqs.answer: Pick Athena. Strong into Li Bai, Wukong, Ukyo Tachibana.

faqsZh.question: 西施 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 西施 為 A 梯度，勝率 50.95%、選取 0.68%、禁用 0.32%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 西施 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：博學者之怒、賢者天書、輝月、噬神之書、熾熱支配、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 西施？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Athena。西施 克制 Li Bai、Wukong、Ukyo Tachibana。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Li Bai, Wukong, Ukyo Tachibana. Weak into: Athena.

guide.overview: Shi is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.7% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Shi: The farther away the enemy is, the more damage skills deal.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of the Arcane, Savant's Wrath, then complete Insatiable Tome, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Shi's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Silk Imprint → Silky Beauty → Sole Focus → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Sole Focus (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Silk Imprint, and Sole Focus on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Silk Imprint → Silky Beauty → Sole Focus → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Shi sits at Tier B globally (50.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Shi vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 0.3% more often globally. Choose Shi when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Shi vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 1.1% more often globally. Choose Shi when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Shi excels into Li Bai, Wukong, Ukyo Tachibana. Avoid blind picking into Athena, Li Xin, Kaizer without team peel.

faqs.question: Is Chicha good in current season?
faqs.answer: Chicha is Tier S Warrior with 50.9% win rate, 1.47% pick rate, and 0.29% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Chicha build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Dragon's Rage, Frostscar's Embrace, Cuirass of Savagery, Destiny, Deepfrost Siege, Demonsbane.

faqs.question: How to counter Chicha?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun. Strong into Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi.

faqsZh.question: 蚩奼 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 蚩奼 為 S 梯度，勝率 50.9%、選取 1.47%、禁用 0.29%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 蚩奼 出裝怎麼搭配？

faqsZh.answer: 可選 Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun。蚩奼 克制 Sakeer、Angela、Guiguzi。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi. Weak into: Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Sakeer、Angela、Guiguzi；被克制：Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun

guide.overview: Chicha is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.2% win rate and 1.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Chicha: Basic Attacks restore Health and switch her weapons and combat forms.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Iron Sword, Boots of Dexterity, Sparkforged Dagger, then complete Doomsday, Daybreaker's Virtue, Blood Rage. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Penetration for stats that match Chicha's Warrior kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Peak-Crushing Polearm → World-Splitting Spear → Return of the Armsmaster → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Return of the Armsmaster (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Peak-Crushing Polearm, and Return of the Armsmaster on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Peak-Crushing Polearm → World-Splitting Spear → Return of the Armsmaster → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Chicha is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.5% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Chicha.
comparisons: Chicha vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 2.4% more often globally. Choose Chicha when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Chicha vs Augran (Warrior, Tier S+): Augran is 1.2% pick / 46.9% WR. Chicha has +3.2% WR vs Augran in Camp data. Choose Chicha when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Augran for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Chicha excels into Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.

tipsZh: 娜可露露（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 50.87%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：抵抗之靴、強者破軍、冰痕之握.

patchHistory.change: Ultimate Effect & Enhanced Basic Attack Upgrade
patchHistory.detail: We've improved how Nakoruru and Mamahaha interact and battle together. Mamahaha can now help Nakoruru to fly over walls and provide a Movement Speed boost when Nakoruru leaves combat. Additionally, Nakoruru's enhanced Basic Attacks now stack, allowing you to deal more damage. We've also improved Nakoruru's endurance.

patchHistoryZh.change: 大招效果升級&強化普攻升級
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「我們強化了娜可露露與瑪瑪哈哈協同作戰的玩法體驗，瑪瑪哈哈新增可輔助娜可露露飛行越牆、脫戰加速的能力，並使強化普攻可疊加施放，多重打擊。另外，我們也針對娜可露露的續航能力進行最佳化。」

faqs.question: Is Nakoruru good in current season?
faqs.answer: Nakoruru is Tier B Assassin with 50.87% win rate, 0.54% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Nakoruru build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Resistance, Overlord's Might, Frostscar's Embrace, Starbreaker, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Nakoruru?
faqs.answer: Pick Diaochan, Fang, Garo. Strong into Wukong, Athena, Xiang Yu.

faqsZh.question: 娜可露露 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 娜可露露 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.87%、選取 0.54%、禁用 0.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 娜可露露 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：抵抗之靴、強者破軍、冰痕之握、碎星錘、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 娜可露露？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Diaochan、Fang、Garo。娜可露露 克制 Wukong、Athena、Xiang Yu。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Wukong, Athena, Xiang Yu. Weak into: Diaochan, Fang, Garo.
metaAnalysisZh: 娜可露露 勝率 50.87%（Camp HOK，2026-07-19）

guide.overview: Nakoruru is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 50.7% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Nakoruru: After hitting an enemy with a skill, the next Basic Attack is enhanced, dealing extra damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Frostscar's Embrace, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Nakoruru's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: AMUBE YATORO → RERA MUTSUBE → KAMUI MUTSUBE → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → KAMUI MUTSUBE (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: RERA MUTSUBE provides mobility or stick—max first. AMUBE YATORO second for damage. KAMUI MUTSUBE on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: AMUBE YATORO → RERA MUTSUBE → KAMUI MUTSUBE → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: KAMUI MUTSUBE after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Nakoruru is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick.
comparisons: Nakoruru vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Nakoruru has +0.9% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Nakoruru when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Nakoruru vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Musashi wins 0.0% more often globally. Choose Nakoruru when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Nakoruru excels into Wukong, Athena, Xiang Yu. Avoid blind picking into Diaochan, Fang, Garo without team peel.

name: Ming

skills.name: Good Omens
skills.description: Every 5s, Ming's next Basic Attack deals magical damage and heals himself and the linked teammate. The healing is reduced if the enemy is not a hero.

skills.name: Time - Carefree
skills.description:
Throws his instrument and links it to a teammate, increasing their main attack stat and Attack Speed.
Enemies who touch the link take damage over time.
Passive: Increases Ming's Physical Attack, Magical Attack, and Movement Speed.

skills.name: Mastery - Glide
skills.description:
Throws his instrument and links it to an enemy, reducing their Physical and Magical Defense.
Enemies who touch the link take damage over time.
Passive: Gains Physical and Magical Defense.

skills.name: Peace - Longevity
skills.description: Ming channels for a short time before sacrificing Health to deal true damage to the linked enemy or heal the linked teammate. If linked to both, he does not lose Health.

skillsZh.name: 大吉大利
skillsZh.description: 每過5秒，下次普攻造成較高法術傷害，並從敵人身上激發血球治療法器連接隊友和明世隱。若命中的敵人非英雄，則治療量較低。

skillsZh.name: 臨卦・無憂
skillsZh.description:
明世隱投擲法器連結隊友，增加其主攻屬性和攻速。
觸碰鍊子的敵人持續受到傷害。
被動：自身提升物理攻擊、法術攻擊和移速。

skillsZh.name: 師卦・飛翼
skillsZh.description:
明世隱投擲法器連結敵人，減少其物理防禦和法術防禦。
觸碰鍊子的敵人持續受到傷害。
被動：自身提升物理防禦和法術防禦。

skillsZh.name: 泰卦・長生
skillsZh.description:
明世隱短暫吟唱後，對法器連接的敵人造成真實傷害，對隊友造成回復效果。
如果法器連接了一個目標，明世隱消耗自身生命值對法器連接的敵人造成等量傷害，或對法器連接的隊友回復等量生命值。
如果法器連接了兩個目標，明世隱從敵人身上抽取生命注入隊友。

tips: Build: Crimson Shadow - Redemption, Frigid Charge, Savant's Wrath.
tipsZh: 明世隱（遊走）：梯度 B，勝率 50.86%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：極影・救贖、冰霜衝擊、博學者之怒.

patchHistory.detail: "Ming will often find himself standing in front of teammates drawing fire as he buffs them. As such, we've slightly increased the recovery he gets from his Passive to give him a bit more room to breathe in battle."

patchHistory.change: Reduced the early game bonus to teammates.
patchHistory.detail: "In the early game, Ming can boost his team's effectiveness when linking with allies, creating a whole that is greater than its parts and further magnifying any advantage gained. In order to alleviate this, we've slightly reduced the early game bonus he provides to allies."

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「明世隱在增強隊友的同時，往往還要在隊友身前吸引火力；我們略微提高了他被動的自身回復效果，讓他在戰鬥中更加從容。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低前期對隊友的屬性加成
patchHistoryZh.detail: 明世隱在前期連結隊友時能夠發揮1+1>2的效果，並進一步放大取得的優勢，因此我們適度削弱了前期對隊友的屬性加成效果。

faqs.question: Is Ming good in current season?
faqs.answer: Ming is Tier B Support with 50.86% win rate, 0.46% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Ming build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Crimson Shadow - Redemption, Frigid Charge, Savant's Wrath, Sage's Tome, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak.

faqs.question: How to counter Ming?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying. Strong into Cirrus, Menki, Wuyan.

faqsZh.question: 明世隱 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 明世隱 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.86%、選取 0.46%、禁用 0.03%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 明世隱 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：極影・救贖、冰霜衝擊、博學者之怒、賢者天書、不祥徵兆、魔女斗篷.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 明世隱？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Wukong、Musashi、Ying。明世隱 克制 Cirrus、Menki、Wuyan。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Menki, Wuyan. Weak into: Wukong, Musashi, Ying.

guide.overview: Ming is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 49.9% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Ming: Every 5s, Ming's next Basic Attack deals more magical damage and heals himself and the linked teammate.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Breakthrough Robe, Savant's Wrath, then complete Augur's Word, Succubus Cloak. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Ming's Support kit. Take Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Time - Carefree → Mastery - Glide → Peace - Longevity → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Peace - Longevity (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Time - Carefree, and Peace - Longevity on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Time - Carefree → Mastery - Glide → Peace - Longevity → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Ming sits at Tier B globally (49.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Ming vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Ming has +3.9% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Ming when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Ming vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Cai Yan wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Ming when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Ming excels into Cirrus, Menki, Wuyan. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.

name: Florentino

skills.name: Shuffle
skills.description: After leaving combat or touching a bouquet, enhances the next Basic Attack to include a dash and deal extra damage. If the attack hits a hero, recovers Health. He can dash again after the initial dash.

skills.name: Blossom
skills.description: Tosses a bouquet, damaging and stunning the first enemy hit, then scatters more bouquets. Touching a bouquet enhances his Basic Attack and refreshes the cooldown of Triple Threat.

skills.name: Triple Threat
skills.description: Attacks the target 3 times, dealing damage. Each hit deals extra true damage and reduces the cooldown of Blossom. He can dash after each hit.

skills.name: Gentlemen's Duel
skills.description: Dashes forward and marks the first target, increasing their damage taken, then scatters bouquets. While the skill is active, recovers twice as much Health and gains crowd control immunity. He can dash again after the initial dash.

skillsZh.name: 劍步
skillsZh.description: 弗洛倫脫戰或觸碰花束時，將強化下次普攻，附帶突進效果並額外造成傷害，若擊中英雄則獲得回復值，突進結束後可快速位移。

skillsZh.name: 落英
skillsZh.description: 弗洛倫投擲花束對首位敵人造成傷害和暈眩並散出花束，觸碰花束獲得強化普攻，並重置【拂花】冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 拂花
skillsZh.description: 弗洛倫攻擊目標三次，造成傷害，每段傷害額外附帶真實傷害，並減少【落英】冷卻時間，每次結束後可快速位移。

skillsZh.name: 獨秀
skillsZh.description: 弗洛倫朝指定方向突進並標記首位目標，提升其所受傷害並散出花束，技能持續期間回復效果加倍並獲得霸體，突進結束後可快速位移。

skills.description: Recovers Health when landing skill hits. Using any 3 skills enhances his next skill, and using the enhanced skill will enhance his next Basic Attack.

skills.description: Deals damage to nearby enemies.

skills.description:

patchHistory.change: Increased base Physical Defense and reduced the cooldown of Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail: Increased base Physical Defense and reduced the cooldown of Skill 2.

patchHistory.change: Increased base stats and Skill 1 damage
patchHistory.detail: While Yao's combat style relies on him being able to freely move in and out of battle, his current stats don't really enable him to do this well. So, we increased them to allow him greater freedom to enter and exit fights.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高基礎物理防禦，縮減二技能冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 提高基礎物理防禦，縮減二技能冷卻時間

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高基礎屬性和一技能傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 曜目前的屬性無法支撐他進退自如的戰鬥風格，因此我們提高他的屬性讓他更有信心切入和退場。

faqs.question: Is Yao good in current season?
faqs.answer: Yao is Tier B Assassin with 50.84% win rate, 0.52% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

metaAnalysis: Counters: Angela, Mi Yue, Ziya. Weak into: Hou Yi, Daji, Angela.

guide.overview: Yao is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.4% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Yao: Recovers Health when landing skill hits.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Spikemail, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Yao's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Starlight Slice → Starburn (Yao) → Return to Dust → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Return to Dust (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Starburn (Yao) provides mobility or stick—max first. Starlight Slice second for damage. Return to Dust on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Starlight Slice → Starburn (Yao) → Return to Dust → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Return to Dust after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Yao sits at Tier B globally (51.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Yao vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Yao has +1.7% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Yao when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Yao vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Yao has +0.7% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Yao when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Yao excels into Angela, Mi Yue, Ziya. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Daji, Angela without team peel.

name: Pei

skills.name: Blast
skills.description: In human form, Basic Attacks have increased range and deal extra magical damage while recovering Energy. Consecutive hits on the same target will stack damage.

skills.name: Striker Stance
skills.description:
Fires Inner Energy in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path and slowing them.
Recovers Energy upon hit.

skills.name: Guarding Stance
skills.description:
Gains a shield and Attack Speed.
Deals damage to enemies within range and continues to deal damage over time.

skills.name: Tiger Form
skills.description:
Switches to tiger form, gaining Movement Speed and enhancing the next 2 Basic Attacks.
The 1st Basic Attack lets him dash toward a locked-on target, damaging and slowing them.
The 2nd Basic Attack deals magical damage.

skillsZh.name: 寸勁
skillsZh.description: 人形態下普攻射程增加，額外造成魔法傷害並回復能量，連續命中同一目標傷害疊加。

skillsZh.name: 衝拳式
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向發射氣功，對沿途敵人造成傷害和減速效果。
命中回復自身能量。

skillsZh.name: 氣守式
skillsZh.description:
為自身提供護盾值，增加攻擊速度。
對自身周圍一定範圍內的敵人造成傷害，並在一段時間內繼續造成持續傷害。

skillsZh.name: 虎嘯風生
skillsZh.description:
切換至虎形態，增加移動速度並強化下兩次普攻。
第一次普攻向鎖定目標突進，造成傷害和減速效果。
第二次普攻造成魔法傷害。

tips: Build: Boots of Resistance, Rapacious Bite, Pure Sky.
tipsZh: 裴擒虎（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 50.84%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：抵抗之靴、貪婪之噬、純淨蒼穹.

patchHistory.detail: "Pei has to switch forms to maximize his skill effects, but while in his tiger form, he has much shorter range and needs to get very close to his enemies. We've increased the stats of his tiger form to give him a higher margin of error."

patchHistory.change: Nerfed some Human Form and Tiger Form skills.
patchHistory.detail:
Nerfed some Human Form and Tiger Form skills.
Pei has one of the highest win rates thanks to his high mobility and power in the jungle. Many other junglers find it hard to deal with early game incursions from Pei.We've reduced the power of some of his skills to close the gap between him and other heroes.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「裴擒虎需要切換形態才能發揮技能效果，但當他切換到虎形態的時候，需要與敵人近身作戰；我們適度地提高了他變成虎形態時的屬性，並提升他的容錯率。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 適當降低人形態和虎形態下部分技能的強度
patchHistoryZh.detail:
適當降低人形態和虎形態下部分技能的強度
目前版本中，裴擒虎憑藉在野區的高機動性和戰鬥力穩居勝率榜前列，很多其他野區英雄前期遇到裴擒虎時毫無還手之力。我們適當降低了裴擒虎部分技能的效果，希望可以適當縮小其他英雄和裴擒虎之間的差距。

faqs.question: Is Pei good in current season?
faqs.answer: Pei is Tier B Assassin with 50.84% win rate, 0.24% pick rate, and 0.07% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Pei build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Resistance, Rapacious Bite, Pure Sky, Doomsday, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Pei?
faqs.answer: Pick Gan & Mo, Meng Ya, Milady. Strong into Arthur, Lu Bu, Wuyan.

faqsZh.question: 裴擒虎 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 裴擒虎 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.84%、選取 0.24%、禁用 0.07%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 裴擒虎 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：抵抗之靴、貪婪之噬、純淨蒼穹、末世、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 裴擒虎？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Gan & Mo、Meng Ya、Milady。裴擒虎 克制 Arthur、Lu Bu、Wuyan。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Arthur, Lu Bu, Wuyan. Weak into: Gan & Mo, Meng Ya, Milady.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Arthur、Lu Bu、Wuyan；被克制：Gan & Mo、Meng Ya、Milady

guide.overview: Pei is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.7% win rate and 0.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Pei: In human form, Basic Attacks have increased range and deal extra magical damage while recovering Energy.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Master Sword, Doomsday. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Conflict for stats that match Pei's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Striker Stance → Guarding Stance → Tiger Form → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Tiger Form (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Guarding Stance provides mobility or stick—max first. Striker Stance second for damage. Tiger Form on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Striker Stance → Guarding Stance → Tiger Form → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Tiger Form after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Pei sits at Tier B globally (52.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Pei vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Pei has +2.9% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Pei when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Pei vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Pei has +2.0% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Pei when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Pei excels into Arthur, Lu Bu, Wuyan. Avoid blind picking into Gan & Mo, Meng Ya, Milady without team peel.

name: Erin

skills.name: Elf Dance
skills.description:
Her Basic Attack grants Energy. At max Energy, she speeds up, gains a stack of Laurel, and enhances her next Basic Attack.
The speed-up increases with her Magical Attack.
Her Pierce and Lifesteal stats are linked, using whichever is higher.

skills.name: Dance - Leaf Greeting
skills.description:
Shoots a leaf to deal damage and gain marks. The leaf then forms a circle, damaging and slowing enemies.
Magical Attack reduces the skill's cooldown.

skills.name: Twirl - Forest Whisper
skills.description: Recovers full Energy and gains marks, immunity to slow, and Attack Speed.

skills.name: Waltz - Laurel Bloom
skills.description: This skill is unlocked when Erin gains enough Laurels. She consumes Laurels to deal damage and gain Movement Speed, while reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.

skillsZh.name: 精靈舞步
skillsZh.description:
艾琳普攻造成傷害並獲得能量，能量充盈後可獲得加速效果和一層月桂印記並強化下一次普攻。
艾琳的法術攻擊越高，加速效果提高的移動速度越快。
艾琳的穿透/吸血為全能穿透/吸血，取物理穿透/吸血和法術穿透/吸血的較大者。

skillsZh.name: 葉舞・致意
skillsZh.description:
艾琳射出葉子造成傷害並獲得印記，葉子隨後展開成環，對目標造成傷害和減速效果。
法強可以減少冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 旋舞・輕語
skillsZh.description: 艾琳回滿能量並獲得印記，免疫減速並強化自身攻速。

skillsZh.name: 月桂之舞・盛放
skillsZh.description: 艾琳印記層數達標後解鎖此技能，施放技能消耗印記造成傷害並加速自身，同時減少2技能冷卻。

patchHistory.change: Increased Skill 1's damage and Physical Defense.
patchHistory.detail: During the 'I'm a dev for HoK!' event in Honor of Kings Camp, there were many calls to buff Erin, so we have increased her viability in the early game.
Erin can explore both physical and magic equipment. We're improving her base stats to ensure she remains strong under different playstyles.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升1技能傷害和物理防禦
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「在HOK CAMP的活動『我在HOK當企劃活動中』加強艾琳的呼聲很高，因此本次我們提升了她前期的對抗能力。」
「艾琳可以探索物理或法術出裝，我們提高她的基礎屬性，希望保證她在不同流派下的基礎強度。」

faqs.question: Is Erin good in current season?
faqs.answer: Erin is Tier S Marksman with 50.77% win rate, 1.79% pick rate, and 0.16% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Erin build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of the Arcane, Insatiable Tome, Twilight Stream, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff, Sage's Tome.

faqs.question: How to counter Erin?
faqs.answer: Pick Dun. Strong into Ying, Han Xin, Lam.

faqsZh.question: 艾琳 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 艾琳 為 S 梯度，勝率 50.77%、選取 1.79%、禁用 0.16%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 艾琳 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：祕法之靴、噬神之書、日暮之流、博學者之怒、虛無法杖、賢者天書.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 艾琳？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Dun。艾琳 克制 Ying、Han Xin、Lam。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Ying, Han Xin, Lam. Weak into: Dun.

guide.overview: Erin is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 51.5% win rate and 1.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Erin: Her Basic Attack grants Energy.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Golden Blade, Boots of the Arcane, Savant's Wrath, then complete Staves of Sorcery, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Erin's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Dance - Leaf Greeting → Twirl - Forest Whisper → Waltz - Laurel Bloom → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Waltz - Laurel Bloom (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Dance - Leaf Greeting is your lane trade tool. Twirl - Forest Whisper second. Waltz - Laurel Bloom whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Dance - Leaf Greeting → Twirl - Forest Whisper → Waltz - Laurel Bloom → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Erin is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.5% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Erin.
comparisons: Erin vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Erin has +2.2% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Erin when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Erin vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Erin has +1.5% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Erin when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Erin excels into Ying, Han Xin, Lam. Avoid blind picking into Dun without team peel.

skills.name: Reaper's Revenge
skills.description: Gains Energy when dealing or taking damage, increasing his Movement Speed and enhancing his recovery effects.

skills.name: Blood Echo
skills.description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies and recovers Health. Charging up will boost the skill's effects.
Passive: When taking damage, there is a chance to automatically trigger Skill 1.

skills.name: Deathscythe
skills.description: Summons scythes in the target direction, pulling back enemies within range while inflicting damage and slow.

skills.name: Lay Waste
skills.description:
Leaps to the target location and taunts enemies while dealing damage and enhancing his recovery effects.
Taunt duration increases with max Health.

skillsZh.name: 反擊之鐮
skillsZh.description: 白起造成或受到傷害時增加能量，獲得加速並強化回復效果。

skillsZh.name: 血之迴響
skillsZh.description:
白起對周圍造成傷害並回復生命值，蓄力可以提升技能效果。
被動：受到傷害有機率自動施放1技能。

skillsZh.name: 死神之鐮
skillsZh.description: 白起在指定方向召喚鐮刀，拉回範圍內的敵人，造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 傲慢嘲諷
skillsZh.description:
白起躍向指定位置嘲諷敵人，造成傷害並強化自身提升回復效果。
增加生命值可以提升嘲諷持續時間。

guide.overview: Bai Qi is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.9% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Bai Qi: Enhance Speed Up Gains Energy when dealing or taking damage, increasing his Movement Speed and enhancing his recovery effects.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Deftness, Blazing Cape, Cuirass of Savagery, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail, Spikemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Bai Qi's Tank kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Blood Echo → Deathscythe → Lay Waste → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Lay Waste (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Blood Echo, and Lay Waste on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Blood Echo → Deathscythe → Lay Waste → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Bai Qi sits at Tier B globally (51.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Bai Qi vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Bai Qi has +0.5% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Bai Qi when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Bai Qi vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Bai Qi when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Bai Qi excels into Arke, Garo. Avoid blind picking into Zhuangzi, Ying Zheng without team peel.

name: Chano

skills.name: Hunting
skills.description: Whenever he moves through brush, gains Movement Speed and enhances his next Basic Attack to a double shot that deals extra damage. Leaps when emerging from brush.

skills.name: Soaring Signal
skills.description: Leaps into the air, gaining Movement Speed and allowing him to traverse terrain. While airborne, his Basic Attack fires a powerful arrow, dealing physical damage and knocking back enemies.

skills.name: Lupine Trap
skills.description: Throws a wolf spirit trap at a target location. When triggered, it deals physical damage and summons a wolf spirit to attack the enemy.

skills.name: Leader Stance
skills.description: Summons wolf spirits and gains the ability to shoot while moving. Also boosts Physical Attack, Movement Speed, and Attack Speed for 8s.

skillsZh.name: 追獵
skillsZh.description: 蒼穿越草叢獲得加速，離開草叢時觸發跳躍指令，下一次普攻強化為二連射，額外造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 翔躍為號
skillsZh.description: 蒼躍至空中，可以穿越地形並獲得加速。在空中進行普攻，射出強力一箭，造成物理傷害並擊退敵人。

skillsZh.name: 狼魂陷阱
skillsZh.description: 蒼向指定位置投擲狼魂陷阱，敵人踩中後受到物理傷害，同時自身召喚一隻狼魂對觸發者進行攻擊。

skillsZh.name: 領袖姿態
skillsZh.description: 蒼召喚狼魂，同時自身獲得騎射能力，增加攻擊力、移速和攻速，持續8秒。

faqsZh.answer: 可選 Ziya、Mai Shiranui。蒼 克制 Liu Bei、Shouyue。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Liu Bei, Shouyue. Weak into: Ziya, Mai Shiranui.

guide.overview: Chano is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.5% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Chano: Whenever he moves through brush, gains Movement Speed and enhances his next Basic Attack to a double shot that deals extra damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, Shadow Ripper, then complete Bloodweeper, Daybreaker's Virtue, Master Sword. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Chano's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Soaring Signal → Lupine Trap → Leader Stance → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Leader Stance (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Soaring Signal is your lane trade tool. Lupine Trap second. Leader Stance whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Soaring Signal → Lupine Trap → Leader Stance → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Chano sits at Tier B globally (50.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Chano vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Chano has +1.2% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Chano when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Chano vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Chano has +0.5% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Chano when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Chano excels into Liu Bei, Shouyue. Avoid blind picking into Ziya, Mai Shiranui without team peel.

name: Ziya

skills.name: Sanctification
skills.description:
After hitting a target, gains EXP if it is defeated within 4s.
Upon reaching level , gains Sanctify and increases his level cap to .
Sanctify: Increases a teammate's level cap, with a chance to earn EXP. When playing as support, grants additional Sanctification effects.

skills.name: Divine Seal
skills.description: Seals enemies within range, dealing magical damage while reducing their Movement Speed, Physical and Magical Defense for 3.5s. If the skill hits any enemy, he gains a Movement Speed boost.

skills.name: Divine Punishment
skills.description: Conjures a magic circle that deals 3 strikes of damage to enemies in the target area. After a short delay, the magic circle explodes, dealing extra magical damage and launching enemies for 0.8s.

skills.name: Universal Law
skills.description:
Unleashes 3 shockwaves that deal magical damage.
At level 15, the Ultimate's charging speed increases by 10%, and Ziya can move while charging.

skillsZh.name: 封神
skillsZh.description:
姜子牙對目標造成傷害後目標在4秒內死亡，則為自己提供經驗光球。
姜子牙到達級時會獲得【賜封神力】，並突破等級上限至級。
使用【賜封神力】選定一位隊友封神，並使其也突破等級上限，並且有機率獲得經驗光球。若姜子牙在本局為輔助，還會根據該隊友的職業提供額外封神效果。

skillsZh.name: 神力封印
skillsZh.description: 姜子牙使用封神法杖對範圍內的敵人進行神力封印，持續造成法術傷害、減速，並降低目標物理和法術防禦，持續3.5秒。技能命中後為自己提供移速加成。

skillsZh.name: 打神之罰
skillsZh.description: 姜子牙對妄為者施以神罰，施放法陣對範圍內敵人造成3次傷害，短暫延遲後法陣爆炸，再造成法術傷害和0.8秒擊飛。

skillsZh.name: 天人法則
skillsZh.description:
姜子牙朝指定方向聚集天地力量，向前方發射三道衝擊波造成法術傷害。
姜子牙到達15級後，【天人法則】蓄力速度增加10%，並有機率可以進入天人形態移動施放衝擊波。
