faqs.question: Is Ziya good in current season?
faqs.answer: Ziya is Tier A Mage with 50.71% win rate, 0.74% pick rate, and 0.07% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Ziya build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Insatiable Tome, Frozen Breath, Savant's Wrath, Mask of Agony, Splendor, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Ziya?
faqs.answer: Pick Biron, Charlotte, Yao. Strong into Diaochan, Ying, Zilong.

faqsZh.question: 姜子牙 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 姜子牙 為 A 梯度，勝率 50.71%、選取 0.74%、禁用 0.07%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 姜子牙 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：噬神之書、凝冰之息、博學者之怒、痛苦面具、輝月、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 姜子牙？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Biron、Charlotte、Yao。姜子牙 克制 Diaochan、Ying、Zilong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Ying, Zilong. Weak into: Biron, Charlotte, Yao.

guide.overview: Ziya is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.3% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Ziya: When Ziya deals damage to a target and they are defeated within 4s, he gains EXP.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Mask of Agony, Boots of the Arcane, Scepter of Reverberation, then complete Savant's Wrath, Insatiable Tome, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Saint for stats that match Ziya's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Divine Seal → Divine Punishment → Universal Law → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Universal Law (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Divine Seal, and Universal Law on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Divine Seal → Divine Punishment → Universal Law → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Ziya is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.3% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Ziya.
comparisons: Ziya vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Ziya has +0.3% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Ziya when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Ziya vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.5% more often globally. Choose Ziya when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Ziya excels into Diaochan, Ying, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Biron, Charlotte, Yao without team peel.

name: Mulan

skills.name: Great Wall Guardian
skills.description:
Gains Movement Speed when using dual swords.
Skills and Basic Attacks apply marks to enemies. At 5 stacks, the marks detonate, dealing damage and inflicting silence and slow on the enemy.

skills.name: Snaking Strike
skills.description:
Dashes twice in the target direction, with the ability to change the direction of the 2nd dash.
Deals damage to enemies in her path.
If the skill hits an enemy, it can be used again before it enters cooldown.

skills.name: Dagger Waltz
skills.description:
Throws a sword in the target direction that slows and deals damage to enemies within range when it reaches its max range.
If Mulan touches the sword, she retrieves it, reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.

skills.name: Blooming Blade
skills.description:
Deals damage to enemies within range, gaining damage reduction during this time.
Enhances herself, gaining Physical Attack for a period of time.
Switches to heavy sword form.

skillsZh.name: 長城巡守者
skillsZh.description:
使用雙劍時增加移動速度。
技能和普攻對敵人施加標記，5層後標記消失，並對敵人造成傷害、沉默和減速效果。

skillsZh.name: 空裂斬
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向進行兩段突進，可控制第二段突進方向。
對沿途敵人造成傷害。
命中敵人後，可在技能進入冷卻前再次使用。

skillsZh.name: 旋舞之華
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向投擲輕劍，達到最遠距離會對範圍內敵人造成傷害和減速效果。
花木蘭到達輕劍位置會收起輕劍並減少2技能冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 綻放刀鋒
skillsZh.description:
對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害，期間獲得傷害減免。
強化自身，強化期間增加物理攻擊。
切換為重劍形態。

patchHistory.change: Increased damage reduction while wielding the heavy sword and the damage of Skill 1 when wielding both heavy and dual swords.
patchHistory.detail: We made Mulan tankier while wielding her heavy sword and increased her overall damage output. Hopefully she will now perform better in team fights

Mulan's two stances give her mobility, burst damage, crowd control, and damage reduction. She can be used in many different lineups to attack many different opponents.In the current version, when Mulan gains the advantage, she becomes very difficult to counter.We hope that by reducing her base Health, we can give her less room for mistakes.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the damage dealt by her Skill 2 when she is using a heavy sword, and reduced the damage dealt by her Ultimate when she is using either weapon.
patchHistory.detail:
Reduced the damage dealt by her Skill 2 when she is using a heavy sword, and reduced the damage dealt by her Ultimate when she is using either weapon.
Although the Resistance gained from the Boots of Resistance was previously lowered by only 5%, this change allowed many players to have Mulan unleash complete skill combos against enemies. Since very few heroes are capable of withstanding such an assault, we have lowered the damage dealt from her Skill 2 when using a heavy sword and her Ultimate, in order to balance out the buff granted by the Boots of Resistance.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the damage of Skill 1 when using dual swords or heavy sword.
patchHistory.detail: Mulan's skill mechanics grant her mobility, crowd control immunity, burst damage, and crowd control. Different skill combinations let her face different opponents and adapt to evolving situations on the battlefield. Heroes like Mulan have enormous potential, and skilled players can do incredible things with them. We want Mulan players to have more of a challenge before taking over matches, rather than easily suppressing rivals with relatively simple and fixed tactics early on.

patchHistoryZh.change: 增加重劍形態的免傷效果，同時提升1技能在輕劍和重劍形態的傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「提升花木蘭重劍的坦度和整體輸出能力，希望她在團戰中有更好的表現。」
花木蘭的兩個形態使得她同時擁有機動性，爆發傷害，控制能力以及傷害減免能力，她可以適配很多陣容，應對很多對手。在當前版本中，花木蘭一旦獲取優勢就會變得難以反制。我們希望通過降低花木蘭的生命，來降低她的容錯性。

patchHistoryZh.change: 削弱重劍形態下的2技能，削弱2種形態下大招的傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail:
削弱重劍形態下的2技能，削弱2種形態下大招的傷害
雖然之前抵抗之靴的韌性僅調低了5%，但這樣的調整卻足以讓花木蘭完整地對敵人打出連招，由於很少有英雄能徹底扛住那段連招的傷害，我們希望適度降低花木蘭重劍形態下2技能的揮砍及大招傷害，藉此平衡因抵抗之靴調整而受益的花木蘭。

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced the damage of Skill 1 when using dual swords or heavy sword.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Mulan's skill mechanics grant her mobility, crowd control immunity, burst damage, and crowd control. Different skill combinations let her face different opponents and adapt to evolving situations on the battlefield. Heroes like Mulan have enormous potential, and skilled players can do incredible things with them. We want Mulan players to have more of a challenge before taking over matches, rather than easily suppressing rivals with relatively simple and fixed tactics early on.

faqs.question: Is Mulan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Mulan is Tier B Assassin with 50.71% win rate, 0.34% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Mulan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Cuirass of Savagery, Pure Sky, Demonsbane, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Starbreaker.

faqs.question: How to counter Mulan?
faqs.answer: Pick Diaochan, Heino, Hou Yi. Strong into Liang, Mi Yue, Nuwa.

faqsZh.question: 花木蘭 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 花木蘭 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.71%、選取 0.34%、禁用 0.03%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 花木蘭 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暴烈之甲、純淨蒼穹、破魔刀、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、碎星錘.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 花木蘭？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Diaochan、Heino、Hou Yi。花木蘭 克制 Liang、Mi Yue、Nuwa。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Liang, Mi Yue, Nuwa. Weak into: Diaochan, Heino, Hou Yi.

guide.overview: Mulan is a Medium Assassin (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.1% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Mulan: Gains Movement Speed when using dual swords.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Cuirass of Savagery, then complete Starbreaker, Pure Sky, Succubus Cloak. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Mulan's Assassin kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Snaking Strike → Dagger Waltz → Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Dagger Waltz provides mobility or stick—max first. Snaking Strike second for damage. Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Snaking Strike → Dagger Waltz → Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Mulan sits at Tier B globally (51.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Mulan vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Mulan has +1.4% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Mulan when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Mulan vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Mulan has +0.4% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Mulan when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Mulan excels into Liang, Mi Yue, Nuwa. Avoid blind picking into Diaochan, Heino, Hou Yi without team peel.

tips: Lady Zhen (Mage): Tier A — 50.62% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Insatiable Tome, Mask of Agony, Splendor.
tipsZh: 甄姬（中路）：梯度 A，勝率 50.62%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：噬神之書、痛苦面具、輝月.

patchHistory.change: Increased Skill 2's bounces, reduced Skill 1 CD
patchHistory.detail: Lady Zhen's bounce attacks perform well during small team fights in the early to mid game. To better pace her power level and make it last until the late game, we've changed the number of bounces her Skill 2 has. We've also reduced the cooldown of her Skill 1 to give her more opportunities to freeze enemies and protect herself in the early game.

patchHistory.change: Reduced mid to late game damage and lowered the slow effect of Ultimate during the early and mid game.
patchHistory.detail: Lady Zhen has strong area crowd control and continuous poking capabilities. Her Skill 1 also enhances survivability. We are slightly reducing her damage output and crowd control to allow other heroes to better compete against her.

patchHistory.change: Slightly improved laning in the early game, but weakened poking in the late game.
patchHistory.detail: Lady Zhen is a mage with exceptional damage and crowd control. In the current version of the game, she is clearly a bit too powerful. We hope to reduce Lady Zhen's domination in the mid to late game and, while lowering her damage and poke ability in the late game, adequately supplement her lane clearing in the early game.

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整2技能彈射次數，降低1技能冷卻
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「甄姬的彈射在前中期小規模團戰中有不錯的表現，我們調整了2技能的彈射次數，略微延緩她發威的時間，並保證她在後期能維持好表現；同時我們降低1技能前期的冷卻時間，讓她有更多嘗試冰凍敵人以及自保的機會。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低中後期傷害，降低大招前中期的減速效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「甄姬擁有強大的團控能力和持續消耗能力，同時1技能也可以提升生存能力，我們些微削弱了輸出和控制，使其他英雄能夠與她抗衡。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 略微增強前期清線能力，削弱後期消耗能力
patchHistoryZh.detail: 甄姬是一名傷害能力和控制能力都非常出色的法師，在目前版本的遊戲中，她顯得有些過於強大了。我們希望降低甄姬在遊戲中後期的統治地位，削弱她後期傷害和消耗能力，同時適度補充她前期的清線能力。

faqs.question: Is Lady Zhen good in current season?
faqs.answer: Lady Zhen is Tier A Mage with 50.62% win rate, 0.95% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Lady Zhen build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Insatiable Tome, Mask of Agony, Splendor, Void Staff, Sage's Sanctuary, Ardent Dominion.

faqs.question: How to counter Lady Zhen?
faqs.answer: Pick Charlotte, Liu Bei, Luna. Strong into Cirrus, Nakoruru, Sima Yi.

faqsZh.question: 甄姬 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 甄姬 為 A 梯度，勝率 50.62%、選取 0.95%、禁用 0.03%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 甄姬 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：噬神之書、痛苦面具、輝月、虛無法杖、賢者的庇護、熾熱支配.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 甄姬？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Charlotte、Liu Bei、Luna。甄姬 克制 Cirrus、Nakoruru、Sima Yi。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Nakoruru, Sima Yi. Weak into: Charlotte, Liu Bei, Luna.

guide.overview: Lady Zhen is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.4% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Lady Zhen: Places marks on enemies when hitting them with skills, for up to 3 stacks.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Mask of Agony, Boots of Tranquility, Twilight Stream, then complete Augur's Word, Frozen Breath, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Lady Zhen's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Ocean of Tears → Flowing Sigh → Destructive Deluge → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Destructive Deluge (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Ocean of Tears, and Destructive Deluge on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Ocean of Tears → Flowing Sigh → Destructive Deluge → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Lady Zhen is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Lady Zhen.
comparisons: Lady Zhen vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Lady Zhen has +0.3% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Lady Zhen when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Lady Zhen vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Lady Zhen when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Lady Zhen excels into Cirrus, Nakoruru, Sima Yi. Avoid blind picking into Charlotte, Liu Bei, Luna without team peel.

name: Allain

skills.name: Howling Blade
skills.description: Basic Attacks and skills grant Fury, which increases his Physical Pierce and Magical Pierce and grants damage reduction. At max Fury, he recovers Health, and the lower his Health, the more he recovers.

skills.name: Meteor Kill
skills.description: Based on how many stacks of mark he has, deals multi-phase damage in the target direction and launches enemies. He gains marks by hitting enemies with Basic Attacks and his Ultimate.

skills.name: Moonlight Flash
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, damaging and slowing enemies. He gains Movement Speed and his next 3 Basic Attacks gain increased Attack Speed.

skills.name: Death at Sunset
skills.description: Leaps toward the targeted enemy hero and becomes untargetable. After a short delay, he lands and deals area damage. For every enemy hero hit, he gains marks and Fury. He also gains a shield based on the number of enemies hit.

skillsZh.name: 劍嘯
skillsZh.description: 亞連可以使用快速雙劍普攻，任意技能普攻命中敵人後，疊加怒氣並提升物理、法術穿透和免傷，疊加一定層數後回復自身生命值，血量愈少，回復愈多。

skillsZh.name: 流星斬
skillsZh.description: 亞連基於印記層數，朝指定方向造成多段傷害並擊飛目標(印記層數可透過普攻和3技能命中獲得)。

skillsZh.name: 逐月閃
skillsZh.description: 亞連朝指定方向位移，造成傷害並減速敵人。並使得亞連獲得移速，下3次普攻獲得額外攻速。

skillsZh.name: 落日斬
skillsZh.description: 亞連跳向目標英雄單位，期間無法鎖定為目標，短暫延遲後下落造成範圍傷害。每命中一個敵方英雄，亞連都會獲得印記層數和怒氣，根據命中敵人的人數獲得護盾。

patchHistory.change: Increased Basic Attack interval and reduced Ultimate's shield effect.
patchHistory.detail: Allain's continuous Basic Attack and counterattack capabilities with his Ultimate have made him a strong contender in both the Clash Lane and team fights. We are slightly nerfing him to allow other heroes to better compete against him.

patchHistoryZh.change: 增加普攻間隔，並降低大招的護盾效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「亞連持續普攻和透過大招的殘血反打能力，讓他經常能在對抗路和團戰中取得不錯的表現，我們略微削弱他，使其他英雄能夠與他抗衡。」

faqs.question: Is Allain good in current season?
faqs.answer: Allain is Tier B Warrior with 50.48% win rate, 0.69% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Allain build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Blood Rage, Dragon's Rage, Succubus Cloak, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Ravage - Phantom.

faqs.question: How to counter Allain?
faqs.answer: Pick Sima Yi, Marco Polo. Strong into Lu Bu, Zhuangzi.

faqsZh.question: 亞連 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 亞連 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.48%、選取 0.69%、禁用 0.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 亞連 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：血魔之怒、怒龍劍盾、魔女斗篷、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、侵略・怒魂.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 亞連？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Sima Yi、Marco Polo。亞連 克制 Lu Bu、Zhuangzi。

tips: Cai Yan (Support): Tier S — 50.44% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Savant's Wrath, Crimson Shadow - Redemption, Boots of Resistance.
tipsZh: 蔡文姬（遊走）：梯度 S，勝率 50.44%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：博學者之怒、極影・救贖、抵抗之靴.

patchHistory.change: Increased the recovery from Cai Yan's Skill 1 and Ultimate, and increased the defense provided by the Ultimate during late-game.
patchHistory.detail: Cai Yan provides great sustain and protection for her teammates as long as she can afford equipment, but she becomes less useful when her team is falling behind. To alleviate this, we increased her recovery effects and the defense provided by her Ultimate, so that she can be effective even before she has a lot of equipment.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升蔡文姬1技能和大招的恢復效果，進一步提升大招在後期所提供的防禦屬性
patchHistoryZh.detail: 蔡文姬在獲取裝備優勢後可以為團隊提供不錯的持續作戰能力和保護能力，但是在某些處境不那麼樂觀的對局就很難發揮她應有的作用。我們提升了蔡文姬的恢復效果和大招提供的防禦屬性，確保她可以在尚未獲得大量裝備情況下也能發揮應有的作用。

faqs.question: Is Cai Yan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Cai Yan is Tier S Support with 50.44% win rate, 1.16% pick rate, and 1.45% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Cai Yan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Savant's Wrath, Crimson Shadow - Redemption, Boots of Resistance, Holy Grail, Augur's Word, Sage's Tome.

faqs.question: How to counter Cai Yan?
faqs.answer: Pick Gao Changgong, Mulan. Strong into Diaochan, Arke.

faqsZh.question: 蔡文姬 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 蔡文姬 為 S 梯度，勝率 50.44%、選取 1.16%、禁用 1.45%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 蔡文姬 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：博學者之怒、極影・救贖、抵抗之靴、聖杯、時之預言、賢者天書.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 蔡文姬？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Gao Changgong、Mulan。蔡文姬 克制 Diaochan、Arke。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Arke. Weak into: Gao Changgong, Mulan.

guide.overview: Cai Yan is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.3% win rate and 1.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Cai Yan: Periodic Passive Effect: Restores Health and gains a Movement Speedbonus when taking damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Augur's Word, then complete Venomous Staff, Splendor. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Cai Yan's Support kit. Take Smite & Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Healing Hymn → Earworm → Tune of Tranquility → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Tune of Tranquility (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Healing Hymn, and Tune of Tranquility on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Healing Hymn → Earworm → Tune of Tranquility → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Cai Yan is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.9% — expect Cai Yan to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Cai Yan vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Cai Yan has +4.3% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Cai Yan when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Cai Yan vs Yaria (Support, Tier S): Yaria is 1.1% pick / 48.0% WR. Cai Yan has +2.3% WR vs Yaria in Camp data. Choose Cai Yan when you need Roaming identity; choose Yaria for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Cai Yan excels into Diaochan, Arke. Avoid blind picking into Gao Changgong, Mulan without team peel.

name: Liang

skills.name: Power Word - Trance
skills.description: Every second hit on the same target within a short time will deal an extra strike of damage.

skills.name: Power Word - Barrier
skills.description:
Summons 4 barriers that shatter when touched by an enemy, inflicting damage, stun, and slow.
Damage and slowing effects are reduced for enemies that touch multiple barriers.

skills.name: Power Word - Fate
skills.description:
Conjures a magic circle that deals damage to enemies within range while granting vision of the area.
Liang gains Movement Speed while inside his magic circle.

skills.name: Power Word - Control
skills.description: Suppresses an enemy hero, dealing damage over time. When the suppression is complete, deals damage and stuns enemies in range.

敵人重複接觸到屏障受到較少傷害和減速效果。

召喚法陣，對法陣範圍內敵人造成傷害並獲得區域內的視野。

skillsZh.description: 壓制目標敵方英雄，期間造成持續傷害，完整施放壓制後對目標範圍內敵人造成傷害和暈眩效果。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Han Xin, Lam, Mulan. Weak into: Li Xin, Mayene, Mulan.

guide.overview: Liang is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 51.5% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Liang: Every second hit on the same target within a short time will deal an extra strike of damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Scepter of Reverberation, Mask of Agony, then complete Savant's Wrath, Splendor, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Liang's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Power Word - Barrier → Power Word - Fate → Power Word - Control → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Power Word - Control (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Power Word - Barrier, and Power Word - Control on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Power Word - Barrier → Power Word - Fate → Power Word - Control → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Liang is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 5.0% — expect Liang to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Liang vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Liang has +0.4% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Liang when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Liang vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Liang when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Liang excels into Han Xin, Lam, Mulan. Avoid blind picking into Li Xin, Mayene, Mulan without team peel.

name: Shouyue

skills.name: Accuracy
skills.description: When out of combat, gains marks that increase his Physical Pierce and Basic Attack damage. Hitting enemy heroes with Basic Attacks or skills will consume marks. When his Attack Speed reaches certain thresholds, he gains marks faster.

skills.name: The Tranquil Eye
skills.description:
Places a device that grants vision.
Passive: When out of combat and near natural terrain or a scouting device, he disguises himself, gaining Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

skills.name: Wild Wind
skills.description: Snipes in the target direction, damaging and slowing targets. This skill will be enhanced when his Attack Speed reaches certain thresholds.

skills.name: Getaway
skills.description:
Leaps backward and fires in the target direction, dealing damage and slowing the target hit while gaining increased Movement Speed. Bullets stocked are shared with Skill 2.
Passive: Increases Basic Attack range.

skillsZh.name: 瞄準
skillsZh.description: 百里守約無攻擊行為後，每秒會疊層提升自身物理穿透和普攻傷害，普攻和技能命中英雄會消耗層數。攻速達到特定數值後，無攻擊行為所需時間降低。

skillsZh.name: 靜謐之眼
skillsZh.description:
百里守約布置一個可持續探測視野的裝置。
被動：非戰鬥狀態下，靠近牆體或處於靜謐之眼範圍可獲得隱匿狀態，增加移速和攻速。

skillsZh.name: 狂風之息
skillsZh.description: 百里守約向指定方向狙擊，命中目標後造成傷害和減速。攻速達到特定數值時，2技能獲得強化。

skillsZh.name: 逃脫
skillsZh.description:
百里守約向後位移並朝指定方向射擊，對命中目標造成傷害和減速，自身獲得加速，與狂風之息共用子彈數量。
被動：普攻射程提升。

tipsZh: 百里守約（發育路）：梯度 A，勝率 50.37%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：影刃、仁者破曉、逐日之弓.

patchHistory.detail: "Previously, players using Shouyue had a hard time choosing between sniping from a distance and using Basic Attacks at a closer range. Now, we've upgraded his skills to give our players more equipment options. At the same time, with the same set of equipment, players can now mix long-range sniping with Basic Attacks more effectively."

patchHistory.change: Raised the bonus multiplier for his Basic Attack while his Passive skill is active.
patchHistory.detail:
Raised the bonus multiplier for his Basic Attack while his Passive skill is active.
Shouyue is a very unique marksman. When using him in combat, players must choose between ranged harassment or damage over time. Currently, the damage dealt by his Basic Attack is not quite high enough. We hope that by increasing the bonus multiplier for his Basic Attack when his Passive skill is active, he will be able to deal more consistent damage while his Skill 2 is in cooldown.

patchHistory.change: Added a Basic Attack bonus, linked the Ultimate to Skill 2, and adjusted unique displays.
patchHistory.detail: We hope the adjusted Shouyue will have more options to choose from during battle. He can either deal stable damage with his Basic Attacks, or spend bullets to deal high ranged damage or dash out of harm's way. We believe experienced Shouyue players will make the right choice.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提供不同出裝和打法風格
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「過去的百里守約很難在遠程狙擊和近距離普攻之間做出抉擇，本次我們升級了他的技能，希望他能夠有更多出裝選擇；同時，在同一套出裝下，能夠讓遠程狙擊和普攻之間產生更多搭配。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高被動技能中普通攻擊的加成係數
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提高被動技能中普通攻擊的加成係數
百里守約是一名戰鬥風格獨特的射手英雄，操控者需在遠程消耗與持續傷害中適當取捨，目前版本百里守約普通攻擊的傷害略顯不足。我們希望強化百里守約被動技能中的普通攻擊加成係數，確保他能在2技能空檔中更穩定地輸出。

patchHistoryZh.change: Added a Basic Attack bonus, linked the Ultimate to Skill 2, and adjusted unique displays.
patchHistoryZh.detail: We hope the adjusted Shouyue will have more options to choose from during battle. He can either deal stable damage with his Basic Attacks, or spend bullets to deal high ranged damage or dash out of harm's way. We believe experienced Shouyue players will make the right choice.

faqs.question: Is Shouyue good in current season?
faqs.answer: Shouyue is Tier A Assassin with 50.37% win rate, 0.84% pick rate, and 0.09% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Shouyue build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Shadow Ripper, Daybreaker's Virtue, Sunchaser, Doomsday, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Shouyue?
faqs.answer: Pick Liu Bang. Strong into Diaochan, Nakoruru, Ying.

faqsZh.question: 百里守約 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 百里守約 為 A 梯度，勝率 50.37%、選取 0.84%、禁用 0.09%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 百里守約 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：影刃、仁者破曉、逐日之弓、末世、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 百里守約？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Liu Bang。百里守約 克制 Diaochan、Nakoruru、Ying。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Nakoruru, Ying. Weak into: Liu Bang.

guide.overview: Shouyue is a Medium Assassin (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.5% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Shouyue: Basic Attacks deal extra damage, and Critical Rate is converted into Physical Attack.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Starbreaker, Boots of Dexterity, Pure Sky, then complete Bloodweeper, Master Sword. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Shouyue's Assassin kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: The Tranquil Eye → Wild Wind → Getaway → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Getaway (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Wild Wind provides mobility or stick—max first. The Tranquil Eye second for damage. Getaway on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: The Tranquil Eye → Wild Wind → Getaway → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Getaway after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Shouyue is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick.
comparisons: Shouyue vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Shouyue has +1.8% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Shouyue when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

Shouyue vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Shouyue has +0.8% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Shouyue when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Shouyue excels into Diaochan, Nakoruru, Ying. Avoid blind picking into Liu Bang, Chano without team peel.

name: Musashi

skills.name: Niten Ichiryuu
skills.description:
Using skills generates Vigor, which is consumed by Basic Attacks to gain enhancement effects. Hitting an enemy reduces the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2.
1 Vigor: Enhances Basic Attack damage.
2 Vigor: Dashes and slows enemies.

skills.name: Illuminating Slash
skills.description:
Unleashes sword energy in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path and knocking down projectiles.
Gains crowd control immunity when using the skill.

skills.name: Extreme Speed
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage and gaining a shield upon hitting an enemy.

skills.name: Duel to the Death
skills.description: Dashes to the target, launching and damaging enemies within range. Also delays the target's recovery effects.

skillsZh.name: 二天一流
skillsZh.description:
技能獲得能量，普攻會消耗能量獲得強化效果，命中後減少1、2技能冷卻時間。
能量最多兩層：
一層，強化攻擊；
二層，額外的突進和減速效果。

skillsZh.name: 空明斬
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向斬出劍氣，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害並擊落飛行物。
施放時處於霸體狀態。

skillsZh.name: 神速
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向突進，命中敵人時造成傷害並獲得護盾。

skillsZh.name: 一決生死
skillsZh.description: 朝目標突進，對目標範圍造成擊飛效果和傷害，並延遲目標的恢復效果。

patchHistory.change: Balanced Stats to Suit Different Equipment
patchHistory.detail: "We've made adjustments to Musashi's skill stat bonuses to balance the effectiveness of various equipment builds."

patchHistory.change: Increased cooldown reduction from enemy hit with Skill 2
patchHistory.detail:
Increased cooldown reduction from enemy hit with Skill 2.
Given the fast pace of the current version, we've been working hard to ensure that more heroes can participate effectively in early game. By moderately enhancing Musashi's Skill 2, we hope to improve his mobility and damage tolerance in combat while not over-boosting his character at the same time.We hope this will lead to players using Musashi more often in matches.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「調整宮本武藏技能的屬性加成，平衡不同套裝下的強度。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升2技能命中敵人後返還的冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「目前版本的節奏很快，我們也一直致力於讓更多的英雄可以在對戰早期就參與到戰鬥中，我們希望透過適度強化宮本武藏的2技能，略微提升他在戰鬥中的機動性和傷害承受能力。確保不會把他調整得太強，同時讓他能獲得更多出場機會。」

faqs.question: Is Musashi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Musashi is Tier A Assassin with 50.27% win rate, 1.01% pick rate, and 0.16% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Musashi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Bloodweeper, Pure Sky, Dragon's Rage, Blood Rage, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Musashi?
faqs.answer: Pick Dyadia, Sun Bin. Strong into Diaochan, Luna, Shangguan.

faqsZh.question: 宮本武藏 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 宮本武藏 為 A 梯度，勝率 50.27%、選取 1.01%、禁用 0.16%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 宮本武藏 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：泣血之刃、純淨蒼穹、怒龍劍盾、血魔之怒、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 宮本武藏？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Dyadia、Sun Bin。宮本武藏 克制 Diaochan、Luna、Shangguan。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Luna, Shangguan. Weak into: Dyadia, Sun Bin.
metaAnalysisZh: 宮本武藏 勝率 50.27%（Camp HOK，2026-07-19）

guide.overview: Musashi is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 50.7% win rate and 1.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Dual-blade jungler who stacks Vigor with skills, then cashes it in on enhanced basic attacks for burst, slow, and kill pressure.
guide.bestBuild: Jungle: Rapacious Bite → Boots of Resistance → Axe of Torment → Frostscar's Embrace → Succubus Cloak → Cuirass of Savagery. Skill 2 max first for gank tempo.
guide.arcanaSpells: Mutation arcana for assassin burst on Vigor autos. Smite standard; Purify vs heavy CC.
guide.combo: Gank: Extreme Speed → AA (2× Vigor) → Illuminating Slash → Duel to the Death → chase.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Ultimate (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Extreme Speed is your gap-close, shield, and trade tool—max it first for safer ganks. Illuminating Slash second for range, wave clear, and projectile block. Take Ultimate whenever available.

combos.name: Lv4 river gank
combos.steps: Skill 2 (dash) → AA with 2× Vigor → Skill 1 → Ultimate → chase with autos
combos.when: Enemy flash down; crash wave with laner first

combos.name: Carry delete
combos.steps: Skill 1 (line) → Skill 2 → AA (Vigor slow) → Ultimate → AA resets
combos.when: After ally CC; target has no cleanse

combos.name: Disengage
combos.steps: Skill 1 (block projectiles) → Skill 2 out → jungle camp for Vigor
combos.when: Dive failed or Dyadia/Sun Bin peel arrives

itemNotes.why: Rapacious Bite — jungle core; camp stacks boost PATK for faster clears and duels.
Boots of Resistance — CC reduction keeps you casting through peel attempts.
Axe of Torment — anti-squishy spike once Smite levels are online.
Frostscar's Embrace — slows on enhanced autos stick to fleeing carries.
Succubus Cloak — magic shield vs burst mages during dive windows.
Cuirass of Savagery — late bruiser item to survive focus after assassination.

arcanaRows.effect: Assassin scaling for Vigor-enhanced basic attacks and burst windows.
Standard jungle clear; swap Purify vs heavy hard-CC drafts.

guide.laning: Full clear to level four with Vigor management—never gank at half health. Secure Tyrant when bot/mid has crash wave; prioritize the lane without Flash.
guide.teamfight: Wait for hard CC, then Duel to the Death the carry. Use Illuminating Slash to block key projectiles before diving. Exit with Skill 2 if anti-heal does not secure the kill.
guide.highRank: Musashi is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.1% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Musashi.
comparisons: Musashi vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Musashi has +1.0% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Musashi when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Musashi vs Ying (Assassin, Tier A): Ying is 1.0% pick / 52.4% WR. Ying wins 1.6% more often globally. Choose Musashi when you need Jungling identity; choose Ying for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Musashi excels into Diaochan, Luna, Shangguan. Avoid blind picking into Dyadia, Sun Bin without team peel.

name: Wukong

skills.name: The Great Sage
skills.description: Using skills enhances the next Basic Attack to a dash strike that deals extra damage. He has a higher base Critical Rate but lower base Critical Damage than other heroes.

skills.name: Protective Shroud
skills.description:
Gains Movement Speed and blocks the next enemy skill's damage and effects.
Upon a successful block, grants temporary damage and skill invulnerability along with a shield.

skills.name: Furious Advance
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction. If he dashes into an enemy, he'll dash again and gain Movement Speed. The dash deals damage to monsters, and grievous damage to monsters at low Health.

skills.name: Golden Cudgel
skills.description: Launches enemies within range, damaging and placing 3 marks on them. Enemies lose 1 mark and take extra damage when hit by his Basic Attack.

skillsZh.name: 大聖神威
skillsZh.description: 使用技能後強化下次普攻，獲得突進效果並造成額外傷害，孫悟空的初始暴擊率增加，暴擊傷害減少。

skillsZh.name: 護身咒法
skillsZh.description:
提升移動速度，抵擋下一次敵方英雄技能傷害和效果。
抵擋成功後，獲得傷害和技能免疫以及護盾值一段時間。

skillsZh.name: 鬥戰衝鋒
skillsZh.description: 孫悟空朝指定方向位移，在路徑上碰到單位會再次位移並加速。位移途中會對野怪造成傷害並斬殺低生命野怪。

skillsZh.name: 如意金箍
skillsZh.description: 擊飛對自身周圍一定範圍內的敵人，造成傷害並附帶三層標記，孫悟空每次普攻都會消耗一層標記並造成額外傷害。

tips: Build: Boots of Fortitude, Overlord's Might, Rapacious Bite.
tipsZh: 孫悟空（打野）：梯度 S，勝率 50.27%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：影忍之足、強者破軍、貪婪之噬.

patchHistory.change: Reduced Ultimate cooldown and increased passive base damage.
patchHistory.detail: "Wukong has been underperforming lately. His enhanced Basic Attack, being his primary damage source, relies heavily on completing his equipment. We're increasing the Growth of his enhanced Basic Attack, so he can still pose a threat even when behind."

patchHistory.change: Ultimate damage and Skill 1 shield are increased, improving play from the beginning.
patchHistory.detail: Wukong is currently too weak, so we strengthened the shield of his Skill 1, giving him a stronger response when successfully blocking skills. Since his Ultimate is an important part of his skill combos, we also hope to adequately improve his early-game stats to ensure his playability from the start.

patchHistory.change: Raised the power of his Passive skill and Skill 2 during early game, and reduced his bonus multiplier during late game.
patchHistory.detail:
Raised the power of his Passive skill and Skill 2 during early game, and reduced his bonus multiplier during late game.
Wukong is a highly mobile hero, but he requires certain equipment to make up for his Power. As such, it is difficult to use him in combat during early game. Consequently, there are few chances for players to adapt to Wukong's fighting style in the current version of the game. We hope that the adjustments we've implemented will help improve the character's combat capabilities during early game, while also not making him too overpowered during late game.

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低大招冷卻，提升被動的基礎傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「孫悟空已經沉寂一段時間了，強化普攻作為其最主要的輸出來源，非常依賴裝備的成型；因此我們適當提高了強化普攻的成長，讓他即使在逆風時也能向對手構成一定程度的威脅。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升大招傷害和1技能護盾，確保基礎體驗
patchHistoryZh.detail: 孫悟空目前強度偏低，我們提升1技能的護盾讓他在成功抵擋技能時有更強的回饋感；同時大招作為連招重要組成部分，我們希望適當提高前期數值，確保他的基礎體驗。

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高被動技能和2技能前期的強度，並適當降低其後期加成係數
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提高被動技能和2技能前期的強度，並適當降低其後期加成係數
孫悟空是一名機動性很強的英雄，但他需要一定的裝備才能補足戰鬥力，這讓他遊戲前期很難在戰鬥中有所發揮。這種情況使孫悟空難以適應目前版本的戰鬥節奏，我們希望透過調整數值來提升孫悟空的前期作戰能力，並確保其後期不會過於強大。

faqs.question: Is Wukong good in current season?
faqs.answer: Wukong is Tier S Assassin with 50.27% win rate, 1.62% pick rate, and 0.34% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Wukong build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Fortitude, Overlord's Might, Rapacious Bite, Bloodweeper, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Wukong?
faqs.answer: Pick Agudo, Gao, Heino. Strong into Dun, Lian Po, Xiang Yu.

faqsZh.question: 孫悟空 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 孫悟空 為 S 梯度，勝率 50.27%、選取 1.62%、禁用 0.34%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 孫悟空 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：影忍之足、強者破軍、貪婪之噬、泣血之刃、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 孫悟空？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Agudo、Gao、Heino。孫悟空 克制 Dun、Lian Po、Xiang Yu。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Dun, Lian Po, Xiang Yu. Weak into: Agudo, Gao, Heino.

guide.overview: Wukong is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 49.7% win rate and 1.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Wukong: Using skills enhances the next Basic Attack to a dash strike that deals extra damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, then complete Shadow Ripper, Bloodweeper, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Dominator for stats that match Wukong's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Protective Shroud → Furious Advance → Golden Cudgel → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Golden Cudgel (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Furious Advance provides mobility or stick—max first. Protective Shroud second for damage. Golden Cudgel on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Protective Shroud → Furious Advance → Golden Cudgel → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Golden Cudgel after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Wukong is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.3% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Wukong.
comparisons: Wukong vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Musashi wins 1.0% more often globally. Choose Wukong when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.
Wukong vs Ying (Assassin, Tier A): Ying is 1.0% pick / 52.4% WR. Ying wins 2.6% more often globally. Choose Wukong when you need Jungling identity; choose Ying for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Wukong excels into Dun, Lian Po, Xiang Yu. Avoid blind picking into Agudo, Gao, Heino without team peel.

name: Cirrus

skills.name: Through the Clouds
skills.description: Ignores terrain after reaching level 4 and gains Movement Speed when using Basic Attacks. Enemies hit by his Basic Attacks or skills take damage when they move.

skills.name: Cloud Descending
skills.description: Charges up, gaining Movement Speed. Then dashes forward, damaging and stunning enemies. Can jump back if he hits a hero.

skills.name: Razor Wind
skills.description: Throws wind blades that slow and deal damage to enemies 2 times. Then gains Attack Speed and ranged Basic Attacks.

skills.name: Soaring Whirlwind
skills.description: Carries an enemy hero into the air, then strikes the ground, dealing area damage and launching the enemy he carried.

skillsZh.name: 雲神・展翼
skillsZh.description: 雲中君4級後可永久無視地形飛行，普攻可以累積氣息，氣息可為雲中君提供移速加成，普攻和技能命中會疊加撕裂效果，造成位移傷害。

skillsZh.name: 聊翱遊兮
skillsZh.description: 雲中君蓄力加速向前俯衝，結束時對目標造成暈眩和傷害，命中首位英雄後，自身可後跳一段距離。

skillsZh.name: 颯風飛羽
skillsZh.description: 雲中君用翅膀揮擊風刃，造成2次傷害和減速，之後雲中君可以遠程普攻並攻速提升。

skillsZh.name: 猋遠舉兮雲中
skillsZh.description: 雲中君加速捲起一位敵人飛入高空，落下後造成範圍傷害，並對被捲起的敵人造成擊飛。

tipsZh: 雲中君（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 50.21%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：影忍之足、貪婪之噬、暗影戰斧.

patchHistory.detail: "Damage over time is an important element of how Cirrus deals damage. He has to lead with repeated hits. We've reduced his skill cooldowns to increase his overall damage frequency."

patchHistory.change: We've reworked both passive and active skills, retaining Cirrus' original design and gameplay as much as possible while making his skill set more suitable for the current game environment.
patchHistory.detail:
We've reworked both passive and active skills, retaining Cirrus' original design and gameplay as much as possible while making his skill set more suitable for the current game environment.
As one of the first heroes to be released, the frequency with which Cirrus showed up in matches and his performance caught our attention.We want this hero, with his unique mechanics, to continue to provide more lineup choices and make things fun for Honor of Kings players.To this end, we have redesigned his skill set. The new Cirrus is easier to use than before, and has greater capacity for mastery, allowing more players to spread their wings and fly with this hero in Hero's Gorge.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「作為雲中君的重要輸出手段，持續傷害效果需要前置的連續命中，我們降低了他的技能冷卻時間，提升他整體的輸出頻率。」

patchHistoryZh.change: We've reworked both passive and active skills, retaining Cirrus' original design and gameplay as much as possible while making his skill set more suitable for the current game environment.
patchHistoryZh.detail:
We've reworked both passive and active skills, retaining Cirrus' original design and gameplay as much as possible while making his skill set more suitable for the current game environment.
As one of the first heroes to be released, the frequency with which Cirrus showed up in matches and his performance caught our attention.We want this hero, with his unique mechanics, to continue to provide more lineup choices and make things fun for Honor of Kings players.To this end, we have redesigned his skill set. The new Cirrus is easier to use than before, and has greater capacity for mastery, allowing more players to spread their wings and fly with this hero in Hero's Gorge.

faqs.question: Is Cirrus good in current season?
faqs.answer: Cirrus is Tier B Assassin with 50.21% win rate, 0.18% pick rate, and 0.01% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Cirrus build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Fortitude, Rapacious Bite, Axe of Torment, Mortal Punisher, Overlord's Might, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Cirrus?
faqs.answer: Pick Di Renjie, Mulan. Strong into Hou Yi, Xiao Qiao.

faqsZh.question: 雲中君 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 雲中君 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.21%、選取 0.18%、禁用 0.01%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 雲中君 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：影忍之足、貪婪之噬、暗影戰斧、制裁之刃、強者破軍、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 雲中君？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Di Renjie、Mulan。雲中君 克制 Hou Yi、Xiao Qiao。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Hou Yi, Xiao Qiao. Weak into: Di Renjie, Mulan.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Hou Yi、Xiao Qiao；被克制：Di Renjie、Mulan

guide.overview: Cirrus is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.2% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Cirrus: lgnores terrain after reaching level 4 and gains Movement Speed when usingBasic Attacks.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Dexterity, Axe of Torment, then complete Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Cirrus's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Cloud Descending → Razor Wind → Soaring Whirlwind → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Soaring Whirlwind (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Razor Wind provides mobility or stick—max first. Cloud Descending second for damage. Soaring Whirlwind on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Cloud Descending → Razor Wind → Soaring Whirlwind → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Soaring Whirlwind after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Cirrus sits at Tier B globally (52.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Cirrus vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Cirrus has +2.5% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Cirrus when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Cirrus vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Cirrus has +1.5% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Cirrus when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Cirrus excels into Hou Yi, Xiao Qiao. Avoid blind picking into Di Renjie, Mulan without team peel.

patchHistory.change: Increased Health recovery and skill damage

patchHistory.detail: Buffed base Physical Defense.

patchHistory.change: Reduced Skill 1 cooldown, adjusted damage structure.
patchHistory.detail: "Arthur's mobility and the silence effect on his Skill 1 are crucial for his playstyle. The initial cooldown of this skill has been a bit too long, so we're reducing it to give Arthur more flexibility in skill upgrades."

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升生命值回復和技能傷害

patchHistoryZh.detail: 增强基础物理防御

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低1技能冷卻，調整傷害結構
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「1技能加速效果關乎亞瑟的機動性，沉默效果也能夠對敵人形成一定的限制；目前1技能的初始冷卻時間有點太長了，因此我們適當降低前期的冷卻時間，讓亞瑟在技能升級的選擇上有更多靈活性。」

guide.overview: Arthur is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.5% win rate and 1.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Arthur: Invokes the protection of the divine light to recover Health continuously.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, then complete Glacial Buckler, Eye of the Phoenix, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Arthur's Tank kit. Take Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Valiant Charge → Whirling Strike → Might of Excalibur → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Might of Excalibur (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Valiant Charge, and Might of Excalibur on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Valiant Charge → Whirling Strike → Might of Excalibur → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Arthur is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.5% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Arthur.
comparisons: Arthur vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 0.8% more often globally. Choose Arthur when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Arthur vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 1.7% more often globally. Choose Arthur when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Arthur excels into Han Xin, Arke. Avoid blind picking into Xiang Yu, Lady Sun without team peel.

tips: Build: Runeblade, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff.
tipsZh: 諸葛亮（中路）：梯度 S，勝率 50.07%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：符文大劍、博學者之怒、虛無法杖.

patchHistory.change: Balanced the effects of different presets.
patchHistory.detail: Previously, we tried reducing Skill 2's cooldown time. Multiple dashes made Kongming hard to counter if his team was winning, but Skill 2 would lack damage output if his team was at a disadvantage. Hence, we've changed the number of stocks Skill 1 and Skill 2 can hold to make Kongming more consistent in various situations and lanes.

patchHistory.change: Increased damage from Skill 1 and reduced Skill 2 charge time.
patchHistory.detail: "Increasing Kongming's damage while reducing his dash skill's charge time to make him more flexible."

patchHistoryZh.change: 平衡不同場景和路線的強度
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「上一次調整我們降低了2技能的冷卻時間，多次的位移使得諸葛亮在獲得優勢之後很難對抗，但如果逆風則很難依賴2技能造成傷害，因此我們調整了1技能和2技能的儲存數量，平衡不同場景和不同路線下的表現。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升1技能傷害，降低2技能儲存時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「提升諸葛亮的傷害，同時降低位移技能的儲存時間，使其更加靈活。」

faqs.question: Is Kongming good in current season?
faqs.answer: Kongming is Tier S Mage with 50.07% win rate, 1.31% pick rate, and 0.18% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Kongming build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Runeblade, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff, Sage's Tome, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Kongming?
faqs.answer: Pick Allain, Biron, Wuyan. Strong into Han Xin, Jing, Ukyo Tachibana.

faqsZh.question: 諸葛亮 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 諸葛亮 為 S 梯度，勝率 50.07%、選取 1.31%、禁用 0.18%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 諸葛亮 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：符文大劍、博學者之怒、虛無法杖、賢者天書、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 諸葛亮？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Allain、Biron、Wuyan。諸葛亮 克制 Han Xin、Jing、Ukyo Tachibana。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Han Xin, Jing, Ukyo Tachibana. Weak into: Allain, Biron, Wuyan.

guide.overview: Kongming is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 49.2% win rate and 1.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Kongming: Active skill hits on enemies grant 1 stack.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Savant's Wrath, Insatiable Tome, then complete Void Staff, Enigma - Moon Goddess. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Kongming's Mage kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Arcane Assault → Time Shift → Winning Strategy → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Winning Strategy (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Arcane Assault, and Winning Strategy on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Arcane Assault → Time Shift → Winning Strategy → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Kongming is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.4% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Kongming.
comparisons: Kongming vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 1.8% more often globally. Choose Kongming when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Kongming vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 2.6% more often globally. Choose Kongming when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Kongming excels into Han Xin, Jing, Ukyo Tachibana. Avoid blind picking into Allain, Biron, Wuyan without team peel.

name: Fang

skills.name: Going Undercover
skills.description: Periodically reveals enemy heroes within range. Deals extra physical damage against monsters and minions.

skills.name: Target Sighted
skills.description:
Marks the target enemy while increasing his own Attack Speed and Attack Range.
Attacking the marked target adds stacks, increasing the marks' damage.
Upon reaching max stacks or when the marks expire, the marks explode, dealing area damage.

skills.name: Wheel Away
skills.description:
Dashes in the target direction, slowing and dealing damage to enemies in his path. He is untargetable while dashing.
Scorches the ground in his path, slowing and dealing damage to enemies within range.

skills.name: Bladestorm
skills.description: Throws his blade to the target location, dealing damage over time and slowing enemies within range.

skillsZh.name: 密探諦聽
skillsZh.description: 定時隨機暴露自身周圍一定範圍內的敵方英雄視野。攻擊野怪和小兵會造成額外的物理傷害。

skillsZh.name: 諜影重重
skillsZh.description:
標記目標敵人，增加自身攻擊速度和射程。
攻擊被標記目標會疊加層數，增加標記傷害。
標記持續時間結束或層數疊滿時，會爆炸造成範圍傷害。

skillsZh.name: 刃遁
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向突進，期間無法鎖定為目標，且會對沿途敵人造成傷害和減速。
並燃燒途徑地面，對範圍內敵人造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 無間刃風
skillsZh.description: 向指定位置扔出飛輪，對範圍內敵人造成持續傷害和減速效果。

tips: Build: Axe of Torment, Rapacious Bite, Bloodweeper.
tipsZh: 李元芳（發育路）：梯度 A，勝率 50.03%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暗影戰斧、貪婪之噬、泣血之刃.

patchHistory.change: Passive's extra damage now applies to minions
patchHistory.detail: "As he is a marksman, we want his passive to also apply to minions to increase his farming speed, rather than only being effective when he's jungling."

patchHistory.change: We've moderately reduced Fang's strength in the early game, while enhancing his power once he reaches higher levels and has sufficient equipment support.
patchHistory.detail:
We've moderately reduced Fang's strength in the early game, while enhancing his power once he reaches higher levels and has sufficient equipment support.
The current game environment emphasizes laning strength in the early game. Fang's skill mechanics and stats mean that he overly suppresses other heroes in the same position during the early game.We have thus made appropriate adjustments to his strength in the early and late game, to ensure that players can make more diverse hero choices in the current version.

patchHistoryZh.change: 被動的額外傷害會對小兵生效
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「作為射手，我們希望他的被動也能對小兵生效，以提升他的發育速度，而不是僅僅當他身處打野位置上才生效。」

patchHistoryZh.change: We've moderately reduced Fang's strength in the early game, while enhancing his power once he reaches higher levels and has sufficient equipment support.
patchHistoryZh.detail:
We've moderately reduced Fang's strength in the early game, while enhancing his power once he reaches higher levels and has sufficient equipment support.
The current game environment emphasizes laning strength in the early game. Fang's skill mechanics and stats mean that he overly suppresses other heroes in the same position during the early game.We have thus made appropriate adjustments to his strength in the early and late game, to ensure that players can make more diverse hero choices in the current version.

guide.overview: Fang is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 50.4% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Fang: Periodically reveals a random enemy hero within range.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Eternity Blade, Boots of Dexterity, Shadow Ripper, then complete Axe of Torment, Master Sword. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Fang's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Target Sighted → Wheel Away → Bladestorm → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Bladestorm (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Target Sighted is your lane trade tool. Wheel Away second. Bladestorm whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Target Sighted → Wheel Away → Bladestorm → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Fang is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Fang.
comparisons: Fang vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Fang has +1.1% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Fang when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Fang vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Fang has +0.4% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Fang when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Fang excels into Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Dun without team peel.

faqs.question: Is Kui good in current season?
faqs.answer: Kui is Tier A Support with 49.99% win rate, 0.85% pick rate, and 0.35% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Kui build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Tranquility, Blazing Cape, Longnight Guardian, Ominous Premonition, Sage's Sanctuary, Golden Blade.

faqs.question: How to counter Kui?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying. Strong into Cao Cao, Kaizer, Xiang Yu.

faqsZh.question: 鍾馗 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 鍾馗 為 A 梯度，勝率 49.99%、選取 0.85%、禁用 0.35%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 鍾馗 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：冷靜之靴、紅蓮斗篷、永夜守護、不祥徵兆、賢者的庇護、金色聖劍.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cao Cao, Kaizer, Xiang Yu. Weak into: Wukong, Musashi, Ying.

guide.overview: Kui is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.8% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Kui: Deals area damage upon taking heavy damage in a single hit or after dying.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Glacial Buckler, Frigid Charge, then complete Succubus Cloak, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Kui's Support kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Mortals! → Join Me → Into the Void → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Into the Void (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Mortals!, and Into the Void on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Mortals! → Join Me → Into the Void → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Kui is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Kui.
comparisons: Kui vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Kui has +3.7% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Kui when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Kui vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Cai Yan wins 0.6% more often globally. Choose Kui when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Kui excels into Cao Cao, Kaizer, Xiang Yu. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.

skills.name: Forever Entwined
skills.description:
Basic Attacks deal extra damage. Flying sword skills have a shared usage cap.
When flying swords hit, place Sword Energy on targets, and flying swords deal extra damage to targets marked with Sword Energy.

skills.name: Guard Her Grave
skills.description: Unleashes Splitting Sword and moves backwards, knocking back enemies and dealing damage while reducing their Magical Defense.

skills.name: Coupled Blades - Short
skills.description: Throws flying swords that deal damage to enemies in their path.

skills.name: Freshly Forged
skills.description:
Immediately gains 2 uses of flying sword skill and summons more swords to enhance the next flying sword skill.
Passive: Increases field of vision and grants one additional use of Coupled Blades. Each time a flying sword hits an enemy, the cooldown of Freshly Forged is reduced.

skillsZh.name: 比翼同心
skillsZh.description:
普攻造成額外傷害。飛劍技能共享使用次數上限。
飛劍命中目標時會疊加劍氣，飛劍會對劍氣纏繞的目標造成額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 護主邪塚
skillsZh.description: 推出劍塚並向後移動，擊退敵人並造成傷害，同時降低敵人法防。

skillsZh.name: 雌雄雙劍・近
skillsZh.description: 施放飛劍，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 劍來
skillsZh.description:
立刻提供飛劍技能兩次使用次數，並喚出更多把劍來強化下次飛劍技能。
被動：強化視野範圍並增加【雌雄雙劍】使用上限，每一把飛劍命中敵人減少【劍來】冷卻時間。

tips: Gan & Mo (Mage): Tier B — 49.91% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Savant's Wrath, Void Staff, Insatiable Tome.
tipsZh: 干將莫邪（中路）：梯度 B，勝率 49.91%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：博學者之怒、虛無法杖、噬神之書.

patchHistory.detail: "Gan & Mo can deal extremely high damage after activating their Ultimate, but if they miss, they'll be more or less harmless for a short period of time. To alleviate this, we're giving them more chances to deal damage, and allowing them to more freely choose a comfortable attack range."

patchHistory.change: Reduced initial cooldown of Skill 1 and the Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: Gan & Mo's gameplay is full of surprises and challenges. When things are clicking, the duo can instantly obliterate enemies. However, their cooldowns are a little long for to the pace of combat in Hero's Gorge. By lowering the cooldown for their Skill 1 and Ultimate, we've enhanced the duo's survivability and provided more opportunities to obliterate rivals.

patchHistoryZh.change: 增加更多的技能嘗試次數
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「干將莫邪放大招後傷害非常高，但一旦失手，短期內很難造成傷害。因此，我們給了他們更多的嘗試機會，並讓他們更自由地選擇舒適的輸出距離。」

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced initial cooldown of Skill 1 and the Ultimate.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Gan & Mo's gameplay is full of surprises and challenges. When things are clicking, the duo can instantly obliterate enemies. However, their cooldowns are a little long for to the pace of combat in Hero's Gorge. By lowering the cooldown for their Skill 1 and Ultimate, we've enhanced the duo's survivability and provided more opportunities to obliterate rivals.

guide.overview: Gan & Mo is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.4% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Gan & Mo: Basic Attacks deal extra damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Frozen Breath, Boots of Tranquility, Scepter of Reverberation, then complete Mask of Agony, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Gan & Mo's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Guard Her Grave → Coupled Blades - Short → Coupled Blades - Long → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Coupled Blades - Long (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Guard Her Grave, and Coupled Blades - Long on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Guard Her Grave → Coupled Blades - Short → Coupled Blades - Long → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Gan & Mo sits at Tier B globally (50.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Gan & Mo vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 0.6% more often globally. Choose Gan & Mo when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Gan & Mo vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 1.4% more often globally. Choose Gan & Mo when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Gan & Mo excels into Pei, Jing. Avoid blind picking into Sun Ce, Li Xin, Kaizer without team peel.

name: Umbrosa

skills.name: Whirling Featherblades
skills.description:
When attacking at a distance, Basic Attacks throw a blade that returns to her. She can hit the blade as it returns to bounce it back at the enemy, dealing increased damage with each rebound.
When attacking nearby targets, she enters melee mode and attacks faster.
Basic Attacks mark targets. Marked enemies take extra damage from Skill 2.

skills.name: Feverish Dance
skills.description: Sweeps the surrounding area, damaging and slowing nearby enemies. Then enters Frenzied state, gaining a major boost to Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

skills.name: Feathered Tempest
skills.description:
Dashes forward, damaging and knocking back enemies. Also triggers Featherblade marks and spreads them to nearby enemies.
Then, throws rebounding blades at enemies in front, dealing damage and recovering Health. Each hit consumes 1 mark to deal extra damage.

skills.name: Final Frenzy
skills.description:
Damages nearby enemies and gains Movement Speed. Also enters the Indomitable state for 4s, gaining temporary Health.
If she is defeated while this skill is not on cooldown, she resurrects after a short delay, damaging nearby enemies. The skill will then enter cooldown.
Passive: Upgrading this skill increases Skill 2 and melee Basic Attack damage. The Indomitable state ends immediately if she loses all of her temporary Health.

skillsZh.name: 羽刃迴旋
skillsZh.description:
目標較遠時，影普攻會迴旋扔出飛刃，收回飛刃後，才可繼續遠程攻擊。影可在飛刃即將收回時，提前使用普攻，加速向前，並立即回彈飛刃再次攻擊。連續回彈飛刃，每次都會提升傷害。
目標較近時，影會進入近戰狀態，提高攻擊頻率。
每次普攻會對目標疊加印記，目標遭到【翎羽風暴】命中時，會受到額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 狂熱舞步
skillsZh.description: 影橫掃一圈，對圓形範圍內的敵人造成傷害和減速，之後進入狂熱狀態，期間獲得大量移速和攻速。

skillsZh.name: 翎羽風暴
skillsZh.description:
影向前突進造成傷害和擊退，同時激發命中敵人的全部羽刃印記，並傳遞印記至附近的敵人。
隨後對前方範圍內敵人大量彈射飛刃，造成傷害和回復，每次命中會消耗1層目標的印記，額外造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 最後的狂舞
skillsZh.description:
影對附近敵人造成傷害，增加移速。同時影會進入4秒不屈狀態，獲得臨時生命值。
若影在3技能非冷卻期陣亡，則影會緩緩復活，對附近敵人造成傷害，並使得3技能進入冷卻。
被動：之後升級本技能，會增加【翎羽風暴】和近戰普攻的傷害，若臨時生命值消耗殆盡，則會提前結束不屈狀態。

Umbrosa sits at Tier B globally (49.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Umbrosa good in current season?
faqs.answer: Umbrosa is Tier B Warrior with 49.87% win rate, 0.61% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Umbrosa build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Deepfrost Siege, Frostscar's Embrace, Master Sword, Doomsday.

faqs.question: How to counter Umbrosa?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun. Strong into Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi.

faqsZh.question: 影 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 影 為 B 梯度，勝率 49.87%、選取 0.61%、禁用 0.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 影 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：影忍之足、暗影戰斧、寒霜襲侵、冰痕之握、宗師之力、末世.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 影？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun。影 克制 Sakeer、Angela、Guiguzi。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi. Weak into: Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Sakeer、Angela、Guiguzi；被克制：Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun

guide.overview: Umbrosa is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 49.5% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Umbrosa: Mark Damage When attacking at a distance, Basic Attacks throw a blade that returns to her.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Master Sword, then complete Pure Sky, Eternity Blade, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Umbrosa's Warrior kit. Take Flash & Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Feverish Dance → Feathered Tempest → Final Frenzy → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Final Frenzy (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Feverish Dance, and Final Frenzy on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Feverish Dance → Feathered Tempest → Final Frenzy → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Umbrosa sits at Tier B globally (49.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Umbrosa vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 3.1% more often globally. Choose Umbrosa when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Umbrosa vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Chicha wins 0.7% more often globally. Choose Umbrosa when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Umbrosa excels into Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.

skills.name: Poignant Melodies
skills.description:
Changes the melody to produce different skill effects.
War: Skills deal damage to nearby enemies.
Peace: Skills heal nearby allies.

skills.name: Tragic Beauty
skills.description: Damages and slows nearby targets. Her next Basic Attack will deal more damage.

skills.name: Mournful Tempo
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed, and after a brief delay, inflicts damage and stun on enemies in the target area.

skills.name: Melody of Peace
skills.description: Changes the melody to Peace, in which skills restore Health to nearby allies.

skillsZh.name: 驚鴻調
skillsZh.description:
楊玉環切換曲調，施放技能時產生不同效果。
破陣：施放技能對周圍敵人造成傷害。
清平：施放技能周圍友軍獲得治療。

skillsZh.name: 霓裳曲
skillsZh.description: 楊玉環對周圍目標造成傷害和減速。下次普攻造成額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 胡旋樂
skillsZh.description: 楊玉環獲得加速，在短暫延遲後對範圍目標造成傷害和暈眩。

skillsZh.name: 驚鴻・清平
skillsZh.description: 楊玉環切換曲調為清平，施放技能時回復周圍友軍英雄生命值。

guide.overview: Yuhuan is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.6% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Yuhuan: Changes the melody to produce different skill effects.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of Tranquility, Staves of Sorcery, then complete Savant's Wrath. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Yuhuan's Mage kit. Take Heal & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Tragic Beauty → Mournful Tempo → Melody of Peace → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Melody of Peace (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Tragic Beauty, and Melody of Peace on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Tragic Beauty → Mournful Tempo → Melody of Peace → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Yuhuan sits at Tier B globally (50.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Yuhuan vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Yuhuan when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Yuhuan vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 1.2% more often globally. Choose Yuhuan when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Yuhuan excels into Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Wukong. Avoid blind picking into Luna, Ying without team peel.

name: Annette

skills.name: Whisperwind
skills.description: Gains Mana and increased cooldown speed while moving. If there are teammates nearby, also gains Movement Speed.

skills.name: Gust Force
skills.description:
Conjures a persistent magic circle at the target location.
The magic circle damages and slows enemy units.
The magic circle grants Movement Speed to teammates.

skills.name: Wind Cuffs
skills.description:
Fires an orb in the target direction, gaining a shield and Movement Speed.
The orb damages enemies it hits.
The orb grants a shield to teammates it hits.
If the orb passes through a Gust Force magic circle, it pushes the magic circle to its destination.

skills.name: Hurricane Wall
skills.description:
Conjures a barrier around herself, knocking back enemies and dealing damage. Enemies that touch the barrier take damage and are stunned. Teammates within the barrier gain crowd control immunity.
Untargetable while channeling.

skillsZh.name: 風語
skillsZh.description: 安奈特移動時減少技能冷卻並獲得法力值，附近有隊友時自身獲得加速。

skillsZh.name: 風起雲湧
skillsZh.description:
安奈特在指定位置召喚持續生效的法陣。
法陣對敵方單位造成傷害和減速。
法陣為友方單位提供加速。

skillsZh.name: 風之守護
skillsZh.description:
安奈特朝指定方向發射光球，並使自身獲得護盾和加速。
光球對命中的敵人造成傷害。
光球為命中的隊友提供護盾。
光球經過【風起雲湧】的法陣時，會將法陣推至終點。

skillsZh.name: 煦風屏障
skillsZh.description:
安奈特在自身周圍召喚屏障擊退敵人並造成傷害，對觸碰屏障的敵人造成傷害和暈眩，屏障內的隊友獲得霸體。
引導期間安奈特無法鎖定為目標。
