faqs.question: Is Annette good in current season?
faqs.answer: Annette is Tier A Support with 49.83% win rate, 0.59% pick rate, and 0.54% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Annette build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Guardian - Redemption, Frigid Charge, Frozen Breath, Glacial Buckler, Succubus Cloak, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Annette?
faqs.answer: Pick Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Strong into Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.

faqsZh.question: 安奈特 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 安奈特 為 A 梯度，勝率 49.83%、選取 0.59%、禁用 0.54%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 安奈特 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：近衛・救贖、冰霜衝擊、凝冰之息、極寒風暴、魔女斗篷、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 安奈特？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。安奈特 克制 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Weak into: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable；被克制：Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable

name: Dr Bian

skills.name: Malicious Practice
skills.description:
Skill and Basic Attack hits place up to 5 marks on enemies, each stack dealing damage over time.
His Skill 2 and Ultimate place up to 5 marks on himself and his teammates, each stack continually restoring Health over time.

skills.name: Deadly Panacea
skills.description:
Throws a vial of deadly poison at the target location, dealing damage over time and slowing enemies within range.
Can store up to 3 vials of poison.

skills.name: Fatal Diagnosis
skills.description:
Throws a concoction in the target direction, dealing damage and marking enemies in its path.
Heals himself and teammates in its path, while also applying marks.

skills.name: Master of Life
skills.description:
Damages enemies within range and heals teammates.
Every mark detonated will increase damage and healing.
He recovers extra Health.

skillsZh.name: 無德醫療
skillsZh.description:
普攻和技能每次造成傷害會對敵人疊層(最高5層)，每層會造成持續傷害。
2技能和大招會同時為自身和隊友疊層(最高5層)，每層會持續回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 致命靈藥
skillsZh.description:
向指定位置投擲藥瓶，對範圍內敵人造成持續傷害和減速效果。
【致命靈藥】最多可儲存三次。

skillsZh.name: 善惡診斷
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向施放藥劑，對沿途敵人造成傷害並疊加印記。
為沿途友方英雄及自身回復生命值並疊加印記。

skillsZh.name: 生命主宰
skillsZh.description:
對自身周圍一定範圍內的敵人造成傷害，友方英雄進行治療。
引爆的每層印記會使傷害和治療效果提升。
扁鵲自身回復更多的生命值。

出裝：痛苦面具、破繭之衣、熾熱支配.

patchHistory.change: Reduced Dr Bian's early-game damage, and increased his healing and late-game damage
patchHistory.detail: n the current version, Dr Bian is extremely powerful during the early game. However, his lack of dash and crowd control skills makes him less powerful during in the late game. We hope to change that, so we will increase his late-game damage and healing, and reduce his early-game damage accordingly.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the Health recovery effects of Bian Que's Skill 2. Reduced the basic Health recovery effect of his Ultimate but increased the rate of increase for effects per skill level.
patchHistory.detail: At the beginning of the new season, we reduced the effect of the Imperil equipment passive. The goal was to make life a little easier for heroes with healing capabilities. However, this also meant that when Dr Bian was well equipped or matched with other healers, his team would have an outsized advantage. As we hope to see players continue to use healers and the corresponding lineups, we have made certain adjustments to Dr Bian's skill stats to moderate his capabilities in the early-to-mid game. At the same time, Dr Bian will become more powerful than before when he reaches the higher levels.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升2技能傷害回復效果
降低扁鵲前期傷害製造能力，提升他的治療能力以及後期的傷害製造能力
patchHistoryZh.detail: 扁鵲在當前版本的遊戲前期擁有極強的作戰能力，但是由於他缺少位移和控制能力，導致他後期的戰鬥強度會有所下降。我們希望改變扁鵲在遊戲中期開始越打越弱的處境，在強化他後期傷害和治療能力的同時適度降低他前期的戰鬥能力。

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced the Health recovery effects of Bian Que's Skill 2. Reduced the basic Health recovery effect of his Ultimate but increased the rate of increase for effects per skill level.
patchHistoryZh.detail: At the beginning of the new season, we reduced the effect of the Imperil equipment passive. The goal was to make life a little easier for heroes with healing capabilities. However, this also meant that when Dr Bian was well equipped or matched with other healers, his team would have an outsized advantage. As we hope to see players continue to use healers and the corresponding lineups, we have made certain adjustments to Dr Bian's skill stats to moderate his capabilities in the early-to-mid game. At the same time, Dr Bian will become more powerful than before when he reaches the higher levels.

guide.overview: Dr Bian is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.1% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Dr Bian: Damage from skills and Basic Attacks places up to 5 marks on enemies each stack dealing damage over time.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of the Arcane, Savant's Wrath, then complete Insatiable Tome, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Saint for stats that match Dr Bian's Mage kit. Take Heal & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Deadly Panacea → Fatal Diagnosis → Master of Life → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Master of Life (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Deadly Panacea, and Master of Life on cooldown.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.

name: Augran

skills.name: Soul Resonance
skills.description: Basic Attacks can connect to an enemy's soul, dealing damage continuously unless the enemy breaks free. When the connection ends, it deals a large amount of damage.

skills.name: Path of Passing
skills.description: Carves a path to the afterlife, dealing damage to enemies hit. The path accelerates when it hits walls or the Life-Death Border, then deals extra damage. By traversing on the path, he can ignore terrain and gain Movement Speed. Hitting a wall for the first time generates an afterlife bridge, and he gains Movement Speed when crossing the bridge while enemies nearby are slowed. Using this skill again causes him to enter the Seer State.

skills.name: Death's Precipice
skills.description: Deals damage and inflicts slow on enemies to the front, then generates a Life-Death Border which damages, slows, and marks enemies who touch it. His next Basic Attack attacks up to 3 additional marked targets, dealing extra damage and recovering his Health.

skills.name: Conductor of Souls
skills.description: Descends from the sky, damaging and knocking back nearby enemies. Hitting an enemy hero will recover his Health and summon their spirit counterpart to assist him. Enters the Seer State after, in which his Basic Attacks will kill targets with low Health instantly.

skillsZh.name: 鳴戈
skillsZh.description: 大司命的普攻會振動戈產生戈鳴，戈鳴與敵人靈魂連結，持續造成傷害。敵人若不掙脫魂鏈，則魂鏈的傷害頻率會越來越高，結束時還會再造成高額傷害。

skillsZh.name: 往生途
skillsZh.description: 大司命劃開一道往生之路，對命中的目標造成傷害。往生之路碰到牆體或生死界壁後會加速生成，此後命中敵人時會額外造成傷害。大司命在往生之路上可無視地形和加速。往生之路首次碰到牆體會生成往生之橋，大司命穿梭時獲得爆發加速，敵人在附近則受到減速。大司命可再次使用該技能喚回戈，使自己進入神巫狀態。

skillsZh.name: 寂無器
skillsZh.description: 大司命揮戈對前方敵人造成傷害和減速，並留下一道生死界壁，對觸碰的敵人造成傷害、減速和印記。大司命的下一次普攻會額外攻擊所有帶有印記的目標(最多3個)，造成額外傷害並回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 魂歸忘憂
skillsZh.description:
大司命從天而降，對附近敵人造成傷害和擊退。若命中敵方英雄可回復生命值。大司命會凝聚出同樣的靈體幫助作戰。
落地後，大司命進入神巫狀態。若普攻的目標生命較低，則大司命會將其直接斬殺。

guide.overview: Augran is a Medium Warrior (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 46.9% win rate and 1.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Augran: Basic Attacks can connect to an enemy's soul, dealing damage continuously unless the enemy breaks free.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Shadow Ripper, then complete Bloodweeper, Eternity Blade, Mortal Punisher. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Augran's Warrior kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Path of Passing → Death's Precipice → Conductor of Souls → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Conductor of Souls (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Death's Precipice provides mobility or stick—max first. Path of Passing second for damage. Conductor of Souls on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Path of Passing → Death's Precipice → Conductor of Souls → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Conductor of Souls after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Augran is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 5.0% — expect Augran to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Augran vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 5.6% more often globally. Choose Augran when you need Jungling identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Augran vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Chicha wins 3.2% more often globally. Choose Augran when you need Jungling identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Augran excels into Mai Shiranui, Nezha. Avoid blind picking into Liu Bei, Yixing, Liu Shan without team peel.

tips: Gao Changgong (Assassin): Tier A — 49.79% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Rapacious Bite, Master Sword, Cuirass of Savagery.
tipsZh: 蘭陵王（打野）：梯度 A，勝率 49.79%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：貪婪之噬、宗師之力、暴烈之甲.

patchHistory.detail: Prince of Lanling's stealth ability puts pressure on the opponent, even if he's leaving or only passing through. We've improved the indicator so that opponents can gauge his distance based on the blinking speed, giving them room to focus on the crucial moment.

patchHistory.change: Increased the Movement Speed bonus from his passive when at higher hero levels. Increased the base skill effects of his Ultimate and Skills 1 and 2. Increased the skill buff of Skill 4 at higher hero levels.
patchHistory.detail: Prince of Lanling is currently not very strong during early game, and unlike with other assassins, even skilled players struggle to make up for the disadvantage in stats through different play styles. We adjusted his base skill stats and multipliers so that more Prince of Lanling players can come forward to help their teams win.

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整了4技能的隱身機制
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「蘭陵王在隱身狀態下總能為對手帶來一定危機感，哪怕有時他已經離開或只是路過。本次我們改善了提醒效果，讓對手可以根據提示的閃爍頻率判斷距離遠近，進而把注意力集中在最關鍵的時刻。」

patchHistoryZh.change: Increased the Movement Speed bonus from his passive when at higher hero levels. Increased the base skill effects of his Ultimate and Skills 1 and 2. Increased the skill buff of Skill 4 at higher hero levels.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Prince of Lanling is currently not very strong during early game, and unlike with other assassins, even skilled players struggle to make up for the disadvantage in stats through different play styles. We adjusted his base skill stats and multipliers so that more Prince of Lanling players can come forward to help their teams win.

faqs.question: Is Gao Changgong good in current season?
faqs.answer: Gao Changgong is Tier A Assassin with 49.79% win rate, 0.48% pick rate, and 0.47% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Gao Changgong build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Rapacious Bite, Master Sword, Cuirass of Savagery, Starbreaker, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Gao Changgong?
faqs.answer: Pick Athena, Hou Yi, Daji. Strong into Angela, Daji, Cai Yan.

faqsZh.question: 蘭陵王 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 蘭陵王 為 A 梯度，勝率 49.79%、選取 0.48%、禁用 0.47%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 蘭陵王 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：貪婪之噬、宗師之力、暴烈之甲、碎星錘、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 蘭陵王？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Athena、Hou Yi、Daji。蘭陵王 克制 Angela、Daji、Cai Yan。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Angela, Daji, Cai Yan. Weak into: Athena, Hou Yi, Daji.

guide.overview: Gao Changgong is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.2% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Gao Changgong: When an enemy is within a certain range from Prince of Lanling, moving toward them will grant him increased Movement Speed.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Relentless Blade, Boots of Resistance, Meteor, then complete Axe of Torment, Rapacious Bite, Master Sword. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Penetration for stats that match Gao Changgong's Assassin kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Secret Skill - Split → Secret Skill - Sling → Secret Skill - Strike → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Secret Skill - Strike (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Secret Skill - Sling provides mobility or stick—max first. Secret Skill - Split second for damage. Secret Skill - Strike on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Secret Skill - Split → Secret Skill - Sling → Secret Skill - Strike → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Secret Skill - Strike after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Gao Changgong is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.2% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 0.7% — expect Gao Changgong to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Gao Changgong vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Wukong wins 0.5% more often globally. Choose Gao Changgong when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

Gao Changgong vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Musashi wins 1.5% more often globally. Choose Gao Changgong when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Gao Changgong excels into Angela, Daji, Cai Yan. Avoid blind picking into Athena, Hou Yi, Daji without team peel.

name: Mozi

skills.name: Fight for Peace
skills.description:
Every 4th Basic Attack deals area damage and knocks back enemies.
Gains shield stacks when using skills, for up to 3 stacks.

skills.name: Peacebringer
skills.description:
Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in his path.
The next Basic Attack is enhanced, becoming Fight for Peace.

skills.name: Cannon Blast
skills.description: Fires a shell in the target direction, stunning and dealing area damage to the 1st enemy hit. The shell leaves a crater in the ground after reaching its max range or hitting an enemy, dealing damage over time to enemies that step in it.

skills.name: Think Inside the Box
skills.description: Deals damage over time to enemies within a certain range of himself, stunning enemies every time he deals damage.

skillsZh.name: 兼愛非攻
skillsZh.description:
每三次普攻，強化下次普攻，造成範圍傷害和擊退效果。
每次使用技能會為自己疊層(最高三層)，每層都會使自己獲得護盾值。

skillsZh.name: 和平漫步
skillsZh.description:
向目標方向突進，對沿途敵人造成傷害。
將下一次普攻強化為【兼愛非攻】。

skillsZh.name: 機關重砲
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射砲彈，對首個命中敵人造成範圍傷害和暈眩效果，達到最遠距離或命中敵人後會留下彈坑，對範圍內敵人造成持續傷害。

skillsZh.name: 墨守成規
skillsZh.description: 對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成持續傷害，每次傷害額外造成暈眩效果。

guide.overview: Mozi is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.0% win rate and 1.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Mozi: Every 4th Basic Attack deals area damage and knocks back enemies.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Mask of Agony, then complete Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Mozi's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Peacebringer → Cannon Blast → Think Inside the Box → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Think Inside the Box (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Peacebringer, and Think Inside the Box on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Peacebringer → Cannon Blast → Think Inside the Box → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Mozi is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.1% — expect Mozi to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Mozi vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 1.1% more often globally. Choose Mozi when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Mozi vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 1.9% more often globally. Choose Mozi when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Mozi excels into Cirrus, Lam, Li Bai. Avoid blind picking into Dolia, Guiguzi, Nezha without team peel.

tips: Hou Yi (Marksman): Tier S+ — 49.66% WR (Camp HOK).
tipsZh: 后羿（發育路）：梯度 S+，勝率 49.66%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：末世、仁者破曉、逐日之弓.

patchHistory.detail: Hou Yi's stable Basic Attack and ability to target multiple enemies at once make it hard for other marksmen to compete with him, so we've lowered the frequency of his Basic Attacks slightly to give his enemies time to catch their breath.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 后羿穩定的普攻輸出能力和多目標輸出能力讓其他射手難以抗衡，因此我們稍微降低了他的攻擊頻率，好留給對手一些喘息空間。

faqs.question: Is Hou Yi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Hou Yi is Tier S+ Marksman with 49.66% win rate, 2.63% pick rate, and 0.14% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Hou Yi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Doomsday, Daybreaker's Virtue, Sunchaser, Sage's Sanctuary, Haste - Sunpool, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Hou Yi?
faqs.answer: Pick Agudo, Master Luban. Strong into Cirrus, Mulan, Xuance.

faqsZh.question: 后羿 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 后羿 為 S+ 梯度，勝率 49.66%、選取 2.63%、禁用 0.14%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 后羿 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：末世、仁者破曉、逐日之弓、賢者的庇護、迅疾・日淵、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 后羿？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Agudo、Master Luban。后羿 克制 Cirrus、Mulan、Xuance。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Mulan, Xuance. Weak into: Agudo, Master Luban.

guide.overview: Hou Yi is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 49.3% win rate and 2.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Hou Yi: Basic Attack hits grant Attack Speed and 1 stack of enhancement.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Shadow Ripper, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, then complete Bloodweeper, Sunchaser, Daybreaker's Virtue. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Dominator for stats that match Hou Yi's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Arrow Volley → Afterglow → Burning Sun Arrow → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Burning Sun Arrow (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Arrow Volley is your lane trade tool. Afterglow second. Burning Sun Arrow whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Arrow Volley → Afterglow → Burning Sun Arrow → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Hou Yi is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 2.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Hou Yi.
comparisons: Hou Yi vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Marco Polo wins 0.8% more often globally. Choose Hou Yi when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

Hou Yi vs Lady Sun (Marksman, Tier S): Lady Sun is 2.1% pick / 48.3% WR. Hou Yi has +1.0% WR vs Lady Sun in Camp data. Choose Hou Yi when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Lady Sun for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Hou Yi excels into Cirrus, Mulan, Xuance. Avoid blind picking into Agudo, Master Luban without team peel.

name: Charlotte

skills.name: SPLASH GRADATION
skills.description:
After any skill hits an enemy, her next different skill used will be enhanced to a follow-up skill.
Additionally, she gains 1 stack of mark, for up to 5 stacks. Consuming 3 stacks will enhance her next Basic Attack.

skills.name: TRI-SLASH
skills.description: Initial Skill: After a short delay, releases TRI-SLASH in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies and increasing her Movement Speed.

skills.name: SPLASH FOUNT
skills.description: Initial Skill: Dashes in the target direction, while striking several times. Recovers Health each time damage is dealt.

skills.name: POWER GRADATION
skills.description: Initial Skill: Carves a seven-pointed star around her, dealing damage and slowing nearby enemies. Gains crowd control immunity and damage reduction while the skill is active.

skillsZh.name: 七星光芒劍
skillsZh.description:
任意技能命中敵人後，其餘技能變為具有強化效果的追加技。
同時夏洛特疊加1層印記，消耗3層印記會強化下次普攻，最多保留5層印記。

skillsZh.name: 迅光三角劍
skillsZh.description: 起始技：短暫延遲後，朝指定方向施放迅光三角劍，命中敵人造成傷害並提升夏洛特移動速度。

skillsZh.name: 前進噴泉
skillsZh.description: 起始技：朝指定方向衝刺對敵人造成多次傷害並回復自身生命值。

skillsZh.name: 破空光劍
skillsZh.description: 起始技：原地畫出劍陣，對附近敵人造成傷害和減速效果，技能施放期間，自身獲得霸體和減傷效果。

tipsZh: 夏洛特（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 49.62%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暗影戰斧、怒龍劍盾、魔女斗篷.

patchHistory.change: Reduced cooldown and made it easier to maintain passive stacks.
patchHistory.detail: "Charlotte's passive wears off over time, which wastes her previous efforts. We've made it easier for her to maintain her passive, hoping she can perform better."

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低技能冷卻和保持被動層數的難度
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「夏洛特被動隨時間削減後，也會浪費她之前的努力。我們降低她保持被動的難度，期望她能有更好的表現。」

faqs.question: Is Charlotte good in current season?
faqs.answer: Charlotte is Tier B Warrior with 49.62% win rate, 0.67% pick rate, and 0.05% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Charlotte build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Axe of Torment, Dragon's Rage, Succubus Cloak, Boots of Resistance, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Charlotte?
faqs.answer: Pick Arli, Kaizer. Strong into Fuzi, Hou Yi.

faqsZh.answer: 夏洛特 為 B 梯度，勝率 49.62%、選取 0.67%、禁用 0.05%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 夏洛特 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暗影戰斧、怒龍劍盾、魔女斗篷、抵抗之靴、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 夏洛特？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Arli、Kaizer。夏洛特 克制 Fuzi、Hou Yi。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Fuzi, Hou Yi. Weak into: Arli, Kaizer.

guide.overview: Charlotte is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 50.5% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Charlotte: After any skill hits an enemy, her next different skill used will be enhanced to a follow-up skill.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, then complete Starbreaker, Immovable - Sky Dome, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Charlotte's Warrior kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: TRI-SLASH (Initial) → SPLASH FOUNT (Initial) → POWER GRADATION (Initial) → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → POWER GRADATION (Initial) (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then TRI-SLASH (Initial), and POWER GRADATION (Initial) on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: TRI-SLASH (Initial) → SPLASH FOUNT (Initial) → POWER GRADATION (Initial) → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Charlotte is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Charlotte.
comparisons: Charlotte vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 2.1% more often globally. Choose Charlotte when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

Charlotte vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Charlotte has +0.3% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Charlotte when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Charlotte excels into Fuzi, Hou Yi. Avoid blind picking into Arli, Kaizer without team peel.

name: Zhuangzi

skills.name: Nature's Will
skills.description: Periodically removes crowd control effects and increases Movement Speed and damage reduction.

skills.name: Kaleidoscope
skills.description: Triggers Nature's Will, releasing dream butterflies in a cone-shaped area, inflicting damage and slowing enemies in range.

skills.name: Sleep Starts
skills.description:
Damages enemies within range and increases teammates' Movement Speed.
Gains a stack each time damage is dealt, up to 5 stacks. Each stack increases skill damage.
Passive: Periodically uses Sleep Starts.

skills.name: Butterfly Effect

skillsZh.name: 自然意志
skillsZh.description: 每隔一段時間解除自身控制效果，提升移動速度和傷害減免。

skillsZh.name: 化蝶

每次造成傷害可為自身疊層(最高五層)，每層提升技能傷害。
被動：每隔一段時間自動施放【蝴蝶效應】。

skillsZh.description: 為自身周圍一定範圍內的友方英雄解除控制效果，並增加護盾值。

patchHistory.change: Reduced his Ultimate's cooldown and buffed his shield
patchHistory.detail: The interval between each use of Zhuangzi's Ultimate is too long. Also, his shield is often overlooked by his teammates. By buffing the shield, we've made Zhuangzi useful even if he is unable to cleanse teammates of crowd controls.

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低大招的冷卻時間，提高護盾效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 莊周大招的使用間隔實在是太久了，而護盾往往會被大家忽略，因此我們適當提高了效果，讓他即使沒有成功解除控制，還是能保持不錯的效果。

faqs.question: Is Zhuangzi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Zhuangzi is Tier A Tank with 49.47% win rate, 0.67% pick rate, and 0.91% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Zhuangzi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Fortitude, Guardian - Redemption, Dawnlight, Succubus Cloak, Ominous Premonition, Overlord's Platemail.

faqs.question: How to counter Zhuangzi?
faqs.answer: Pick Allain, Wukong, Musashi. Strong into Cirrus, Dian Wei, Menki.

faqsZh.question: 莊周 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 莊周 為 A 梯度，勝率 49.47%、選取 0.67%、禁用 0.91%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 莊周 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：影忍之足、近衛・救贖、旭日初光、魔女斗篷、不祥徵兆、霸者重裝.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 莊周？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Allain、Wukong、Musashi。莊周 克制 Cirrus、Dian Wei、Menki。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Dian Wei, Menki. Weak into: Allain, Wukong, Musashi.

guide.overview: Zhuangzi is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.9% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Zhuangzi: Periodically removes crowd control effects and increases Movement Speed and damage reduction.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Fortitude, Glacial Buckler, Ominous Premonition, then complete Longnight Guardian, Overlord's Platemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Zhuangzi's Tank kit. Take Smite & Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Kaleidoscope → Sleep Starts → Butterfly Effect → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Butterfly Effect (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Kaleidoscope, and Butterfly Effect on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Kaleidoscope → Sleep Starts → Butterfly Effect → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Zhuangzi is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.9% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 1.1% — expect Zhuangzi to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Zhuangzi vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 1.5% more often globally. Choose Zhuangzi when you need Roaming identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Zhuangzi vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 2.4% more often globally. Choose Zhuangzi when you need Roaming identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Zhuangzi excels into Cirrus, Dian Wei, Menki. Avoid blind picking into Allain, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.

tips: Liu Shan (Tank): Tier A — 49.45% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Axe of Torment, Blazing Cape, Frigid Charge.
tipsZh: 劉禪（遊走）：梯度 A，勝率 49.45%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暗影戰斧、紅蓮斗篷、冰霜衝擊.

patchHistory.detail: "As a tank support, it's Liu Shan's job to take damage in the frontline, while also trying to crowd control enemies. We've reduced his skill cooldowns to improve his performance in both areas."

patchHistory.change: Increased shield from Skill 1 when using defensive equipment.
patchHistory.detail: "We want Liu Shan's survivability to be more connected with his equipment choices."

Increased Skill 1's Movement Speed bonus.
Liu Shan needs to set up ambushes in the brush or use his Skill 1 to help him crowd control. Right now there are too many heroes with powerful movement skills, which makes it hard for Liu Shan to approach them with his Skill 1. By increasing Skill 1's Movement Speed bonus, we hope to give his players more flexibility.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「作為坦克輔助，劉禪需要在前排承受傷害，同時嘗試控制對手；我們降低了他的技能冷卻時間，提升這兩項能力。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升1技能在防禦出裝下的護盾
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「我們希望劉禪的生存能力，能夠與出裝選擇有一定的關聯。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高劉禪使用1技能後的移動速度
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提高劉禪使用1技能後的移動速度
劉禪需埋伏在草叢或使用1技能，才能發揮自身的控制能力，但是目前版本中，很多英雄的位移能力很強，讓劉禪很難以1技能接近敵人。我們希望透過調整劉禪1技能的移動速度加成效果，藉此提升劉禪使用者的操作空間。

faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暗影戰斧、紅蓮斗篷、冰霜衝擊、暴烈之甲、永夜守護、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.answer: 可選 Li Bai。劉禪 克制 Arthur、Augran、Biron。

name: Ukyo Tachibana

skills.name: CONCEALED SABRE HAZY BLADE
skills.description: Every 4–5s, Ukyo Tachibana gains one enhanced Basic Attack that has increased range, restores Health, deals extra damage, and slows enemies. Dealing skill damage shortens the enhanced Basic Attack's cooldown.

skills.name: CONCEALED SABRE SWALLOW SWIPE
skills.description:
Ukyo Tachibana creates a domain around himself, then leaps backward, dealing damage to enemies in his path. This skill can be used again after 2s, or immediately if it hits a target.
If he returns to the starting point of phase 1 after using phase 2, phase 2 is enhanced.

skills.name: CONCEALED SABRE HEAVENLY HACK
skills.description:
Slashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies within range.
Enemies at the edge of the skill's range will be stunned.

skills.name: CONCEALED SABRE SNOWFALL SLASH
skills.description:
Slashes 4 times in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies within range.
Recovers Health each time damage is dealt.

skillsZh.name: 祕劍・朧刀
skillsZh.description: 橘右京每隔5~4秒強化下一次普攻，獲得更長射程、回復生命值和額外傷害，並將目標減速。技能傷害會縮短強化普攻的冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 燕返
skillsZh.description:
橘右京在腳下建立一塊區域並後跳斬擊沿途敵人，造成傷害。2秒後可再次施放，若命中目標則可直接施放。
若二段返回一段起點附近，則強化技能第二段。

skillsZh.name: 神送
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向拔刀斬擊，對範圍內敵人造成傷害。
對遠端敵人額外造成暈眩效果。

skillsZh.name: 細雪
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向連續拔刀斬擊四次，對範圍內敵人造成傷害。
每次造成傷害回復生命值。

tips: Ukyo Tachibana (Assassin): Tier B — 49.45% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Master Sword, Pure Sky, Sage's Sanctuary.
tipsZh: 橘右京（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 49.45%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：宗師之力、純淨蒼穹、賢者的庇護.

patchHistory.change: Improved the and healing and prgression of his passive, and upgraded the second stage of Skill 1.
patchHistory.detail: "The fixed cooldown of his passive limited Ukyo Tachibana's late game damage output, so we have adjusted its scaling to allow it to interact better with his skills. At the same time, we have lowered the unlock conditions for the second stage of his Skill 1, improving his flexibility to some extent."

patchHistoryZh.change: 增加被動的成長和回復，1技能二段效果升級
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「固定的被動間隔限制了橘右京後期的輸出能力，因此我們提高了被動的成長性，使其能與技能相互配合；同時我們降低了1技能二段的解鎖條件，提高他的靈活程度。」

faqs.question: Is Ukyo Tachibana good in current season?
faqs.answer: Ukyo Tachibana is Tier B Assassin with 49.45% win rate, 0.38% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Ukyo Tachibana build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Master Sword, Pure Sky, Sage's Sanctuary, Blood Rage, Destiny, Immovable - Sky Dome.

faqs.question: How to counter Ukyo Tachibana?
faqs.answer: Pick Di Renjie, Shi, Kongming. Strong into Arthur, Lian Po, Wuyan.

faqsZh.question: 橘右京 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 橘右京 為 B 梯度，勝率 49.45%、選取 0.38%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 橘右京 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：宗師之力、純淨蒼穹、賢者的庇護、血魔之怒、名刀・司命、不動・天穹.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 橘右京？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Di Renjie、Shi、Kongming。橘右京 克制 Arthur、Lian Po、Wuyan。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Arthur, Lian Po, Wuyan. Weak into: Di Renjie, Shi, Kongming.

guide.overview: Ukyo Tachibana is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.3% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Ukyo Tachibana: Every 5–4s, Ukyo Tachibana gains one enhanced Basic Attack that has increased range, restores Health, deals extra damage, and slows enemies.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, then complete Pure Sky, Spikemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Ukyo Tachibana's Assassin kit. Take Smite & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: CONCEALED SABRE SWALLOW SWIPE → CONCEALED SABRE HEAVENLY HACK → CONCEALED SABRE SNOWFALL SLASH → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → CONCEALED SABRE SNOWFALL SLASH (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: CONCEALED SABRE HEAVENLY HACK provides mobility or stick—max first. CONCEALED SABRE SWALLOW SWIPE second for damage. CONCEALED SABRE SNOWFALL SLASH on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: CONCEALED SABRE SWALLOW SWIPE → CONCEALED SABRE HEAVENLY HACK → CONCEALED SABRE SNOWFALL SLASH → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: CONCEALED SABRE SNOWFALL SLASH after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Ukyo Tachibana sits at Tier B globally (51.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Ukyo Tachibana vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Ukyo Tachibana has +1.6% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Ukyo Tachibana when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

Ukyo Tachibana vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Ukyo Tachibana has +0.6% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Ukyo Tachibana when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Ukyo Tachibana excels into Arthur, Lian Po, Wuyan. Avoid blind picking into Di Renjie, Shi, Kongming without team peel.

name: Haya

skills.name: Moon's Farewell
skills.description: Spends moon crystals to use skills. When all moon crystals have been spent, her Skill 1 and Skill 2 will enter their cooldowns, and her next Basic Attack is enhanced, dealing extra damage. Skill 1 and Skill 2 apply a Mark on hit. Hitting marked targets again triggers additional effects.

skills.name: Crescent Wave
skills.description: Unleashes a beam of moonlight, dealing damage. Deals extra damage if a mark is triggered.

skills.name: Wayward Rays
skills.description: Releases orbs to deal damage while gaining a shield and increased Movement Speed. If marks are triggered, targets will be stunned.

skills.name: Moonscape Mirage
skills.description:
Links to a hero, gaining damage reduction while linked. After a delay, they enter a mirage. Upon entering, she gains a shield, and her skill cooldowns are shorter.
If she uses this skill again while inside the mirage, she moves 700 units away from the target.

skillsZh.name: 別月
skillsZh.description: 海月施放技能會消耗月盤，月盤消耗完畢後，1、2技能才會進入冷卻。使用完月盤後會強化下次普攻，造成額外傷害。1、2技能命中目標後，會對目標疊加一層印記，再次命中會觸發不同的效果。

skillsZh.name: 瞬華
skillsZh.description: 海月向前施放月光造成傷害。如觸發印記，則額外造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 流光
skillsZh.description: 海月發出法球造成傷害，獲得護盾和加速。如觸發印記，則額外造成暈眩。

skillsZh.name: 幻海映月
skillsZh.description:
海月連結1位英雄，期間獲得減傷。延遲後與目標進入幻境。海月進入幻境後獲得護盾值。在幻境中海月的技能冷卻時間加快。
海月在幻境中再次施放該技能會與目標拉開700距離。

guide.overview: Haya is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 49.8% win rate and 0.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Haya: MarkEnhance Spends moon crystals to use skills.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Deftness, Insatiable Tome, Void Staff, then complete Savant's Wrath, Venomous Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Haya's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Crescent Wave → Wayward Rays → Moonscape Mirage → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Moonscape Mirage (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Crescent Wave, and Moonscape Mirage on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Crescent Wave → Wayward Rays → Moonscape Mirage → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Haya is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 3.0% — expect Haya to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Haya vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 1.3% more often globally. Choose Haya when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Haya vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 2.0% more often globally. Choose Haya when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Haya excels into Sakeer, Zilong, Milady. Avoid blind picking into Li Xin, Kaizer, Dun without team peel.

skills.name: Chain Reaction
skills.description: Basic Attack and skill hits place stacks on the opponent, dealing extra true damage at max stacks. The number of bullets fired by Skill 1 and Ultimate increases with Attack Speed.

skills.name: Resplendent Revolver
skills.description: Fires in the target direction for a period of time and gains Movement Speed while firing.

skills.name: Roaming Gun
skills.description:
Blinks in the target direction.
Passive: When enemy heroes are within a certain range, he deals more damage and gains Movement Speed.

skills.name: Fevered Barrage
skills.description: Blinks in the target direction and deals damage over time to enemies within a certain range around him.

skillsZh.name: 連鎖反應

被動：自身周圍一定範圍內有敵方英雄時，提升傷害和移動速度。

skillsZh.name: 狂熱彈幕
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向瞬移後，對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成持續傷害。

tips: Marco Polo (Marksman): Tier S — 49.16% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Succubus Cloak, Daybreaker's Virtue, Ominous Premonition.
tipsZh: 馬可波羅（發育路）：梯度 S，勝率 49.16%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：魔女斗篷、仁者破曉、不祥徵兆.

patchHistory.change: Smoothed Attack Speed gains, improving growth.
patchHistory.detail: Marco Polo's current Attack Speed benefits don't pay off much until the late game, so we gave the Attack Speed boost of his Skill 1 and Ultimate more specific tiering to ensure that early-game Attack Speed boosts provide a corresponding reward.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the level-up increment of his base Attack stat and his Skill 1 physical damage.
patchHistory.detail: Thanks to his skill's true damage mechanic, Marco Polo can equip multiple pieces of defensive equipment while still being able to deal lots of damage when poking and deliver tremendous burst damage during team fights. By mid to late game, Marco Polo is able to do just about everything the other marksmen can. By making some slight adjustments to his laning capabilities and late game strength, we hope to make this highly versatily marksman just a little bit less powerful.

patchHistoryZh.change: 攻速收益曲線平滑化以確保成長體驗
patchHistoryZh.detail: 馬可波羅目前攻速收益曲線過於陡峭，我們將1技能、3技能的攻速收益劃分成更細的檔位，確保前期的攻速提升也能帶來對應的收益。

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced the level-up increment of his base Attack stat and his Skill 1 physical damage.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Thanks to his skill's true damage mechanic, Marco Polo can equip multiple pieces of defensive equipment while still being able to deal lots of damage when poking and deliver tremendous burst damage during team fights. By mid to late game, Marco Polo is able to do just about everything the other marksmen can. By making some slight adjustments to his laning capabilities and late game strength, we hope to make this highly versatily marksman just a little bit less powerful.

faqs.question: Is Marco Polo good in current season?
faqs.answer: Marco Polo is Tier S Marksman with 49.16% win rate, 1.87% pick rate, and 0.27% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Marco Polo build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Succubus Cloak, Daybreaker's Virtue, Ominous Premonition, Amble - Winter, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Marco Polo?
faqs.answer: Pick Lian Po, Liu Bang, Zhang Fei. Strong into Cirrus, Mai Shiranui, Wukong.

faqsZh.question: 馬可波羅 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 馬可波羅 為 S 梯度，勝率 49.16%、選取 1.87%、禁用 0.27%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 馬可波羅 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：魔女斗篷、仁者破曉、不祥徵兆、徐行・凜冬、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 馬可波羅？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Lian Po、Liu Bang、Zhang Fei。馬可波羅 克制 Cirrus、Mai Shiranui、Wukong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Mai Shiranui, Wukong. Weak into: Lian Po, Liu Bang, Zhang Fei.
metaAnalysisZh: 馬可波羅 勝率 49.16%（Camp HOK，2026-07-19）
克制：Cirrus、Mai Shiranui、Wukong；被克制：Lian Po、Liu Bang、Zhang Fei

guide.overview: Marco Polo is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 50.1% win rate and 2.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Marco Polo: Basic Attack and skill hits inflict stacks on the opponent, dealing extra truedamage at max stacks.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Doomsday, Boots of Dexterity, Sparkforged Dagger, then complete Daybreaker's Virtue, Frostscar's Embrace. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Marco Polo's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Resplendent Revolver → Roaming Gun → Fevered Barrage → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Fevered Barrage (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Resplendent Revolver is your lane trade tool. Roaming Gun second. Fevered Barrage whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Resplendent Revolver → Roaming Gun → Fevered Barrage → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Marco Polo is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 2.1% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Marco Polo.
comparisons: Marco Polo vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Marco Polo has +0.8% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Marco Polo when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Marco Polo vs Lady Sun (Marksman, Tier S): Lady Sun is 2.1% pick / 48.3% WR. Marco Polo has +1.8% WR vs Lady Sun in Camp data. Choose Marco Polo when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Lady Sun for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Marco Polo excels into Cirrus, Mai Shiranui, Wukong. Avoid blind picking into Lian Po, Liu Bang, Zhang Fei without team peel.

name: Liu Bang

skills.name: Royal Ambition
skills.description: Gains 1 mark every second, for up to 4 marks. Basic Attacks expend all marks, dealing additional magical damage per mark. At maximum marks, the next Basic Attack is enhanced into a ranged attack.

skills.name: Dominator's Shield
skills.description: Grants himself a shield. If the shield is still not depleted when it expires, it will deal damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Staggering Charge
skills.description: Charges up and dashes forward, damaging and stunning enemies in his path.

skills.name: Battlefield Command
skills.description: Provides a shield to a teammate. After a short delay, teleports to the teammate and gains Movement Speed.

skillsZh.name: 雙重威嚇
skillsZh.description: 蓄力向前衝鋒，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害和暈眩。

skillsZh.name: 統御戰場
skillsZh.description: 劉邦為隊友提供護盾，短暫延遲後，傳送到隊友身邊獲得加速。

faqs.question: Is Liu Bang good in current season?
faqs.answer: Liu Bang is Tier B Tank with 49% win rate, 0.3% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Liu Bang build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Crimson Shadow - Redemption, Breakthrough Robe, Augur's Word, Blazing Cape, Staves of Sorcery, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Liu Bang?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying. Strong into Marco Polo, Meng Ya, Shouyue.

faqsZh.question: 劉邦 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 劉邦 為 B 梯度，勝率 49%、選取 0.3%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 劉邦 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：極影・救贖、破繭之衣、時之預言、紅蓮斗篷、巫術法杖、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 劉邦？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Wukong、Musashi、Ying。劉邦 克制 Marco Polo、Meng Ya、Shouyue。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Marco Polo, Meng Ya, Shouyue. Weak into: Wukong, Musashi, Ying.

guide.overview: Liu Bang is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.2% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Liu Bang: Gains 1 mark every second, for up to 4 marks.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Spikemail, Blazing Cape, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Longnight Guardian, Frigid Charge. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Liu Bang's Tank kit. Take Smite & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Dominator's Shield → Staggering Charge → Battlefield Command → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Battlefield Command (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Dominator's Shield, and Battlefield Command on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Dominator's Shield → Staggering Charge → Battlefield Command → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Liu Bang sits at Tier B globally (50.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Liu Bang vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 1.2% more often globally. Choose Liu Bang when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Liu Bang vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 2.1% more often globally. Choose Liu Bang when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Liu Bang excels into Marco Polo, Meng Ya, Shouyue. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.

name: Zhang Fei

skills.name: Dark Potential
skills.description:
Human Form: Basic Attack and skill hits grant Madness.
Ferali Form: Using the skill reduces the Movement Speed of enemies within range.

skills.name: Forbidden Domain
skills.description:
Deals damage to enemies within range.
Knocks back enemy heroes.

skills.name: Leaping Savior
skills.description:
Leaps to the target location, granting shields to nearby teammates.
Gains Madness for each shield granted.

skills.name: Unbridled Outburst
skills.description:
Roars and transforms. After a short period of invincibility and immunity to crowd control, gains a shield.
The roar creates a wind that damages, knocks back, and stuns enemies.
Gains Movement Speed while in the wind zone.

skillsZh.name: 黑暗潛能
skillsZh.description:
人類形態：普攻和技能命中可獲得狂意值。
魔種形態：施放技能會降低自身周圍一定範圍內的敵人的移動速度。

skillsZh.name: 畫地為牢
skillsZh.description:
對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害。
對敵方英雄附加擊退效果。

skillsZh.name: 守護機關
skillsZh.description:
向指定位置跳躍，為附近友方英雄增加護盾值。
每為一名友方英雄提供護盾值，張飛會獲得額外狂意值。

skillsZh.name: 狂獸血性
skillsZh.description:
怒吼變身，短暫無敵，霸體後獲得護盾。
怒吼形成狂風，對敵人造成傷害、擊退和暈眩效果。
張飛在狂風中會增加移動速度。

guide.overview: Zhang Fei is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.1% win rate and 1.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Zhang Fei: Human Form: Hits from Basic Attacks and skills grant madness.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Blazing Cape, Ominous Premonition, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Zhang Fei's Tank kit. Take Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Forbidden Domain → Leaping Savior → Unbridled Outburst → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Unbridled Outburst (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Forbidden Domain, and Unbridled Outburst on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Forbidden Domain → Leaping Savior → Unbridled Outburst → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Zhang Fei is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.2% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Zhang Fei.
comparisons: Zhang Fei vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 1.3% more often globally. Choose Zhang Fei when you need Roaming identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Zhang Fei vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 2.2% more often globally. Choose Zhang Fei when you need Roaming identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

tips: Da Qiao (Support): Tier A — 48.83% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Sage's Tome, Boots of the Arcane, Venomous Staff.
tipsZh: 大喬（遊走）：梯度 A，勝率 48.83%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：賢者天書、祕法之靴、夢魘之牙.

patchHistory.change: Increased the area of Skill 1 and 3, and enhanced Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail: "We strengthened Da Qiao's own growth to make it possible for her to appear in more positions."

patchHistory.change: We wanted to preserve the original vision for how Da Qiao should play while expanding her role options and adjusting her skill stats.
patchHistory.detail:
We wanted to preserve the original vision for how Da Qiao should play while expanding her role options and adjusting her skill stats.
As a roamer, Da Qiao provides her team with excellent tactical options. Unfortunately, because she relies so heavily on her teammates, her skill floor and ceiling are too far apart.By changing her skill mechanics, we hope to improve her soloing ability while maintaining her original role and playstyle.

patchHistoryZh.change: 增加1、3技能範圍，強化2技能效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「加強大喬自身的成長，讓大喬有出現在更多位置的可能性。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 保留大喬原有設計想法和玩法，開拓她在遊戲中的位置選擇，並適當調整她的技能數值
patchHistoryZh.detail:
保留大喬原有設計想法和玩法，開拓她在遊戲中的位置選擇，並適當調整她的技能數值
身為遊走英雄，大喬可為團隊帶來與眾不同的戰術選擇，但是太過依賴隊友，使大喬的上下限差異過大。我們希望透過調整她的技能機制，既保留其原有定位和玩法，也讓她能更多憑藉自身能力對抗敵人、改變戰局。

faqs.question: Is Da Qiao good in current season?
faqs.answer: Da Qiao is Tier A Support with 48.83% win rate, 0.86% pick rate, and 0.36% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Da Qiao build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Sage's Tome, Boots of the Arcane, Venomous Staff, Void Staff, Twilight Stream, Ardent Dominion.

faqs.question: How to counter Da Qiao?
faqs.answer: Pick Arke, Han Xin. Strong into Luna, Mozi.

faqsZh.question: 大喬 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 大喬 為 A 梯度，勝率 48.83%、選取 0.86%、禁用 0.36%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 大喬 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：賢者天書、祕法之靴、夢魘之牙、虛無法杖、日暮之流、熾熱支配.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 大喬？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Arke、Han Xin。大喬 克制 Luna、Mozi。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Luna, Mozi. Weak into: Arke, Han Xin.

guide.overview: Da Qiao is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.1% win rate and 0.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Da Qiao: Grants a Movement Speed boost to herself and a nearby teammate.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Frozen Breath, Breakthrough Robe, then complete Venomous Staff, Mask of Agony. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Da Qiao's Support kit. Take Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Leaping Koi Tide → Sea of Fate → Severing Surge → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Severing Surge (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Leaping Koi Tide, and Severing Surge on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Leaping Koi Tide → Sea of Fate → Severing Surge → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Da Qiao is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.1% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Da Qiao.
comparisons: Da Qiao vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Da Qiao has +3.0% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Da Qiao when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Da Qiao vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Cai Yan wins 1.2% more often globally. Choose Da Qiao when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Da Qiao excels into Luna, Mozi. Avoid blind picking into Arke, Han Xin without team peel.

name: Lam

skills.name: Hunter
skills.description: Basic Attacks and skills deal extra true damage to targets with low Health.

skills.name: Wavebreaker
skills.description:
Becomes submerged and gains Movement Speed. Use this skill again to dash and deal damage.
Can remain submerged indefinitely in the river. Gains extra Movement Speed when an enemy hero with low Health is nearby.

skills.name: Space Split
skills.description:
Damages nearby enemies while gaining marks and recovering Health.
Basic Attacks consume marks to gain a dash and Health recovery effect.
Submerged: Skill 2 has an extra dash effect.

skills.name: Death From Below
skills.description:
Throws a dagger in the target direction, then dashes to the dagger after a short delay, dragging enemies in his path to the dagger and dealing damage to them.
Submerged: Cancels the cast point animation and skill delay.

skillsZh.name: 狩獵
skillsZh.description: 普攻和技能對生命值較低的目標造成額外真實傷害。

skillsZh.name: 破浪
skillsZh.description:
進入下潛狀態，再次使用會突進並造成傷害。
下潛狀態位於河道時，則沒有時間限制。增加移動速度，附近敵方英雄生命過低會額外增加移動速度。

skillsZh.name: 斷空
skillsZh.description:
對附近敵人造成傷害，自身獲得印記並回復生命值。
普攻消耗印記，額外具有突進和回復生命值的效果。
下潛狀態2技能額外具有突進效果。

skillsZh.name: 處決
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向投擲匕首，短暫延遲後突進至匕首位置。將沿途敵人拉至終點並造成傷害。
下潛狀態：取消出招動作和技能延遲。

tipsZh: 瀾（打野）：梯度 S，勝率 48.78%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：純淨蒼穹、魔女斗篷、賢者的庇護.

patchHistory.change: Balanced early and late game strength, and made it harder to repeatedly use enhanced Basic Attacks
patchHistory.detail: "The mechanism that let Lam's enhanced Basic Attack reduce Skill 2's cooldown by a fixed amount allowed Lam to spam his Skill 2 and enhanced Basic Attack in the late game. This made it difficult for opponents to counter him, a situation that we hope to improve with these adjustments. At the same time, we have moderately increased the base effects of his skills to enhance the experience for newer players."

patchHistory.change: We've slightly reduced the Health recovery from Basic Attacks enhanced by Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail:
We've slightly reduced the Health recovery from Basic Attacks enhanced by Skill 2.
Previous adjustments to Lam's skill stat bonuses made his gameplay more diverse, which was in line with our design expectations.We hope that the slight stat reductions this time round will give more opportunities to other heroes.

patchHistory.change: Increased Skill 1's base damage, reduced Skill 2's cooldown; adjusted the base damage, recovery, and equipment bonus multiplier for Skill 2 and the enhanced Basic Attacks; adjusted the base damage and equipment bonus multiplier for the Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: Lam is a little weak during early game in this version, which makes him less fun to play when your team is at a disadvantage. We boosted the base damage and recovery effects of his skills and hope this will enhance his early-to-mid game performance. We also adjusted the equipment bonus multiplier of some skills so he's not too powerful during late game.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升技能傷害和回復值
平衡前後期強度，避免連續使用強化普攻
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「降低固定冷卻時間的機制，讓瀾在後期可能有連續使用2技能和強化普攻的情況，會讓對手很難與他對抗，我們希望改善這一現象；同時適當提升技能的基礎效果，提升新上手玩家的體驗。」

patchHistoryZh.change: We've slightly reduced the Health recovery from Basic Attacks enhanced by Skill 2.
patchHistoryZh.detail:
We've slightly reduced the Health recovery from Basic Attacks enhanced by Skill 2.
Previous adjustments to Lam's skill stat bonuses made his gameplay more diverse, which was in line with our design expectations.We hope that the slight stat reductions this time round will give more opportunities to other heroes.

patchHistoryZh.change: Increased Skill 1's base damage, reduced Skill 2's cooldown; adjusted the base damage, recovery, and equipment bonus multiplier for Skill 2 and the enhanced Basic Attacks; adjusted the base damage and equipment bonus multiplier for the Ultimate.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Lam is a little weak during early game in this version, which makes him less fun to play when your team is at a disadvantage. We boosted the base damage and recovery effects of his skills and hope this will enhance his early-to-mid game performance. We also adjusted the equipment bonus multiplier of some skills so he's not too powerful during late game.

guide.hook: Lam: Basic Attacks and skills deal extra true damage to targets with low Health.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Immovable - Sky Dome, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Lam's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Wavebreaker → Space Split → Death From Below → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Death From Below (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Space Split provides mobility or stick—max first. Wavebreaker second for damage. Death From Below on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Wavebreaker → Space Split → Death From Below → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Death From Below after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Lam is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Lam. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Lam vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Wukong wins 0.9% more often globally. Choose Lam when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Lam vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Musashi wins 1.9% more often globally. Choose Lam when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Lam excels into Lu Bu, Wuyan, Xiang Yu. Avoid blind picking into Erin, Liang, Luara without team peel.

name: Sun Ce

skills.name: Raging Tide
skills.description: The next Basic Attack periodically deals extra damage and restores Health. Gains 1 stack every time a skill deals damage, or every time he takes physical or true damage, for up to 10 stacks. Each stack increases Physical Defense.

skills.name: Wave Render
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in his path and at the end of his dash. After a short delay, launches enemies and deals further damage.

skills.name: Typhoon
skills.description: Strides forward and sweeps enemies in front, dealing damage and slowing them. Can sweep an extra 2 times before the skill goes into cooldown.

skills.name: Set Sail!
skills.description:
Pilots a boat forward and becomes immune to crowd control. The boat can also carry 1 teammate.
When it hits obstacles or certain enemies, it explodes and launches enemies, dealing damage.
If he bails out early, the boat will coast for a distance.

skillsZh.name: 怒潮
skillsZh.description: 每隔一段時間，下次普攻造成額外傷害並回復生命值，技能造成的每次傷害或每次受到物理或真實傷害可以為自身疊層(最大十層)，每層提升物理防禦。

skillsZh.name: 劈風斬浪
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向突進，對沿途敵人造成傷害。
到達終點造成範圍傷害，短暫延遲後在相同位置造成傷害和擊飛效果。

skillsZh.name: 驚濤駭浪
skillsZh.description: 踏步向前橫掃身前敵人，造成傷害並減速，在技能進入冷卻前可額外橫掃兩次。

skillsZh.name: 長帆破浪
skillsZh.description:
駕駛船隻前行，期間持續霸體，並可攜帶1位隊友。
船隻接觸到地形或特定目標後爆炸，造成傷害和擊飛。
孫策可提前下船，讓船隻滑行一段距離。

faqs.question: Is Sun Ce good in current season?
faqs.answer: Sun Ce is Tier A Tank with 48.75% win rate, 0.92% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Sun Ce build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Pure Sky, Ominous Premonition, Overlord's Platemail, Blood Rage.

faqs.question: How to counter Sun Ce?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying. Strong into Liang, Gan & Mo, Mi Yue.

faqsZh.question: 孫策 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 孫策 為 A 梯度，勝率 48.75%、選取 0.92%、禁用 0.03%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 孫策 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、純淨蒼穹、不祥徵兆、霸者重裝、血魔之怒.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 孫策？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Wukong、Musashi、Ying。孫策 克制 Liang、Gan & Mo、Mi Yue。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Liang, Gan & Mo, Mi Yue. Weak into: Wukong, Musashi, Ying.

guide.overview: Sun Ce is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.1% win rate and 0.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Sun Ce — built around Raging Tide (Tank).
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Blazing Cape, then complete Pure Sky, Succubus Cloak, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Sun Ce's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Wave Render → Typhoon → Set Sail! → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Set Sail! (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Wave Render, and Set Sail! on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Wave Render → Typhoon → Set Sail! → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Sun Ce is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.1% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Sun Ce.
comparisons: Sun Ce vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 2.3% more often globally. Choose Sun Ce when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Sun Ce vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 3.2% more often globally. Choose Sun Ce when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

name: Sun Bin

skills.name: Hourglass of Time
skills.description: Gains a Movement Speed bonus after using skills.

skills.name: Time Bomb
skills.description: Fires a bomb in the target direction, which deals damage and attaches itself to the hit enemy. After a brief delay, inflicts area damage and slow.

skills.name: Time Flux
skills.description:
Increases his and nearby teammates' Movement Speed. When the effect ends, he restores Health equal to 25% of the damage taken during the effect's duration.
Passive: Gains Cooldown Reduction.

skills.name: Time Lapse
skills.description: Throws a bomb in the target direction, inflicting area damage, slow, and silence upon coming in contact with an enemy or reaching its max range. After a brief delay, the bomb deals area damage again.

skillsZh.name: 時間沙漏
skillsZh.description: 使用技能後獲得移速加成。

skillsZh.name: 時空爆彈
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射炸彈，擊中敵人後造成傷害並附著在身上，短暫延遲後，造成範圍傷害和減速效果。

skillsZh.name: 時之波動
skillsZh.description:
提升自身及周圍一定範圍內的友方英雄移動速度，效果結束後，返還移速增加期間25%所承受傷害的生命值。
被動：獲得技能冷卻縮減。

skillsZh.name: 時光流逝
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向投擲炸彈，接觸敵人或達到最遠射程後造成範圍傷害減速和沉默，短暫延遲後再次造成範圍傷害。

tips: Sun Bin (Support): Tier B — 48.64% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Dawnlight, Succubus Cloak, Venomous Staff.
tipsZh: 孫臏（遊走）：梯度 B，勝率 48.64%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：旭日初光、魔女斗篷、夢魘之牙.

patchHistory.change: Skill 1 damage increased, Skill 2's cooldown reduced
Reduced some skill effects, and increased some skill multipliers.
patchHistory.detail: Sun Bin becomes very powerful after reaching a certain level and getting the right equipment, to the point where many unique lineups can be created around him. Since he's currently also pretty powerful during the early game, we lowered some of his basic skill stats and increased some of his skill multipliers so that he can become more of a true late-game hero.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the basic Movement Speed bonus from his Skill 2, while increasing the additional bonus received per skill level.
patchHistory.detail: Sun Bin is a hero with a very high performance ceiling, and many strategies and lineups in the game are centered on him. Although Sun Bin is a late-game hero, he does have considerable capabilities in the early game. For instance, he can easily use his Skill 2 speed-up to run up to you, throw a Time Bomb at you and then speed away before you can hit back. This is why we decided to reduce Skill 2's base Movement Speed bonus while increasing its rate of increase per level. The Movement Speed bonus when Skill 2 is fully leveled remains the same. We hope that with these adjustments Sun Bin will be more in line with his positioning as a late-game hero, with measured capabilities in the early game.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升1技能傷害，縮短2技能冷卻時間
Reduced some skill effects, and increased some skill multipliers.

Since he's currently also pretty powerful during the early game, we lowered some of his basic skill stats and increased some of his skill multipliers so that he can become more of a true late-game hero.

Although Sun Bin is a late-game hero, he does have considerable capabilities in the early game. For instance, he can easily use his Skill 2 speed-up to run up to you, throw a Time Bomb at you and then speed away before you can hit back. This is why we decided to reduce Skill 2's base Movement Speed bonus while increasing its rate of increase per level. The Movement Speed bonus when Skill 2 is fully leveled remains the same. We hope that with these adjustments Sun Bin will be more in line with his positioning as a late-game hero, with measured capabilities in the early game.

guide.overview: Sun Bin is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.2% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Sun Bin: Gains a Movement Speed bonus after using skills.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Glacial Buckler, Succubus Cloak, then complete Venomous Staff, Sage's Sanctuary. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Sun Bin's Support kit. Take Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Time Bomb → Time Flux → Time Lapse → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Time Lapse (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Time Bomb, and Time Lapse on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Time Bomb → Time Flux → Time Lapse → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Sun Bin sits at Tier B globally (50.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Sun Bin vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Sun Bin has +4.1% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Sun Bin when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Sun Bin vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Cai Yan wins 0.1% more often globally. Choose Sun Bin when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Sun Bin excels into Kaizer, Musashi. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.

name: Donghuang

skills.name: Soul Sacrifice
skills.description: Every time a dark orb passes through an enemy, it deals damage and restores Health to him.

skills.name: Eclipse
skills.description:
Deals damage to enemies within range and summons a dark orb. There can be 3 dark orbs at a time.
Hitting enemies with this skill reduces its cooldown, and with 3 dark orbs, it restores Health.

skills.name: Dark Impact
skills.description:
Unleashes up to 3 dark orbs at the target location, increasing his Movement Speed and dealing damage to enemies in range.
The 1st and 2nd dark orbs slow enemies.
The 3rd dark orb stuns enemies.

skills.name: Forsaken Contract
skills.description:
Suppresses an enemy hero and summons 3 dark orbs.
If he or the target takes damage during suppression, the other will take the same amount of damage.

skillsZh.name: 暗冕之噬
skillsZh.description: 黑暗能量體每次經過敵人會造成傷害並使東皇太一回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 日蝕祭典
skillsZh.description:
對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害，並召喚一個黑暗能量體。黑暗能量體最多可同時擁有三個。
施放技能命中敵人會減少技能冷卻，擁有三個能量體時回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 曜龍燭兆
skillsZh.description:
一次將環繞自身所有的黑暗能量體(最多三個)向指定位置依次投擲並加速，對範圍內敵人造成傷害。
第一、第二個黑暗能量體額外造成減速效果。
第三個黑暗能量體額外造成暈眩效果。

skillsZh.name: 墮神契約
skillsZh.description:
壓制目標敵方英雄，召喚三個黑暗能量體。
壓制期間，東皇太一或被壓制目標受到傷害時，對方會承受相同數值的傷害。

guide.overview: Donghuang is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 48.7% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Donghuang: Every time a dark orb passes through an enemy, it damages and restores Health to him.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Deftness, Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, then complete Augur's Word, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Donghuang's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Eclipse → Dark Impact → Forsaken Contract → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Forsaken Contract (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Eclipse, and Forsaken Contract on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Eclipse → Dark Impact → Forsaken Contract → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Donghuang is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 3.4% — expect Donghuang to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
