tips: Xiao Qiao (Mage): Tier S — 48.48% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Boots of Deftness, Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath.
tipsZh: 小喬（中路）：梯度 S，勝率 48.48%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：疾步之靴、迴響之杖、博學者之怒.

patchHistory.detail: Work hard and get stronger, Xiao Qiao.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「小喬，要努力變強。」
小喬作為遊戲中非常傳統的法師英雄，她對於一些機動性很強的敵人可以產生很好的克制效果，畢竟她的大招不需要瞄準。然而小喬在當前版本中最大的問題之一，是她如何能夠順利獲得一定的裝備支持併發揮她應有的強度。所以我們適當提高了她1技能的基礎傷害，這樣可以讓小喬更快地清理兵線，從而一定程度上保證了她有更多機會獲得必要的裝備支持。

faqs.question: Is Xiao Qiao good in current season?
faqs.answer: Xiao Qiao is Tier S Mage with 48.48% win rate, 1.7% pick rate, and 0.11% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Xiao Qiao build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Deftness, Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, Splendor, Sage's Tome, Void Staff.

faqs.question: How to counter Xiao Qiao?
faqs.answer: Pick Liu Bei, Menki. Strong into Ukyo Tachibana, Han Xin.

faqsZh.question: 小喬 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 小喬 為 S 梯度，勝率 48.48%、選取 1.7%、禁用 0.11%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 小喬 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：疾步之靴、迴響之杖、博學者之怒、輝月、賢者天書、虛無法杖.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 小喬？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Liu Bei、Menki。小喬 克制 Ukyo Tachibana、Han Xin。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Ukyo Tachibana, Han Xin. Weak into: Liu Bei, Menki.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Ukyo Tachibana、Han Xin；被克制：Liu Bei、Menki

guide.overview: Xiao Qiao is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 48.6% win rate and 1.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Xiao Qiao: Hitting enemies with skills enhances herself, increasing her Movement Speed.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, then complete Insatiable Tome, Void Staff, Splendor. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Xiao Qiao's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Blossoming Fan → Honeysweet Breeze → Meteor Storm → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Meteor Storm (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Blossoming Fan, and Meteor Storm on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Blossoming Fan → Honeysweet Breeze → Meteor Storm → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Xiao Qiao is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Xiao Qiao. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Xiao Qiao vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 2.4% more often globally. Choose Xiao Qiao when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Xiao Qiao vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 3.2% more often globally. Choose Xiao Qiao when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Xiao Qiao excels into Ukyo Tachibana, Han Xin. Avoid blind picking into Liu Bei, Menki without team peel.

name: Han Xin

skills.name: Killing Spear
skills.description: Every 4th Basic Attack launches the target. Hits from skills and enhanced Basic Attacks grant increased Attack Speed.

skills.name: Ruthless Assault
skills.description: Leaps to the target location to deal damage and launch the enemy. The second charge will not launch the enemy.

skills.name: Fight or Die!
skills.description:
Dashes backward and enhances the next Basic Attack to deal extra damage.
If the Fight or Die! sweep is his 4th Basic Attack, it will include the 4th Basic Attack's extra effects.

skills.name: The Unrivaled Spear
skills.description: Swings spear 4 times, gaining damage reduction and crowd control immunity. Deals damage each time and launches enemies the 4th time.

skillsZh.name: 殺意之槍
skillsZh.description: 韓信第四次普攻會擊飛目標，技能和強化普攻命中後會強化自身攻速。

skillsZh.name: 無情衝鋒
skillsZh.description: 躍向指定位置對敵人造成傷害和擊飛，第二次衝鋒不會造成擊飛。

skillsZh.name: 背水一戰
skillsZh.description:
向後位移並強化下一次普攻，額外造成傷害。
若【背水一戰】的橫掃處於第四次普攻時，橫掃會一起打出第四次普攻的額外效果。

skillsZh.name: 國士無雙
skillsZh.description: 揮動四次長槍，獲得霸體和免傷，每次造成傷害，第四次額外造成擊飛。

tips: Han Xin (Assassin): Tier B — 48.39% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Rapacious Bite, Frostscar's Embrace, Bloodweeper.
tipsZh: 韓信（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 48.39%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：貪婪之噬、冰痕之握、泣血之刃.

patchHistory.detail: "Han Xin's Skill 2 interrupting his Passive has been a huge pain point for players for a long time now. We've addressed the issue in this update. Additionally, we've enhanced his Passive's effects. Now, the Passive and Skill 2 work together to create a stronger combined effect."

patchHistory.change: Improved base Physical Defense and balanced Ultimate's late game damage
patchHistory.detail: Improved base Physical Defense and balanced Ultimate's late game damage

patchHistory.change: Increased base Health and Skill 1 damage, reduced Skill 1's early game CD.
patchHistory.detail: Han Xin needs an economic advantage to be useful in team fights. We've adjusted his Skill 1 so that he can participate in team fights earlier, and we've boosted his Health to give him a wider margin of error in those team fights

patchHistory.change: Skill 1 and Ultimate Mana costs are increased, and the skill strength of his Ultimate is weakened, while reducing its CD.
patchHistory.detail: Han Xin is well suited for the current game environment and pace of combat. His mobility can help him to quickly travel across the map to clean up monsters and enemies.Even when at a disadvantage, he can quickly clear minion waves to control the enemy.We hope that by increasing Han Xin's Mana Cost, as well as some of the core stats of his Ultimate, it will give his opponents the chance to counter what is a very powerful hero in the new version.

patchHistory.change: Strengthened the Basic Attack damage enhancement gained from Han Xin's Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail: The Basic Attack enhancement granted by Han Xin's Skill 2 lets him quickly kill monsters and minion, and improves his max burst damage. We hope that this adjustment will allow Han Xin to perform better on the field.

patchHistory.change: Increased his Skill 2's physical damage and Mana cost, and adjusted his Ultimate's damage.
patchHistory.detail: Han Xin's strength lies in his extremely high mobility and ability to deliver burst damage once fully equipped. On the other hand, as an assassin jungler, he needs more time to farm, and can often be put on his back foot in tough situations. We hope that by enhancing his Skill 2 and adjusting his Ultimate, he will now be able to clear monsters at a slightly higher speed and become stronger than before with the same equipment. This will allow Han Xin to take part in early game skirmishes sooner.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「一直以來，2技能打斷被動都是操作韓信的一大痛點，本次改善了這一點，同時升級被動效果，讓兩者能互相加成。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高基礎物理防禦，平衡大招前後期傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 提高基礎物理防禦，平衡大招前後期傷害

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升基礎生命值，增加1技能的傷害，並且降低前期冷卻值
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「韓信需要領先一定程度的經濟才有能力參與團戰，我們適當提高1技能的等級成長，讓他能夠更早參與團戰，並且適當提升生命值，藉此提高團戰的容錯率。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 增加1技能和大招的法力消耗，削弱大招的技能強度但是降低其冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 韓信很適應當前的遊戲環境和戰鬥節奏，他的機動性可以幫助他在地圖中快速穿行，收割野怪和敵人。即便在相對逆風的情形下還可以通過快速清理兵線來牽制敵人。我們希望通過增加韓信的法力消耗，和他大招中的一些關鍵數值，使他的敵人可以有機會來反制這名在當前版本中非常強力的英雄

patchHistoryZh.change: Strengthened the Basic Attack damage enhancement gained from Han Xin's Skill 2.
patchHistoryZh.detail: The Basic Attack enhancement granted by Han Xin's Skill 2 lets him quickly kill monsters and minion, and improves his max burst damage. We hope that this adjustment will allow Han Xin to perform better on the field.

patchHistoryZh.change: Increased his Skill 2's physical damage and Mana cost, and adjusted his Ultimate's damage.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Han Xin's strength lies in his extremely high mobility and ability to deliver burst damage once fully equipped. On the other hand, as an assassin jungler, he needs more time to farm, and can often be put on his back foot in tough situations. We hope that by enhancing his Skill 2 and adjusting his Ultimate, he will now be able to clear monsters at a slightly higher speed and become stronger than before with the same equipment. This will allow Han Xin to take part in early game skirmishes sooner.

faqs.question: Is Han Xin good in current season?
faqs.answer: Han Xin is Tier B Assassin with 48.39% win rate, 0.3% pick rate, and 0.06% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Han Xin build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Rapacious Bite, Frostscar's Embrace, Bloodweeper, Blood Rage, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Han Xin?
faqs.answer: Pick Agudo, Alessio, Erin. Strong into Lu Bu, Dun, Xiang Yu.

faqsZh.question: 韓信 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 韓信 為 B 梯度，勝率 48.39%、選取 0.3%、禁用 0.06%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 韓信 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：貪婪之噬、冰痕之握、泣血之刃、血魔之怒、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 韓信？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Agudo、Alessio、Erin。韓信 克制 Lu Bu、Dun、Xiang Yu。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lu Bu, Dun, Xiang Yu. Weak into: Agudo, Alessio, Erin.

guide.overview: Han Xin is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.1% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Han Xin: Han Xin's every 4th Basic Attack launches the target.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Cuirass of Savagery, Master Sword, Eternity Blade. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Han Xin's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Ruthless Assault → Fight or Die! → The Unrivaled Spear → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → The Unrivaled Spear (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Fight or Die! provides mobility or stick—max first. Ruthless Assault second for damage. The Unrivaled Spear on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Ruthless Assault → Fight or Die! → The Unrivaled Spear → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: The Unrivaled Spear after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Han Xin sits at Tier B globally (52.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Han Xin vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Han Xin has +2.4% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Han Xin when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

Han Xin vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Han Xin has +1.4% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Han Xin when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Han Xin excels into Lu Bu, Dun, Xiang Yu. Avoid blind picking into Agudo, Alessio, Erin without team peel.

name: Mai Shiranui

Periodically gains an enhanced Basic Attack that lets her dash while dealing damage and knocking back enemies in her path.
After using an enhanced Basic Attack or any skill, she can roll and gain Movement Speed.

skills.name: KACHOUSEN
skills.description: Throws her fan to damage and slow a target enemy while reducing their Magical Defense. Hits recover Energy. After it hits, the fan also deals magical damage to the closest unit behind the target.

skills.name: CHOU HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI

tips: Mai Shiranui (Assassin): Tier A — 48.36% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Boots of Resistance, Void Staff, Insatiable Tome.
tipsZh: 不知火舞（中路）：梯度 A，勝率 48.36%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：抵抗之靴、虛無法杖、噬神之書.

patchHistory.change: Reduced Skill 2's cooldown and slightly decreased its damage.
patchHistory.detail: This allows Mai Shiranui to use her Skill 2 more frequently, while balancing its damage to prevent instant kills.

patchHistory.change: Reduced Energy Cost for Skill 2 and the Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: "Currently, even when Mai Shiranui has full Energy, missing with a skill can prevent her from completing her full skill combos. We slightly reduced Energy Cost to alleviate this issue."

patchHistory.change: Improved her skill cast indicator to make the area of effect of some of her skills clearer. Skill 2 can now hit up to 2 enemies.
patchHistory.detail: Mai Shiranui is a hero with very complex controls, making her a very difficult hero to master.In the current version, Mai Shiranui's skill mechanics make it very difficult to escape her as she charges forward in the Mid Lane minion wave.We hope that the changes in the new version can help Mai Shiranui to better integrate into the current game environment and demonstrate her advantages.We hope this will give more players the chance to try this hero.

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低2技能的冷卻時間，略微削弱傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「讓不知火舞有更多嘗試2技能的機會，同時削弱了傷害降低對手被秒殺的體驗。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低2技能和3技能的能量消耗
patchHistoryZh.detail: 目前不知火舞即使在能量全滿時，也會因為技能未命中而無法施放完整連招，我們稍微調降能量消耗來緩解這種情況。

patchHistoryZh.change: 優化技能施放指示器，使部分技能的生效範圍更加清晰。2技能現在可以最多命中2名敵人
patchHistoryZh.detail: 不知火舞是一名操作上限很高的英雄，而相應的，她的練習成本同樣很高。而在當前的版本中，不知火舞原有的技能機制使得她很難在中路兵線的不斷推進中脫身。我們希望新版本中的調整可以讓不知火舞更好地融入到當前的遊戲環境中並發揮自身的優勢。讓更多的玩家可以有機會嘗試這名英雄。

faqs.question: Is Mai Shiranui good in current season?
faqs.answer: Mai Shiranui is Tier A Assassin with 48.36% win rate, 0.69% pick rate, and 0.12% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Mai Shiranui build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Resistance, Void Staff, Insatiable Tome, Venomous Staff, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Mai Shiranui?
faqs.answer: Pick Alessio, Charlotte, Di Renjie. Strong into Chano, Lapulapu, Ata.

faqsZh.question: 不知火舞 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 不知火舞 為 A 梯度，勝率 48.36%、選取 0.69%、禁用 0.12%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 不知火舞 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：抵抗之靴、虛無法杖、噬神之書、夢魘之牙、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 不知火舞？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Alessio、Charlotte、Di Renjie。不知火舞 克制 Chano、Lapulapu、Ata。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Chano, Lapulapu, Ata. Weak into: Alessio, Charlotte, Di Renjie.
metaAnalysisZh: 不知火舞 勝率 48.36%（Camp HOK，2026-07-19）

guide.overview: Mai Shiranui is a Medium Assassin (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 48.7% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Mai Shiranui: Periodically gains an enhanced Basic Attack that lets her dash while dealing damage and knocking back enemies in her path.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of Resistance, Savant's Wrath, then complete Insatiable Tome, Void Staff, Splendor. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Mai Shiranui's Assassin kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: HISHOU RYUUENJIN → KACHOUSEN → CHOU HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → CHOU HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: KACHOUSEN provides mobility or stick—max first. HISHOU RYUUENJIN second for damage. CHOU HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: HISHOU RYUUENJIN → KACHOUSEN → CHOU HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: CHOU HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Mai Shiranui is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Mai Shiranui vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Wukong wins 1.0% more often globally. Choose Mai Shiranui when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

Mai Shiranui vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Musashi wins 2.0% more often globally. Choose Mai Shiranui when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Mai Shiranui excels into Chano, Lapulapu, Ata. Avoid blind picking into Alessio, Charlotte, Di Renjie without team peel.

name: Lu Bu

skills.name: Bloodthirsty Ancestry
skills.description: Enchants his weapon when it hits an enemy during Skill 1 or Ultimate. While enchanted, Basic Attacks and Skills deal additional true damage and recover his Health.

skills.name: Impaling Thrust
skills.description: Performs a sweep attack on the target area. Restores a certain amount of Health with each enemy hero hit. Failing to hit a hero will cause his enhancement to disappear.

skills.name: Souleater
skills.description: Slows and damages enemies in the target area and gains a shield for each enemy hit (up to 3 stacks). The shield value is converted to Health over time.

skills.name: Tremble, Mortals
skills.description:
Leaps to the target location, launching and damaging enemies within range upon landing, then forming a ring of slaughter.
While inside the ring, he gains increased Physical and Magical Defense, while enemies suffer damage and slow.

skillsZh.name: 饕餮血統
skillsZh.description: 呂布揮斬方天畫戟的技能命中敵方英雄後會為武器附魔，方天畫戟在附魔狀態下，普攻和技能都會造成等額的真實傷害並回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 方天畫斬
skillsZh.description: 向指定區域進行橫掃攻擊，命中每個敵方英雄會回復一定生命值，沒有命中英雄則使自身強化效果消失。

skillsZh.name: 貪狼之握
skillsZh.description: 對指定範圍方向的敵人造成減速和傷害，每命中一位敵人獲得一層護盾值(最高三層)，護盾值會隨時間衰減並轉化為生命值回復。

skillsZh.name: 魔神降世
skillsZh.description:
向指定位置跳躍，落地後擊飛並傷害自身周圍一定範圍內的敵人，形成一個殺戮場域。
殺戮場域中，呂布增加物理防禦和法術防禦，對敵人造成傷害和減速效果。

tips: Lu Bu (Tank): Tier S — 48.35% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Destiny, Blood Rage, Overlord's Might.
tipsZh: 呂布（對抗路）：梯度 S，勝率 48.35%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：名刀・司命、血魔之怒、強者破軍.

patchHistory.change: Basic Attacks and skills deal true damage when enhanced and gain Physical Pierce when not enchanted.
patchHistory.detail: True damage is the highlight of Lu Bu's playstyle, but it's not always possible to enchant his weapon. Therefore, we have added a new mechanic so Lu Bu can deal more damage when unenchanted.

"We've increased the damage of Lu Bu's Skill 2 to prevent opponents from escaping with low Health. His restoration and shield capabilities benefit much more from high-attack builds compared to survival-focused builds, so we've made adjustments accordingly."

patchHistory.change: Increased recovery from his Ultimate under certain conditions, and increased recovery when his Skill 1 hits an enemy.
patchHistory.detail: As a very powerful late-game hero, with the right equipment, Lu Bu has both very high damage potential and very high damage absorption potential. But in the early game, his power is a little low. Therefore, we've made some minor improvements to his recovery ability to make it easier for him to reach the mid to late game.

patchHistoryZh.change: 強化時普攻和技能造成真實傷害，未附魔時增加物理穿透
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「大量真實傷害是呂布的重要精彩體驗，但不是每次都有機會讓武器附魔；因此我們加入了新的機制，讓呂布在未附魔狀態下的傷害有所提升。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 2技能新增傷害，降低後期冷卻
patchHistoryZh.detail: 我們為呂布2技能增加了傷害，防止對手殘血逃跑；目前，呂布出高攻擊力套裝的恢復和護盾能力收益，會遠高於其出偏重生存能力的套裝，因此我們已加以調整。

patchHistoryZh.change: 增強大招在一定條件下的恢復效果，增強1技能命中敵人後的恢復效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 呂布作為一名後期強度很高的英雄，在獲得一定的裝備支持後，他可以同時兼具很高的傷害製造能力和很高傷害吸收能力。但是在遊戲前期，他的強度有些不足。因此我們對他的恢復能力進行了小幅強化，保證他可以更好的過渡到遊戲中後期。

faqs.question: Is Lu Bu good in current season?
faqs.answer: Lu Bu is Tier S Tank with 48.35% win rate, 1.21% pick rate, and 0.17% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Lu Bu build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Destiny, Blood Rage, Overlord's Might, Demonsbane, Sage's Sanctuary, Immovable - Sky Dome.

faqs.question: How to counter Lu Bu?
faqs.answer: Pick Han Xin, Lam, Pei. Strong into Heino, Daji, Luna.

faqsZh.question: 呂布 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 呂布 為 S 梯度，勝率 48.35%、選取 1.21%、禁用 0.17%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 呂布 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：名刀・司命、血魔之怒、強者破軍、破魔刀、賢者的庇護、不動・天穹.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 呂布？

guide.overview: Lu Bu is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 48.3% win rate and 1.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Lu Bu: Becomes enhanced when Skill 1 or Ultimate hits an enemy hero.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Succubus Cloak, Blazing Cape, then complete Overlord's Platemail, Sage's Sanctuary. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Lu Bu's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Impaling Thrust → Souleater → Tremble, Mortals → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Tremble, Mortals (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Impaling Thrust, and Tremble, Mortals on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Impaling Thrust → Souleater → Tremble, Mortals → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Lu Bu is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.3% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.2% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Lu Bu. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Lu Bu vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 3.1% more often globally. Choose Lu Bu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Lu Bu vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 4.0% more often globally. Choose Lu Bu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Lu Bu excels into Heino, Daji, Luna. Avoid blind picking into Han Xin, Lam, Pei without team peel.

name: Flowborn (Tank)

skills.name: Flow of the World
skills.description:
Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
Vitality: Increases max Health and Physical and Magical Defense.
Piercing Heart: Increases max Health and Physical Attack.
Haste: Increases max Health and Movement Speed.
Focus: Increases max Health and Cooldown Reduction.
Spend 1 stack of Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack and deal damage and gain recovery.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.description:
Channels the Flow, reducing the cooldown of other skills by 50%. Also gains 5–9 stacks of Flow based on the number of nearby heroes and minions and recovers Health based on Flow stacks.
Damages and knocks back nearby enemies (without applying crowd control).

skills.name: Power From Within
skills.description:
Charges at the target and slashes, dealing damage, launching enemies, and gaining a shield.
Using the skill continuously over a short time converts it to Clearing Slash and Rifting Slash.
If the skill is not on cooldown, spend 4 stacks of Flow to stop it from entering cooldown after use.

skills.name: All In
skills.description:
Leaps to the target location and attacks, dealing damage and launching enemies.
If the skill is not on cooldown, spend 5 stacks of Flow to stop it from entering cooldown after this use.

skillsZh.name: 萬物為流
skillsZh.description:
元流之子在泉水中可以切換「流」增強屬性。
生機：增加最大生命值和物理及法術防禦。
穿心：增加最大生命值和物理攻擊。
迅疾：增加最大生命值和移動速度。
凝神：增加最大生命值和冷卻時間縮減。
元流之子可消耗1層「流」強化普攻，額外造成傷害和回復。

skillsZh.name: 匯流為一
skillsZh.description:
元流之子匯集「流」，減少50%其他技能的冷卻時間，根據附近英雄和小兵數量獲得「流」，至少獲得5層，最多9層，根據「流」的層數回復生命值。
元流之子對近處的敵人造成傷害和擊退(無控制效果)。

skillsZh.name: 以身為引
skillsZh.description:
元流之子朝指定目標衝鋒並向前斬擊，造成傷害和擊飛，並獲得護盾。
短時間內連續施放會使技能轉為【撥雲式】和【斬壑式】。
若技能不在冷卻時間內，可消耗4層「流」施放技能，並使該次技能施放後不進入冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 傾注一擊
skillsZh.description:
元流之子向指定位置躍擊，造成傷害和擊退。
若技能不在冷卻時間內，可消耗5層「流」施放技能，並使該次技能施放後不進入冷卻時間。

name: Shangguan

skills.name: Piercing Brush
skills.description: Enhances every 3rd Basic Attack, causing it to deal pierce damage. Deals damage when ink from different skills come in contact. Gains an enhanced Basic Attack and recovers Health if she is also nearby when they do.

skills.name: Ink Burst
skills.description: Flings a powerful drop of ink, which deals damage to enemies in its path and explodes to deal extra damage at the end of its range.

skills.name: Seething Script
skills.description: Summons a brush to write at the target location, dealing damage and slowing enemies in its path.

skills.name: Finishing Stroke
skills.description: Dashes wildly with her brush, dealing damage to enemies in her path. Can dash again if she passes through an enemy or ink left by another skill. After dashing 3–5 times, becomes untargetable and continuously attacks nearby enemies.

skillsZh.name: 筆陣
skillsZh.description: 第三次普攻獲得強化，造成貫穿傷害。不同技能的筆墨碰撞時，對周圍造成傷害。觸碰筆力可獲得強化普攻並回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 篆法・疾勢
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向揮出筆墨對路徑上的敵人造成傷害，達到最遠距離後，造成額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 飛白・藏鋒
skillsZh.description: 在指定位置召喚筆書寫，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 章草・橫鱗
skillsZh.description: 與筆墨共舞，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害。衝刺期間，觸碰敵人或筆勢可再次衝刺，完成3~5次衝刺後，進入無法鎖定為目標狀態，對周圍敵人持續造成傷害。

guide.overview: Shangguan is a Medium Assassin (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 47.7% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Shangguan: Enhances every 3rd Basic Attack, causing it to deal pierce damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of Tranquility, Savant's Wrath, then complete Insatiable Tome, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Shangguan's Assassin kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Ink Burst → Seething Script → Finishing Stroke → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Finishing Stroke (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Seething Script provides mobility or stick—max first. Ink Burst second for damage. Finishing Stroke on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Ink Burst → Seething Script → Finishing Stroke → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Finishing Stroke after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Shangguan sits at Tier B globally (47.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Shangguan vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Wukong wins 2.0% more often globally. Choose Shangguan when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Shangguan vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Musashi wins 3.0% more often globally. Choose Shangguan when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Shangguan excels into Diaochan, Mulan, Sima Yi. Avoid blind picking into Augran, Biron, Musashi without team peel.

skills.name: Occult Arts - Zhi Chu Luan
skills.description: Tosses paper birds, which deal damage to enemies in their path.

skills.name: Occult Arts - Dispersal
skills.description: Vanishes, cleansing all crowd control effects, then reappears in the target location after a brief delay.

skillsZh.name: 祕術・操控

skillsZh.name: 祕術・影
skillsZh.description: 元歌擲出傀儡對路徑敵人造成傷害和擊飛，並開始操縱傀儡。

skillsZh.name: 祕術・紙雛鸞
skillsZh.description: 元歌擲出暗器對路徑敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 祕術・散
skillsZh.description: 元歌立即消失並解控，短暫延遲後位移到另一個位置。

faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Daji, Angela. Strong into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer.

guide.overview: Yango is a Medium Assassin (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 49.5% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Yango: PuppetRecovery Chance gaining Hero Shards and recover Health when attacking.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Deepfrost Siege, then complete Pure Sky, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Yango's Assassin kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Occult Arts - Umbra → Occult Arts - Zhi Chu Luan → Occult Arts - Shadow Crucifixion → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Occult Arts - Shadow Crucifixion (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Occult Arts - Zhi Chu Luan provides mobility or stick—max first. Occult Arts - Umbra second for damage. Occult Arts - Shadow Crucifixion on every level.

combos.steps: Occult Arts - Umbra → Occult Arts - Zhi Chu Luan → Occult Arts - Shadow Crucifixion → weave basic attacks

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Yango sits at Tier B globally (49.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Yango vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Wukong wins 0.2% more often globally. Choose Yango when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

name: Lady Sun

skills.name: Energy Burst
skills.description: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Skill 1.

skills.name: Rolling Raid
skills.description:
Rolls in the target direction, gaining an enhanced Basic Attack that has extra range and pierces through enemies.
Gains Movement Speed if there are enemy heroes nearby after rolling.

skills.name: Frag Grenade
skills.description: Throws a grenade at the target location, damaging and marking enemies hit, reducing their Physical Defense by 10%. Her Basic Attack deals extra damage to marked targets.

skills.name: Ultimate Shell
skills.description: Fires a shot in the target direction, dealing area damage when enemies are hit or when exploding at max range.

skillsZh.name: 活力迸發
skillsZh.description: 每次普攻減少1技能冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 翻滾突襲
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向翻滾，並使下次普攻增加射程並具有穿透效果。
翻滾後，附近若有敵方英雄，則增加自身移動速度。

skillsZh.name: 紅蓮爆彈
skillsZh.description: 向指定區域投擲手榴彈，對命中敵人造成傷害並標記，技能命中減少敵人10%物理防禦，孫尚香的普攻對標記目標造成額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 究極弩砲
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射砲彈，接觸敵人或達到最遠射程後發生爆炸，造成範圍傷害。

guide.overview: Lady Sun is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 48.3% win rate and 2.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Lady Sun: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Skill 1.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, then complete Bloodweeper, Shadow Ripper, Daybreaker's Virtue. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Dominator for stats that match Lady Sun's Marksman kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Rolling Raid → Frag Grenade → Ultimate Shell → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Ultimate Shell (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Rolling Raid is your lane trade tool. Frag Grenade second. Ultimate Shell whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Rolling Raid → Frag Grenade → Ultimate Shell → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Lady Sun is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 2.1% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Lady Sun. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Lady Sun vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Hou Yi wins 1.0% more often globally. Choose Lady Sun when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Lady Sun vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Marco Polo wins 1.8% more often globally. Choose Lady Sun when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Lady Sun excels into Diaochan, Nakoruru, Ying. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.

skills.name: Deer Spirit
skills.description: When inflicted with crowd control effects (excluding suppression), gains immunity to all effects.

skills.name: Wandering Beam
skills.description:
Releases a soul in the target direction, which tracks nearby enemies after reaching its max range.
The soul launches and deals damage to enemies hit.
In deer spirit form, using this skill will restore her to Human Form.

skills.name: Accelerating Blitz
skills.description:
Deals continuous damage to nearby enemies.
Attached: Increased range.

skills.name: Verdant Protector
skills.description:
Attaches herself to a teammate, providing a true damage shield and enhancing her own skill effects.
Attached: When the shield is exhausted, the attachment ends and the skill goes on cooldown. Actively detaching reduces the cooldown.

skillsZh.name: 山鬼・白鹿
skillsZh.description: 受到除壓制外的控制後免疫所有效果。

對命中敵人造成傷害和擊飛效果。
鹿形態下使用則變回人形態。

skillsZh.name: 風颯木蕭
skillsZh.description:
持續對周圍敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 獨立兮山之上
skillsZh.description:
附身到友軍英雄上，提供真實護盾並強化自身技能效果。
附身狀態：打破護盾會結束附身並進入冷卻，主動結束會減少該技能冷卻。

tips: Build: Overlord's Platemail, Succubus Cloak, Sage's Sanctuary.
tipsZh: 瑤（遊走）：梯度 S，勝率 48.05%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：霸者重裝、魔女斗篷、賢者的庇護.

patchHistory.change: Passive's CD reduces with level, adjusted shield multiplier
patchHistory.detail: In the mid to late game, most heroes' skills get shorter cooldowns and higher DPS. The cooldown of Yaria's passive feels quite long in comparison, so we've reduced its cooldown per hero level. The effect of Yaria's shield will now also vary based on the target.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the shield granted by her Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: At the beginning of the new season, we made certain adjustments to support equipment that have, in most cases, enhanced the strength of support-type heroes. With the introduction of certain support equipment in the update, Yaria's Ultimate shield has become even harder to wear down. Very often, together with the teammate she is attached to, Yaria has been able to create a whole that is far greater than the sum of its parts. We hope that with this slight adjustment to her Ultimate's stats, we will see fewer lopsided fights as a result of this issue.

patchHistoryZh.change: 被動冷卻隨等級成長而降低，調整護盾係數
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「相較於中後期對手技能冷卻的縮減和傷害的提高，瑤的被動技能觸發間隔顯得有點太長，因此我們調整了隨等級成長的冷卻時間；同時瑤的護盾也會隨著保護的目標而發生改變。」

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced the shield granted by her Ultimate.
patchHistoryZh.detail: At the beginning of the new season, we made certain adjustments to support equipment that have, in most cases, enhanced the strength of support-type heroes. With the introduction of certain support equipment in the update, Yaria's Ultimate shield has become even harder to wear down. Very often, together with the teammate she is attached to, Yaria has been able to create a whole that is far greater than the sum of its parts. We hope that with this slight adjustment to her Ultimate's stats, we will see fewer lopsided fights as a result of this issue.

guide.overview: Yaria is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 48.0% win rate and 1.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Yaria: When inflicted with crowd control effects (excluding suppression), gains immunity to all effects.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Crimson Shadow, Boots of Tranquility, Frozen Breath, then complete Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak, Overlord's Platemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Yaria's Support kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Wandering Beam → Accelerating Blitz → Verdant Protector → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Verdant Protector (max Skill 2 first)

combos.name: Standard trade

guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Yaria is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.3% — expect Yaria to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

name: Milady

skills.name: Mechanical Minions
skills.description: Summons minions upon killing a unit. Minions attack automatically, then merge into an advanced bot or explode at the end of their duration, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Air Superiority
skills.description:
Commands her aircraft to move in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path.
Using the skill again splits the aircraft in two, damaging and slowing enemies.

skills.name: Forced Invasion
skills.description: Summons mechanical minions in the target area, dealing area damage before automatically attacking nearby enemies.

skills.name: Chaos Field
skills.description:
Marks a target enemy or structure, damaging them over time. Non-structures are also stunned and slowed. Nearby mechanical minions are enhanced while the mark is active.
The mark explodes upon expiry, dealing damage proportional to the damage taken while marked.

skillsZh.name: 機械僕從
skillsZh.description: 米萊狄擊殺單位會召喚僕從。僕從自動攻擊，持續時間結束後合體為高級機器人，或自爆對周圍敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 空中力量
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向釋放飛行器，對沿途敵人造成單體傷害。
期間若再次使用技能，飛行器會分裂為兩個，對敵人造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 強制入侵
skillsZh.description: 召喚機械僕從降落至指定區域，對敵人造成範圍傷害，隨後自主攻擊附近敵人。

skillsZh.name: 浩劫磁場
skillsZh.description:
標記目標敵人或建築造成持續傷害，並使非建築目標暈眩和減速，同時強化標記附近的機械僕從。
期間目標所受傷害越高，標記最終爆炸傷害越高。

faqs.answer: Milady is Tier S+ Mage with 48% win rate, 1.92% pick rate, and 1.44% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Milady build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, Mask of Agony, Twilight Stream, Venomous Staff, Splendor.

faqs.question: How to counter Milady?
faqs.answer: Pick Allain, Fuzi, Haya. Strong into Nakoruru, Pei, Mai Shiranui.

faqsZh.answer: 米萊狄 為 S+ 梯度，勝率 48%、選取 1.92%、禁用 1.44%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

guide.overview: Milady is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 49.0% win rate and 1.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Milady: Summons minions upon killing a unit.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Mask of Agony, Void Staff, then complete Twilight Stream, Venomous Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Milady's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Air Superiority → Forced Invasion → Chaos Field → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Chaos Field (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Air Superiority, and Chaos Field on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Air Superiority → Forced Invasion → Chaos Field → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Milady is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 2.4% — expect Milady to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Milady vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 2.1% more often globally. Choose Milady when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Milady vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 2.9% more often globally. Choose Milady when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Milady excels into Nakoruru, Pei, Mai Shiranui. Avoid blind picking into Allain, Fuzi, Haya without team peel.

skills.name: Explosion of Fragrance
skills.description: Applies stacks to the opponent. At max stacks, deals area damage and slows enemies, while recovering Health.

skills.name: Returning Lotus
skills.description: Sends out a lotus in the target direction that returns to her when it reaches its max distance, damaging enemies in its path.

skills.name: Petals in the Wind
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, becoming untargetable during the dash. Releases petals to attack nearby enemies, dealing damage and reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.

skills.name: Flowery Potential
skills.description: Conjures up a magic circle around her, which lasts for a period of time. While she is within the circle, the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2 are sped up. The circle deals damage to enemies within it when it is conjured and when it expires.

skillsZh.name: 語・花印
skillsZh.description: 為對手疊層，滿層後造成範圍傷害和減速，並回復自身生命值。

skillsZh.name: 落・紅雨
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射花球，達到最遠距離後返回貂蟬所在位置，對沿途敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 緣・心結
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向突進，期間無法鎖定為目標，發射花球攻擊附近敵人，造成傷害並減少2技能冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 綻・風華
skillsZh.description: 在原地生成法陣一段時間，貂蟬位於法陣範圍內可加快1技能和2技能冷卻。法陣生成和結束時，對範圍內敵人造成傷害。

tips: Build: Twilight Stream, Insatiable Tome, Boots of Resistance.
tipsZh: 貂蟬（中路）：梯度 A，勝率 47.95%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：日暮之流、噬神之書、抵抗之靴.

patchHistory.detail: "Diaochan is one of only a few mages who have to get up close and personal with her enemies. This leaves her more vulnerable to attacks, so we've enhanced her base stats in order to help her shine."

patchHistory.change: Made cooldown reduction for Skill 2 smoother.
patchHistory.detail: "Diaochan's Skill 2 provides a significant cooldown reduction when hitting enemies, but it can be very frustrating when a miss disrupts follow-up combos.  In order to alleviate this, we've made the cooldown reduction mechanism more continuous."

Reduced Health per level.
Diaochan is getting a lot of opportunities to farm, so she's reaching peak power very quickly.With the right equipment, she's very hard to counter.As such, we're reducing her base Health to give her a smaller margin of error.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「作為法師，貂蟬是為數不多需要在人群中起舞的，因此也面臨著更多危險；我們適當提高她的基礎屬性，讓她有更多展示精華表現的可能性。」
貂蟬的2技能命中敵人時，會有很高的冷卻返還收益，但失手時也會帶給玩家很強的挫敗感，影響後續的技能銜接。我們嘗試將2技能冷卻返還機制由離散變得更連續，提升貂蟬玩家的使用體驗。

patchHistoryZh.change: 適當降低貂蟬隨等級成長的生命值
patchHistoryZh.detail:
适当降低貂蝉随等级成长的生命值。
貂蝉在当前版本的节奏中可以获得更好的发育空间，从而更快地来到她的强势期。当貂蝉获得了一定的装备支持后，她将变得难以被反制。我们适度降低了她的基础生命，希望借此可以降低她的容错性

skills.name: Fearless Chariot
skills.description: Charges up when Basic Attacks and unenhanced skills hit. Charged skills gain extra effects. When charged to at least 1 bars, Basic Attacks recover Health on hit.

skills.name: Electrifying Charge
skills.description:
Swings his weapon in the target direction, dealing damage and recovering Health with every hit.
While charged, deals more damage and recovers more Health.

skills.name: Storm Strike
skills.description:
Dashes in the target direction, gaining an enhanced Basic Attack that deals damage and slows targets.
While charged, the next Basic Attack deals more damage, and the slow effect is changed to a launch effect.

skills.name: Force Field Suppression
skills.description:
Damages and slows nearby enemies while gaining a shield.
When charged, deals more damage, grants a stronger shield, and generates an electric wave that damages nearby enemies while stealing Movement Speed from enemy heroes.

蓄能後下次普攻造成的傷害更高，且減速效果變為擊飛。

skillsZh.name: 力場壓制
skillsZh.description:
對附近敵人造成傷害和減速，同時自身獲得護盾。
強化後，造成的傷害和獲得的護盾更多，額外產生電弧對附近敵人造成傷害，並吸取敵方英雄的移動速度。

faqs.question: Is Biron good in current season?
faqs.answer: Biron is Tier A Tank with 47.84% win rate, 0.88% pick rate, and 0.07% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Biron build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Glacial Buckler, Boots of Tranquility, Dragon's Rage, Axe of Torment, Succubus Cloak, Ominous Premonition.

faqs.question: How to counter Biron?
faqs.answer: Pick Lady Sun, Sun Bin. Strong into Dun, Wukong.

faqsZh.question: 狂鐵 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 狂鐵 為 A 梯度，勝率 47.84%、選取 0.88%、禁用 0.07%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 狂鐵 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：極寒風暴、冷靜之靴、怒龍劍盾、暗影戰斧、魔女斗篷、不祥徵兆.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 狂鐵？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Lady Sun、Sun Bin。狂鐵 克制 Dun、Wukong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Dun, Wukong. Weak into: Lady Sun, Sun Bin.

guide.overview: Biron is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 48.4% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Biron: Accumulates charge when Basic Attacks or unenhanced skills land hits, for up to 3 bars of charge.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, then complete Pure Sky, Cuirass of Savagery, Demonsbane. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Biron's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Electrifying Charge → Storm Strike → Force Field Suppression → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Force Field Suppression (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Electrifying Charge, and Force Field Suppression on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Electrifying Charge → Storm Strike → Force Field Suppression → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Biron is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Biron. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Biron vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 3.0% more often globally. Choose Biron when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Biron vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 3.9% more often globally. Choose Biron when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Biron excels into Dun, Wukong. Avoid blind picking into Lady Sun, Sun Bin without team peel.

name: Ao'yin

skills.name: Hidden Dragon
skills.description:
The Dragon Souls from his last 2 skill uses grant effects to his Basic Attacks, which deal physical damage to up to two enemies.
He gains 1 mark upon using skills, for up to 3 marks. Basic Attacks consume all marks for various effects, striking once per mark.

skills.name: Flaming Palm
skills.description:
Deals physical damage and true damage. Attaches a Fire Dragon Soul to his sword.
Basic Attacks deal extra damage when this Soul is attached. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal both physical damage and true damage.

skills.name: Downpour
skills.description:
Deals physical damage and recovers Health upon hit. Attaches a Water Dragon Soul to his sword.
Basic Attacks restore Health and Mana when this Soul is attached. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal physical damage and restore Health, but restore less for hits on non-hero units.

skills.name: Infinite Vastness
skills.description:
Soars into the sky for up to 4.5s, then dives forward to damage and slow enemies. Landing deals equal damage and applies Dread.
Gains Attack Speed and Attack Range. Basic Attacks hit 2 more enemies.
Can switch Dragon Souls mid-flight.

skillsZh.name: 隱介藏形
skillsZh.description:
敖隱最後2次技能的元素龍魂會附於主副劍指上，普攻會用主劍指造成物理傷害，若附近有其他敵人，則用副劍指攻擊目標，造成物理傷害。
敖隱使用技能會疊加1層龍魂印記，最多3層，敖隱的下次普攻會消耗所有印記，驅使龍魂衝擊目標，每消耗1層印記則多攻擊1次。強化普攻會根據主劍指的龍魂屬性附帶不同效果。
受到多條龍魂攻擊時，後續的龍魂只會造成50%傷害。切換元素時，優先保留相同元素龍魂。

skillsZh.name: 薄日掌火
skillsZh.description:
敖隱揮出劍氣，對範圍內敵人造成物理傷害和真實傷害，並額外疊加1層龍魂印記。
使用【薄日掌火】後會將1層火龍魂附於劍指上，普攻附帶額外物理傷害，若雙劍指均附著火龍魂，則再額外增加物理傷害。若火龍魂附於主劍指上，強化普攻造成物理傷害和真實傷害。

skillsZh.name: 擎天司雨
skillsZh.description:
敖隱揮出劍氣，對範圍內敵人造成物理傷害，命中後回復生命值。
使用【擎天司雨】後會將1層水龍魂附於劍指上，普攻額外回復生命值和法力值，若雙劍指均附著水龍魂，則再額外增加回復。若水龍魂附於主劍指上，強化普攻造成物理傷害，命中後回復生命值。
命中回復效果對非英雄單位有衰減。

skillsZh.name: 窮乎玄間
skillsZh.description:
敖隱顯露白龍真身衝上雲霄，期間無法攻擊、無視地形且無法鎖定為目標，最多持續4.5秒(可提前結束)，隨後向前俯衝(過程中無法鎖定為目標)，對路徑上的敵人造成物理傷害和減速，並在落點處對敵人再次造成同等傷害和懼龍效果，持續1秒。
隨後敖隱顯露真龍雪劍，提升攻速和射程，持續10秒。期間敖隱使用真龍雪劍攻擊，此時雙劍指會攻擊附近至多2名額外目標。
受到懼龍效果的目標會不由自主地遠離敖隱。敖隱飛行期間可以任意調整劍指的元素龍魂。

出裝：宗師之力、仁者破曉、強者破軍.

faqs.question: Is Ao'yin good in current season?
faqs.answer: Ao'yin is Tier S+ Marksman with 47.8% win rate, 1.52% pick rate, and 3.16% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Ao'yin build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Master Sword, Daybreaker's Virtue, Overlord's Might, Shadow Ripper, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Ao'yin?
faqs.answer: Pick Kaizer, Dun, Arthur. Strong into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong.

faqsZh.question: 敖隱 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 敖隱 為 S+ 梯度，勝率 47.8%、選取 1.52%、禁用 3.16%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 敖隱 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：宗師之力、仁者破曉、強者破軍、影刃、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 敖隱？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Kaizer、Dun、Arthur。敖隱 克制 Liu Bei、Athena、Zilong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong. Weak into: Kaizer, Dun, Arthur.

guide.overview: Ao'yin is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 48.4% win rate and 1.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Ao'yin: The Dragon Souls from his last 2 skill uses grant effects to his Basic Attacks, which deal physical damage to up to two enemies.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Eternity Blade, Boots of Dexterity, Shadow Ripper, then complete Daybreaker's Virtue, Doomsday, Overlord's Might. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Penetration for stats that match Ao'yin's Marksman kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Flaming Palm → Downpour → Riding the Wind → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Riding the Wind (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Flaming Palm is your lane trade tool. Downpour second. Riding the Wind whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Flaming Palm → Downpour → Riding the Wind → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Ao'yin is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 5.1% — expect Ao'yin to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Ao'yin vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Hou Yi wins 0.9% more often globally. Choose Ao'yin when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Ao'yin vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Marco Polo wins 1.6% more often globally. Choose Ao'yin when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Ao'yin excels into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.

name: Dyadia

skills.name: Melodic Swing
skills.description:
Enhances her next Basic Attack periodically to swing toward the enemy, dealing damage and knocking them back, then jumping back.
When any hero receives Blessing of Fate or Bitter Reconciliation, she earns Gold and reduces the preparation time of her enhanced Basic Attack.

skills.name: Heartlink
skills.description:
Blesses a teammate and restores Health. When two blessed teammates come close, they recover Health and gain Movement Speed.
If she blesses an already blessed teammate, she will dash to them, and both recover Health and gain Movement Speed.
Can use this skill again within 5s.

skills.name: Bitter Farewell
skills.description:
Marks an enemy, exposes them and deals continuous damage. When two marked enemies come close, they stop taking damage.
If she uses the skill on a marked enemy, she will dash to them, immobilizing them and dealing continuous damage.
Can use this skill again within 5s.

skills.name: Destined Encounter
skills.description: Commands a swarm of wisps to fly forward, blessing and granting Health recovery to teammates, while marking and damaging enemies.

skillsZh.name: 吟行
skillsZh.description:
少司緣每隔一段時間強化下次普攻：盪鞦韆至敵人身前造成傷害和擊退，並向後跳躍。
當任意英雄受到「良緣賜福」或「冤緣化解」時，少司緣達成業績獲得金幣獎勵，並縮短強化普攻的準備時間。

skillsZh.name: 兩同心
skillsZh.description:
少司緣祝願友方「良緣」並回復生命值，兩名「良緣」英雄貼近時觸發「良緣賜福」再次回復高額生命值並加速。
對已有「良緣」的友方再次施放，會位移跟隨目標並進行「良緣賜福」，共同回復生命值並加速。
5秒內，少司緣可以再次施放本技能。

skillsZh.name: 怨離別
skillsZh.description:
少司緣警示敵方「冤緣」，持續造成顯形和傷害，兩名「冤緣」英雄貼近時可觸發「冤緣化解」停止傷害。
對已有「冤緣」的敵方再次施放，會朝目標位移並進行「冤緣化解」，造成定身和持續傷害。
5秒內，少司緣可以再次施放本技能。

skillsZh.name: 因緣際會
skillsZh.description: 少司緣指揮成群的緣崽向前擁簇飛行，對沿途友方英雄施加「良緣」和生命值回復，沿途敵人施加「冤緣」和傷害。

guide.hook: Dyadia: Enhances her next Basic Attack periodically to swing toward the enemy, dealing damage and knocking them back, then jumping back.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Frozen Breath, Augur's Word, then complete Venomous Staff, Mask of Agony. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.

name: Heino

skills.name: Fate's Guidance
skills.description: Basic Attack damage differs depending on whether he is in melee or ranged mode. Skills and melee Basic Attacks place marks on enemies.

skills.name: Scepter of Fate
skills.description:
Attacks in the target direction. If the target has a mark, skill cooldown is reduced.
Ranged: Deals damage and an extra attack to marked targets.
Melee: Deals damage and inflicts slow. Recovers Health upon hitting marked targets.

skills.name: Leap of Fate
skills.description:
Dashes forward and switches attack mode.
Enters melee mode if enemy heroes are nearby, increasing Physical and Magical Defense and restoring Health; otherwise, enters ranged mode, leaving a memory and gaining Movement Speed.

skills.name: Fate Rewind
skills.description:
Gains damage reduction and crowd control immunity, recovers Health based on his current Health, and cannot move. Deals magical damage and travels back to where he was.
If there is an allied tower within range, it returns to its state from 1.5s ago.

skillsZh.name: 命運洞察
skillsZh.description: 遠程和近戰狀態下擁有不同的普攻傷害，技能和近戰普攻命中敵人會對其疊加印記。

skillsZh.name: 命刃・追芒
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向進行攻擊，目標身上有印記時可減少技能冷卻。
遠程：造成傷害，並對前方有印記的目標進行額外攻擊。
近戰：造成傷害和減速，命中有印記的目標可回復自身生命值。

skillsZh.name: 命途行遊
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向突進，且可切換攻擊狀態。
若附近有敵方英雄，則進入近戰狀態，提升物理防禦和法術防禦，並回復生命值；否則進入遠程狀態，留下紀錄點，增加移速。

skillsZh.name: 命運回溯
skillsZh.description:
展開領域，期間處於霸體且不可移動，獲得減傷並回復生命值，血量越低，回復越高。隨後造成法術傷害，自身回溯至紀錄點。
若領域內有己方防禦塔，則將其回溯至1.5秒前狀態。

tips: Build: Holy Grail, Blazing Cape, Eye of the Phoenix.
tipsZh: 海諾（中路）：梯度 A，勝率 47.44%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：聖杯、紅蓮斗篷、不死鳥之眼.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the continuous poke of Skill 1 and reduced the damage reduction when Ultimate is used.
patchHistory.detail: "Currently, Heino offers a poor counterplay experience for opponents. His Ultimate's high damage reduction and restoration allow him to continuously poke enemies while being difficult to counter. We've reduced his damage output and the room for error in his Ultimate, giving opponents more opportunities to counter him."

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低1技能持續消耗能力，降低大招施放期間的免傷效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 目前海諾給對手的對抗體驗較差，大招高額的免傷和回復能力使其可以在敵方面前持續消耗且不容易受到反制，我們降低了他的輸出能力和大招容錯率，給對手更多的反制空間

faqs.question: Is Heino good in current season?
faqs.answer: Heino is Tier A Mage with 47.44% win rate, 0.8% pick rate, and 0.12% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Heino build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Holy Grail, Blazing Cape, Eye of the Phoenix, Ominous Premonition, Longnight Guardian, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Heino?
faqs.answer: Pick Butterfly, Dharma, Lu Bu. Strong into Diaochan, Mulan, Wukong.

faqsZh.question: 海諾 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 海諾 為 A 梯度，勝率 47.44%、選取 0.8%、禁用 0.12%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 海諾 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：聖杯、紅蓮斗篷、不死鳥之眼、不祥徵兆、永夜守護、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 海諾？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Butterfly、Dharma、Lu Bu。海諾 克制 Diaochan、Mulan、Wukong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Mulan, Wukong. Weak into: Butterfly, Dharma, Lu Bu.

guide.overview: Heino is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 48.0% win rate and 1.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Heino: Heino's Basic Attacks differ depending on whether he's in melee or ranged mode.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Succubus Cloak, then complete Savant's Wrath, Blazing Cape, Eye of the Phoenix. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Heino's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Scepter of Fate → Leap of Fate → Fate Rewind → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Fate Rewind (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Scepter of Fate, and Fate Rewind on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Scepter of Fate → Leap of Fate → Fate Rewind → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Heino is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.2% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Heino. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Heino vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 3.0% more often globally. Choose Heino when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Heino vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 3.8% more often globally. Choose Heino when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Heino excels into Diaochan, Mulan, Wukong. Avoid blind picking into Butterfly, Dharma, Lu Bu without team peel.

name: Mayene

skills.name: Slack Off a Lil Bit
skills.description: Using skills consumes Strength, which is recovered over time. When not moving, Strength and Health recover faster.

skills.name: Whatever (I)
skills.description:
Runs in the target direction and pulls enemies in front, dealing area damage and slowing them.
1-1 Combo: Deals area damage and launches enemies.
1-2 Combo: Deals damage and recovers Health.

skills.name: Whatever (II)
skills.description:
Skill 2: Flips forward, gains immunity and damage reduction, and recovers Health.
2-1 Combo: Blinks behind the enemy, knocking them back and damaging them.
2-2 Combo: Deals damage before leaping back, gaining immunity and damage reduction, and recovering Health.

skills.name: Get Serious
skills.description: Damages nearby enemies and recovers Punch Strength and Kick Strength. For 10s, increases max Strength and gains Movement Speed.

skillsZh.name: 稍微摸魚一下
skillsZh.description: 使用技能需要消耗力勁，力勁隨時間恢復，停止狀態下會加速恢復力勁和生命值。

skillsZh.name: 隨變一式
skillsZh.description:
1技能：朝指定方向奔跑並將敵人拉至身前，對其造成範圍傷害和減速。
1-1技能連招：造成範圍傷害和擊飛。
1-2技能連招：造成傷害並回復自身生命值。

skillsZh.name: 隨變二式
skillsZh.description:
2技能：朝指定方向翻越障礙，期間獲得霸體，減傷並回復生命值。
2-1技能連招：瞬移至敵人身後，擊退並造成傷害。
2-2技能連招：踢向敵人造成傷害，隨後跳躍，期間獲得霸體和減傷，並回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 稍微認真一點
skillsZh.description: 造成範圍傷害，立刻恢復部分力勁，並在10秒內獲得力勁上限提升和加速效果。

guide.overview: Mayene is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 47.5% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Mayene: Recovery replaced by Slack Off, which restores Strength and Health.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, Pure Sky, then complete Cuirass of Savagery, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Mayene's Warrior kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Whatever (I) → Whatever (II) → Get Serious → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Get Serious (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Whatever (I), and Get Serious on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Whatever (I) → Whatever (II) → Get Serious → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Mayene is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 47.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Mayene vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 5.1% more often globally. Choose Mayene when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Mayene vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Chicha wins 2.7% more often globally. Choose Mayene when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Mayene excels into Nuwa, Mi Yue, Liang. Avoid blind picking into Yaria without team peel.

name: Devara

skills.name: Wish of the Living
skills.description: Devara's Basic Attacks grant Energy. Becomes enhanced and gains another basic skill chance upon reaching the limit.

skills.name: Thunderblaze
skills.description: Dashes forward, dealing damage to enemies in his path while gaining a shield.

skills.name: Divine Judgment
skills.description: Knocks back and damages enemies in front of him.

skills.name: Millennium Echo
skills.description: Gains crowd control immunity and a Movement Speed boost. Upon landing, enhances Basic Attack. Basic Attacks grant Energy.

skillsZh.name: 千年迴響
skillsZh.description: 諦梵羅獲得霸體和加速，落地後強化普攻，每次普攻增加獲得的能量。

faqs.question: Is Devara good in current season?
faqs.answer: Devara is Tier S Mage with 46.82% win rate, 1.24% pick rate, and 0.23% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Devara build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Tempest, Doomsday, Deepfrost Siege, Blood Rage, Ravage - Phantom, Boots of Resistance.

faqs.question: How to counter Devara?
faqs.answer: Pick Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Strong into Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.

faqsZh.question: 諦梵羅 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 諦梵羅 為 S 梯度，勝率 46.82%、選取 1.24%、禁用 0.23%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 諦梵羅 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：逐風、末世、寒霜襲侵、血魔之怒、侵略・怒魂、抵抗之靴.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 諦梵羅？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。諦梵羅 克制 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。

tipsZh: 公孫離（發育路）：梯度 A，勝率 46.44%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：閃電匕首、末世、仁者破曉.

patchHistory.detail: Arli's flexibility is her trademark, so we are reducing her early game cooldown to let her better showcase her strengths.

Arli is a marksman with great mobility, and was one of the best laners among the marksman heroes. This has allowed players who used Arli to quickly build up a resource lead and begin to inflict fatal damage on their rivals by mid game. We hope that with this change, victories achieved with Arli will feel more like the result of the player's skill, rather than the hero's strength.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「靈活是公孫離的特點，我們適當降低前期的冷卻時間，好好發揮她的特點。」

Arli is a marksman with great mobility, and was one of the best laners among the marksman heroes. This has allowed players who used Arli to quickly build up a resource lead and begin to inflict fatal damage on their rivals by mid game. We hope that with this change, victories achieved with Arli will feel more like the result of the player's skill, rather than the hero's strength.

faqs.question: Is Arli good in current season?
faqs.answer: Arli is Tier A Marksman with 46.44% win rate, 0.7% pick rate, and 0.26% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Arli build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Sparkforged Dagger, Doomsday, Daybreaker's Virtue, Eternity Blade, Sunchaser, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Arli?
faqs.answer: Pick Donghuang, Daji. Strong into Kaizer, Angela.

faqsZh.question: 公孫離 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 公孫離 為 A 梯度，勝率 46.44%、選取 0.7%、禁用 0.26%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 公孫離 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：閃電匕首、末世、仁者破曉、無盡戰刃、逐日之弓、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 公孫離？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Donghuang、Daji。公孫離 克制 Kaizer、Angela。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Kaizer, Angela. Weak into: Donghuang, Daji.

guide.overview: Arli is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 47.0% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Arli: Basic Attack hits place marks on the target.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Doomsday, Boots of Dexterity, Shadow Ripper, then complete Eternity Blade, Daybreaker's Virtue, Sunchaser. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Arli's Marksman kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Lithe Step → Maple Dance → Autumn Storm → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Autumn Storm (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Lithe Step is your lane trade tool. Maple Dance second. Autumn Storm whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Lithe Step → Maple Dance → Autumn Storm → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Arli is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 47.0% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Arli vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Hou Yi wins 2.3% more often globally. Choose Arli when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Arli vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Marco Polo wins 3.1% more often globally. Choose Arli when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Arli excels into Kaizer, Angela. Avoid blind picking into Donghuang, Daji without team peel.

name: Luna

skills.name: Moonlight Dance
skills.description: Basic Attacks have two forms, melee and ranged. First Basic Attack in melee form will charge toward the target, and third Basic Attack deals extra damage. Enhanced Basic Attacks and skill damage mark enemies. Magical Attack boost will enhance her Attack Speed.

skills.name: Crescent Slice
skills.description: Unleashes a shockwave in the target direction, dealing damage and marking enemies hit.

skills.name: Searing Stab
skills.description: Gains a shield and pulls nearby enemies, dealing damage while stunning, slowing, and marking them.

skills.name: New Moon
skills.description:
Dashes to the target location, dealing damage to enemies in her path.
If she hits a marked enemy, this skill's cooldown is reset.

skillsZh.name: 月光之舞
skillsZh.description:
露娜的普攻擁有兩種形態，當目標超出近戰範圍時，會自動切換為遠程形態。
首次普攻為近戰時，露娜會衝向目標，第三次普攻額外造成傷害。強化普攻和技能傷害會標記敵方。法術攻擊提升可強化自身攻速。

skillsZh.name: 弦月斬
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射衝擊波，對命中的敵人造成傷害並施加標記。

skillsZh.name: 炙熱劍芒
skillsZh.description: 自身獲得護盾的同時拉扯附近敵人至自身位置，造成傷害、暈眩、減速效果並施加標記。

skillsZh.name: 新月突擊
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向突進，對沿途敵人造成傷害。
命中有露娜標記的敵人時重置大招的冷卻時間。

tips: Build: Runeblade, Succubus Cloak, Void Staff.
tipsZh: 露娜（打野）：梯度 A，勝率 46.27%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：符文大劍、魔女斗篷、虛無法杖.

patchHistory.detail: Luna is typically forced to leave the battlefield if her Ultimate fails. We have changed Luna's Basic Attack to allow her to contribute ranged damage while looking for a chance to return to battle.

patchHistory.change: Increased magical damage dealt by Skill 1.
patchHistory.detail: With her high level of difficulty and enormous potential, Luna can deal massive damage as long as she constantly refreshes her Ultimate. But when Lunais interrupted or the player makes a mistake, there's not much left for her to do other than spam Skill 1. Considering the occasional mistakes, we want Skill 1 to pose more of a threat. In this way, we can further increase Luna's overall strength and let her shine even brighter in the Gorge.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「如果露娜大招失誤，那麼她往往只能離開戰場。我們調整了露娜的普攻方式，讓她可以透過遠程攻擊提供傷害，同時尋找再次入場的機會。」

patchHistoryZh.change: Increased magical damage dealt by Skill 1.
patchHistoryZh.detail: With her high level of difficulty and enormous potential, Luna can deal massive damage as long as she constantly refreshes her Ultimate. But when Lunais interrupted or the player makes a mistake, there's not much left for her to do other than spam Skill 1. Considering the occasional mistakes, we want Skill 1 to pose more of a threat. In this way, we can further increase Luna's overall strength and let her shine even brighter in the Gorge.

faqs.question: Is Luna good in current season?
faqs.answer: Luna is Tier A Mage with 46.27% win rate, 0.63% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Luna build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Runeblade, Succubus Cloak, Void Staff, Sage's Sanctuary, Splendor, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Luna?
faqs.answer: Pick Athena, Augran, Fuzi. Strong into Yuhuan, Lady Zhen, Heino.

faqsZh.question: 露娜 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 露娜 為 A 梯度，勝率 46.27%、選取 0.63%、禁用 0.2%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 露娜 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：符文大劍、魔女斗篷、虛無法杖、賢者的庇護、輝月、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 露娜？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Athena、Augran、Fuzi。露娜 克制 Yuhuan、Lady Zhen、Heino。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Yuhuan, Lady Zhen, Heino. Weak into: Athena, Augran, Fuzi.

guide.overview: Luna is a Medium Mage (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 48.9% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Luna: Every three Basic Attacks form a repeating cycle.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Runeblade, Boots of Resistance, Augur's Word, then complete Insatiable Tome, Ominous Premonition, Breakthrough Robe. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Luna's Mage kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Crescent Slice → Searing Stab → New Moon → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → New Moon (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Searing Stab provides mobility or stick—max first. Crescent Slice second for damage. New Moon on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Crescent Slice → Searing Stab → New Moon → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: New Moon after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Luna sits at Tier B globally (48.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Luna vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 2.1% more often globally. Choose Luna when you need Jungling identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Luna vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 2.9% more often globally. Choose Luna when you need Jungling identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Luna excels into Yuhuan, Lady Zhen, Heino. Avoid blind picking into Athena, Augran, Fuzi without team peel.

name: Guan Yu

skills.name: Rider of Triumph
skills.description:
Normal Stance: Moving constantly accumulates a Movement Speed bonus, and reaching a certain distance activates the Charge Stance.
Charge Stance: Enhances the next skill and Basic Attack.

skills.name: Heroic Charge
skills.description:
Normal Stance: Deals damage to enemies within range.
Charge Stance: Charges forward, knocking back enemies in his path while dealing damage.

skills.name: Soaring Green Dragon
skills.description:
Normal Stance: Removes crowd control effects and gains Movement Speed.
Charge Stance: Removes crowd control effects and leaps forward, knocking back enemies within the landing area and dealing damage.

skills.name: Razor Cavalry
skills.description:
Normal Stance: Enhances himself, reducing the movement distance required to enter Charge stance.
Charge Stance: Summons heavy cavalry that dash forward, dealing damage and knocking back enemies in their path.

skillsZh.name: 一騎當千
skillsZh.description:
普通姿態：保持移動會持續累積移速加成，移動固定距離後進入衝鋒姿態。
衝鋒狀態：下次技能和普攻獲得強化。

skillsZh.name: 單刀赴會
skillsZh.description:
普通姿態：對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害。
衝鋒姿態：向面朝方向衝鋒，擊退沿途敵人並造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 青龍偃月
skillsZh.description:
普通姿態：解除所受到的控制，並獲得額外移速。
衝鋒姿態：解除所受到的控制，向面朝方向進行跳躍，擊退落地範圍內的敵人並造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 刀鋒鐵騎
skillsZh.description:
強化自身，期間減少進入衝鋒姿態所需要的移動距離。
衝鋒姿態：召喚鐵騎與自身向面朝方向突進，對沿途敵人造成傷害和擊退效果。
