tips: Guan Yu (Warrior): Tier B — 46.23% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Axe of Torment, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.
tipsZh: 關羽（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 46.23%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暗影戰斧、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

patchHistory.detail:
Reduced Energy decay while charging.
Guan Yu isn't performing well, in large part because his Energy decays too fast while charging. This becomes very punishing if Guan Yu gets crowd controlled, or if his player slips up.We've reduced the Energy decay speed to give his unique mechanics more of a chance to shine.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the base cooldown of his Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: A number of new fighter heroes have made their debut in Hero's Gorge in the last few updates. As a result, Guan Yu now appears a little weak when compared to newer fighter heroes with their arsenals of flashy skills. We hope that enhancing Guan Yu's Ultimate will make him a more attractive option for our players.

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低關羽衝鋒能量衰減速度
patchHistoryZh.detail:
降低關羽衝鋒能量衰減速度
關羽目前版本表現不佳，某種程度上是因為他在受到控制，或其使用者操作失誤後，關羽衝鋒能力衰減速度過快造成的。我們降低了關羽衝鋒能量衰減速度，希望能讓這位機制獨特的英雄獲得更多表現機會。

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced the base cooldown of his Ultimate.
patchHistoryZh.detail: A number of new fighter heroes have made their debut in Hero's Gorge in the last few updates. As a result, Guan Yu now appears a little weak when compared to newer fighter heroes with their arsenals of flashy skills. We hope that enhancing Guan Yu's Ultimate will make him a more attractive option for our players.

faqs.question: Is Guan Yu good in current season?
faqs.answer: Guan Yu is Tier B Warrior with 46.23% win rate, 0.37% pick rate, and 0.09% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Guan Yu build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Axe of Torment, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Amble - Winter, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak.

faqs.question: How to counter Guan Yu?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun. Strong into Daji, Mi Yue, Yixing.

faqsZh.question: 關羽 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 關羽 為 B 梯度，勝率 46.23%、選取 0.37%、禁用 0.09%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 關羽 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暗影戰斧、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、徐行・凜冬、不祥徵兆、魔女斗篷.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 關羽？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun。關羽 克制 Daji、Mi Yue、Yixing。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Daji, Mi Yue, Yixing. Weak into: Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun.

guide.overview: Guan Yu is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 48.3% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Guan Yu: '''Normal Stance:''' Moving constantly accumulates a Movement Speed bonus, and reaching a certain distance activates the Charge Stance.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Cuirass of Savagery, then complete Frigid Charge, Succubus Cloak, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Guan Yu's Warrior kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Heroic Charge → Soaring Green Dragon → Razor Cavalry → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Razor Cavalry (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Heroic Charge, and Razor Cavalry on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Heroic Charge → Soaring Green Dragon → Razor Cavalry → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Guan Yu sits at Tier B globally (48.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Guan Yu vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 4.3% more often globally. Choose Guan Yu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Guan Yu vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Chicha wins 1.9% more often globally. Choose Guan Yu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Guan Yu excels into Daji, Mi Yue, Yixing. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.

name: Dolia

skills.name: Mermaid's Gift
skills.description:
Transforms into a mermaid while in water, reducing slow effects, recovering Health and Mana over time, and dealing area damage with Basic Attacks. 
Her Recovery skill changes to let her form a covenant with a teammate. Her Ultimate prioritizes resetting this teammate's skill cooldowns.

skills.name: Ode
skills.description: Unleashes soundwaves that deal damage and inflict slow. When in water, the last soundwave knocks back enemies.

skills.name: Wavemaker
skills.description: Creates a pool in the target direction, restoring Health and Mana to herself and teammates within. The pool disappears after she leaves it.

skills.name: Celestial Melody
skills.description: Resets the longest current skill cooldown of a teammate within range, transferring the cooldown to herself. Prioritizes covenant teammates.

skillsZh.name: 人魚之賜
skillsZh.description:
在水域(河道也視為水域)會變成人魚，減輕自己受到的減速效果，並持續回復生命值和法力值，同時普攻會變成範圍傷害。
【恢復】技能會變成特殊技能，可與選定隊友建立契約，使用大招時會優先重置契約隊友的技能冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 歡歌
skillsZh.description: 發出向外擴散的聲波，造成傷害和減速。在水域施放時，最後一道聲波還會擊退敵人。

skillsZh.name: 逐浪
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向製造一片水域，為水域內的隊友和自己回復生命值和法力值，朵莉亞離開水域後，水域就會消失。

skillsZh.name: 天籟
skillsZh.description: 重置範圍內一名隊友目前冷卻時間最長的技能，由自己承擔技能冷卻。優先對已締結契約的隊友生效。

tips: Build: Boots of the Arcane, Holy Grail, Venomous Staff.
tipsZh: 朵莉亞（遊走）：梯度 S，勝率 45.94%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：祕法之靴、聖杯、夢魘之牙.

patchHistory.change: Removed Skill 1's knockback effect on distant enemies.
patchHistory.detail: "Dolia's Skill 1 already damages and slows enemies in a wide area. By removing the knockback effect for distant targets, we aim to reduce her ability to poke and interrupt enemies."

patchHistory.change: Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail:
Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
Dolia is currently underperforming, so we're boosting the stats of some of her skills and giving her an extra benefit for refreshing her teammates' skills.Hopefully this will make her more powerful and help her progress faster.

patchHistoryZh.change: 移除1技能對遠處敵人的擊退效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「朵莉亞的1技能可以造成大範圍的傷害和減速效果，我們適當回收遠端的控制效果，以降低她的消耗和打斷能力。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
朵莉亞在目前版本的表現稍嫌普通，我們希望透過提升她部分技能的數值，並強化她重置友方英雄技能後的收益。藉此讓她獲得更高的戰鬥力和成長速度。

guide.overview: Dolia is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 46.1% win rate and 1.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Dolia: Dolia takes on mermaid form when in water (rivers are also considered water), reducing the slows taken by 50% and returning life and mana every second.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Dawnlight, Venomous Staff, then complete Sage's Sanctuary, Succubus Cloak. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Dolia's Support kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Ode → Wavemaker → Celestial Melody → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Celestial Melody (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Ode, and Celestial Melody on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Ode → Wavemaker → Celestial Melody → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Roaming skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Dolia is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 0.5% — expect Dolia to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Dolia vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Cai Yan wins 4.3% more often globally. Choose Dolia when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.
Dolia vs Yaria (Support, Tier S): Yaria is 1.1% pick / 48.0% WR. Yaria wins 2.0% more often globally. Choose Dolia when you need Roaming identity; choose Yaria for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Dolia excels into Dun, Yaria. Avoid blind picking into Sima Yi, Guiguzi without team peel.

name: Jing

skills.name: Lethal Reflections
skills.description: Jing and her image apply 2 different types of marks on enemies when they deal damage. If an enemy has both types of mark at the same time, they take damage and the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2 are reset.

skills.name: Reflective Assault
skills.description:
Dashes forward, damaging enemies in her path and slowing them while enhancing her next Basic Attack.
If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, one will be created to fight alongside her.

skills.name: Shattered Illusions
skills.description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies while recovering Health and gaining increased Movement Speed.
If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, then one will be created to fight alongside her.

skills.name: Mirror Domain
skills.description: Dashes forward, pulling enemies to the center of her magic circle and immobilizing them there. She gains damage reduction while inside the circle, and recovers Health when she swaps locations.

skillsZh.name: 鑄鏡
skillsZh.description: 鏡的本體和鏡像對敵人造成傷害會分別施加印記，如果敵人同時擁有2種印記會受到傷害，並重置基礎技能冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 開鋒
skillsZh.description:
鏡向前位移對路徑敵人造成傷害和減速，並強化下次普攻。
場上沒有鏡像時，會產生鏡像一起攻擊。

skillsZh.name: 裂空
skillsZh.description:
鏡對周圍敵人造成傷害並獲得生命值回復和加速。
場上沒有鏡像時，會產生鏡像一起攻擊。

skillsZh.name: 見影
skillsZh.description: 鏡向前位移，將敵人拉至法陣中間並定身。身處法陣中時獲得減傷，【移形】交換過程獲得生命值回復。

tips: Build: Master Sword, Rapacious Bite, Overlord's Might.
tipsZh: 鏡（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 45.68%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：宗師之力、貪婪之噬、強者破軍.

patchHistory.change: Enhanced Basic Attack and Ultimate Effect Upgrade

patchHistory.detail: In contrast to the other highly mobile assassins in the game, Jing is relatively strong throughout most of the game. A well-farmed and played Jing can even make short work of rival tanks. As our players continue to learn more about the game and hone their skills and strategies, we're seeing a growing number of Jing aces. Our purpose in adjusting her late game capabilities is to give other players and heroes a small hope of survival when going up against her.

patchHistoryZh.change: 強化普攻&大招效果升級

patchHistoryZh.detail: In contrast to the other highly mobile assassins in the game, Jing is relatively strong throughout most of the game. A well-farmed and played Jing can even make short work of rival tanks. As our players continue to learn more about the game and hone their skills and strategies, we're seeing a growing number of Jing aces. Our purpose in adjusting her late game capabilities is to give other players and heroes a small hope of survival when going up against her.

faqs.question: Is Jing good in current season?
faqs.answer: Jing is Tier B Assassin with 45.68% win rate, 0.32% pick rate, and 0.11% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Jing build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Master Sword, Rapacious Bite, Overlord's Might, Starbreaker, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Jing?
faqs.answer: Pick Angela, Daji, Gan & Mo. Strong into Dharma, Ata, Lian Po.

faqsZh.question: 鏡 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 鏡 為 B 梯度，勝率 45.68%、選取 0.32%、禁用 0.11%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 鏡 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：宗師之力、貪婪之噬、強者破軍、碎星錘、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 鏡？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Angela、Daji、Gan & Mo。鏡 克制 Dharma、Ata、Lian Po。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Dharma, Ata, Lian Po. Weak into: Angela, Daji, Gan & Mo.

guide.overview: Jing is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 45.5% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Jing: Jing and her image apply 2 different types of marks on enemies when they deal damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Rapacious Bite, Axe of Torment, then complete Master Sword, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Jing's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Reflective Assault → Shattered Illusions → Mirror Domain → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Mirror Domain (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Shattered Illusions provides mobility or stick—max first. Reflective Assault second for damage. Mirror Domain on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Reflective Assault → Shattered Illusions → Mirror Domain → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Jungling skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Mirror Domain after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Jing sits at Tier B globally (45.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Jing vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Wukong wins 4.3% more often globally. Choose Jing when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Jing vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Musashi wins 5.3% more often globally. Choose Jing when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Jing excels into Dharma, Ata, Lian Po. Avoid blind picking into Angela, Daji, Gan & Mo without team peel.
